Derek- With just days remaining, I am making one final appeal for sponsors to support the**Young Democrats of America National Convention**. We will be welcoming nearly a thousand young Democrats from all over the country in**Philadelphia, Pennsylvania,** at the **Sheraton Downtown** from **July 16-19**. **Your support is essential for energizing and preparing these young Democrats as we head into the 2026 elections.**

We're doing one final last call for persons or organzations interested in supporting the Young Democrats of America at our **Friend of YDA ($250)** , **YDA Alumni** **($500)** , and **Bronze ($1000)** sponsorship levels. [
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uunW50kR_N3E1JsW_KUsfgL2o65n3gIffqrb2EphXWbVissvIpIF-eIi496oIDT4ZLUUP2KdktZ50JREfCTpbiDCliL9ksJ5g_CAyvNdLfNOQ26N4FpSL9IsUNMjjxw9mIS8YKOcyzW51coZJUYEJEhAG69c7gTGJs3abV8YIxNzXaaBElz5LxF2_0pQVX0moCO2EeULQ5_v-DJznYN6I7RSs2CC0W2SMKKEcLNpWSAAOEK8R9QPz_moQ2jHprVW8SRJTuh41M3Ru-fcSB7sIfiEeWDGJ9kb84ul43bP2ZNrF4yjGfBpm9Oq9fXMUWQ4GqaVAuQCjZjSLjgM3M0m0gPXz6eMW31FIe6nPmmfNra1XXNlBUQq7yk56N3wvzn1MrO6wXc_2RsB3RgRtftiOFMBVNDb2DVOHZgxSFt8fTIsH/4hz/mMAWgWyCSVedB9icOgDvOA/h1/h001.tEVzwffgXp_Z4lo7Hd4iOZOjeO0Lfp8kYOfENYHcg4I) | **Friend of YDA ($250)**

* Name listed in the program
* Social media recognition

| **Y DA Alumni ($500)**
* 1 VIP convention pass, including access to the VIP and Alumni reception
* Name listed in the program
* Social media recognition

| **Bronze ($1000)**
* 2 VIP convention passes, including access to the VIP and Alumni reception

---|---|---

subject: What should Congress be focused on?
body:
Take our survey!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111000974/555900960/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYxMGRlMDktYzY1YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oW3TISdDmnpkVFvjrOIjlLEiLc082gQJxmo4x6jgY1o=) | Peter, If we’ve learned anything the past 6 months, it’s that Republicans in Congress have the wrong priorities. **When we’re in an affordability crisis, the last thing we need is tax cuts for billionaires or slashing of Medicaid. It makes absolutely no sense.** [_**That’s why Josh wants to hear from you: What issues do you think Congress should be focused on?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111000975/555900961/-115986185?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYxMGRlMDktYzY1YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oW3TISdDmnpkVFvjrOIjlLEiLc082gQJxmo4x6jgY1o=&emci=4873165a-5658-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6610de09-c65a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6455652) [TAKE OUR SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111000976/555900962/-115986185?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYxMGRlMDktYzY1YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oW3TISdDmnpkVFvjrOIjlLEiLc082gQJxmo4x6jgY1o=&emci=4873165a-5658-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6610de09-c65a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6455652) Thanks for sharing your ideas! — Team Harder

When we’re in an affordability crisis, the last thing we need is tax cuts for billionaires or slashing of Medicaid. It makes absolutely no sense. Thanks for sharing your ideas! — Team Harder *

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Please - Allow me to reintroduce myself, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor.
|
---
Peter,

It's me, Tommy Tuberville.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

body:
---
$3. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the DNC today, Derek. $3 because Republicans in Congress just passed the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history — and millions of people will suffer the consequences. $3 because it’s clearer than ever that Republicans aren’t in office to help their constituents... they’re just there to serve Trump. $3 because it’s up to all of us to send a message to every single Republican who voted for this bill: **We’re coming for your seat.** In the last few days, thousands of Democrats have chipped in to help flip the House and Senate. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 7/6/2025
body:
Independence Weekend Recap: Big Wins & Bigger Purpose
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**July 6, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**

| | Dear Readers,
As we wrap up this Independence Day weekend, we’re struck by both the weight of the moment—and the hope on the horizon.
The nation watched as [President Trump signed the long-anticipated “Big, Beautiful Bill” on the Fourth of July itself](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—a historic move cementing major conservative wins: permanent tax cuts, no taxes on tips and overtime, increased border security, Planned Parenthood defunded, and boosted missile defense. Speaker Mike Johnson called it a **“cornerstone of America’s new golden age.”**
Here in Colorado, we felt the celebration. Despite [higher-than-average beef prices](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), families gathered for parades, fireworks, and backyard barbecues—proof that patriotism still burns bright.
But we’re also reminded of why we fight.
At Rocky Mountain Voice, we’re not just covering the news—**we’re fighting for truth** in a state hijacked by progressive policies and political spin. That mission came alive at our [Mountain Majesty Gala](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), where hundreds gathered to hear Eric Trump and commit to reclaiming Colorado. It wasn’t just an event—it was the launch of a movement. _[(Click here to rewatch his message for YOU.)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_
If this week proves anything, it’s that Americans are ready. Ready to remember what matters. Ready to take their country—and their state—back.
Independence Day also calls us to reflect. [Freedom isn’t free](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—but it’s always worth it. Michael Hancock reminded us that Frederick Douglass didn’t reject America’s ideals—[he challenged us to fulfill them](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Don Beezley called July 4, 1776, [“one perfect moment”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—a triumph of liberty rooted in God-given rights. Our founding wasn’t flawless, but it was revolutionary—and it’s up to us to carry it forward.
Meanwhile, our hearts remain with those in Texas, where [devastating floods](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) took the lives of dozens—including children. Please join us in keeping those families in your prayers.
And one quick note—we’re still working out some email and website kinks. A quick open or click helps us stay in your inbox and keeps the mission strong.
Let this week remind us: no matter the cost, **liberty is worth it.** And here in Colorado—we’re just getting started.
In liberty and truth,
Team RMV
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[“A deadline without a plan”: how rural Colorado is building the energy future the state won’t](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In May 2023, Gov. Jared Polis signed HB 23‐1247, directing the Colorado Energy Office to study advanced energy solutions — from nuclear and geothermal to long-duration storage — in regions facing coal-plant closures like Craig Station.
**[Gaines: Activists are using CPW to sneak in what the public rejected](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _By a 15% margin Denver voters last November soundly rejected an initiative to ban any new fur sales (among other things like display or trades) in the city. If you thought that this would be enough to convince animal rights activists to rethink their strategy, you’re right._
**[Armagost to Step Down: What His Departure Means for House District 64](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a move that marks the end of an era for one of the most outspoken conservatives in the Colorado legislature, House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost announced Monday that he will officially resign his seat in House District 64, effective September 1.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Released, rearrested and now accused again: Roybal-Smith case ignites parole reform debate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Denver Police arrested 38-year-old Ricky Lee Roybal-Smith early Monday morning, July 1, following the death of his cellmate at the Downtown Denver Detention Center. The alleged homicide came just hours after Roybal-Smith was jailed on unrelated charges—less than a day after two Aurora stabbings.

**[Colorado Lawmakers Reject Federal Overtime Exemption Prioritizing Revenue Over Relief](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[AXIOS DENVER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) President Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” would make some overtime pay exempt from federal income taxes. Yes, but: Colorado won’t do the same. State lawmakers tucked a little-noticed provision into a lengthy tax bill earlier this year to decouple from federal law when it comes to overtime pay, starting in 2027.
**[Instructors, sheriffs warn: New concealed carry law causes confusion, long lines statewide](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) New requirements to obtain a concealed carry permit in Colorado took effect on Tuesday. Under House Bill 24-1174, applicants must complete eight hours of in-person training and education on things like safe storage and handling of weapons. There is also now a live fire training requirement.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Garbo: The ‘One Big Beautiful Bill’ is an all-or-nothing bet on reshaping America](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The “One Big Beautiful Bill Act,” introduced in the House as HR 1, represents one of the most sweeping legislative proposals in recent political history. Spanning hundreds of pages and touching nearly every corner of federal governance, it combines tax reform, healthcare restructuring, social policy shifts, and regulatory rollback into a single omnibus package._
**[Biden’s DOE Played Fast and Loose Rushing to Spend $42 Billion in Taxpayer Cash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[REAL CLEAR INVESTIGATIONS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In its last two working days, the Biden administration’s Energy Department signed off on nearly $42 billion for green energy projects – a sum that exceeded the total amount its Loan Programs Office (LPO) had put out in the past decade.

**[UPenn caves to Title IX truth: Women’s sports get apology, restored records](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The U.S. Department of Education announced Tuesday that the University of Pennsylvania has agreed to a resolution with President Donald Trump’s administration to keep biological male trans athletes out of women’s sports, in a statement provided to Fox News Digital.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Union demands vs. rural realities: Safeway strike spreads to Fort Morgan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Safeway employees in Fort Morgan are now part of an expanding labor walkout unfolding across Colorado, as union members demand greater transparency, long-term healthcare funding, and accountability from one of the nation’s largest grocery chains.
__
**[Boulder Jewish Community Leader Killed in Firebomb Attack](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A woman injured in the Boulder Pearl Street Mall attack earlier this month has died, leading the Boulder District Attorney’s Office to file murder charges against an Egyptian national accused of carrying out the attack.
**[Grand Junction quietly pursued $8.45M pedestrian bridge as auto dealer faced eminent domain](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE BUSINESS TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Why was GJ Auto Sales selected as the site for the Colorado Department of Transportation’s Downtown Grand Junction Mobility Hub when other nearby options existed, including city and county-owned land?

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Pastor Bob: Careful, Major—you serve at the pleasure of the President](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In a recent op-ed in the New York Times, a U.S. Army Major vehemently disagreed with President Trump’s order to remove transgender individuals from military service. He noted that as an evangelical conservative Christian, most wouldn’t expect him to disagree with the order. He’s right—evangelical conservative Christians would never support something so far left._
__
**[Garbo: America’s $16.4 billion wake-up call—the largest healthcare fraud in U.S. history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The United States has just witnessed the largest healthcare fraud takedown in its history. Over 324 individuals – including 96 licensed medical professionals – stand accused of orchestrating and profiting from a sprawling $16.4 billion scheme that defrauded Medicare, Medicaid, and the American taxpayer._
__
**[Devotional: When the truth calls you back into formation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _I remember the day truth found me, normative truth that is, and it wasn’t in a church pew or quiet devotional moment. It was on a drill pad, surrounded by hundreds of Airmen at Lackland Air Force Base, standing at attention in full formation._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** Only about 51% of Americans say they own a U.S. flag, according to recent polls from late June and early July 2025. Another survey also found a clear political divide: 68% of Republicans report own a flag, compared to just 37% of Democrats.
|
---

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “Those who expect to reap the blessings of freedom, must, like me, undergo the fatigue of supporting it.” – Thomas Paine

|

Dear Peter,
As a former member of Congress, I know how important it is for Colorado to have leaders who are tough, principled, and unafraid to take on the biggest fights.
That’s why I’m proud to support Jena Griswold in her campaign for Attorney General.
Jena has never backed down from a challenge. She stood up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists, protected the right to vote here in Colorado, and defended our democracy when it mattered most. She’s the real deal—and Colorado needs her in the Attorney General’s office.
We’re heading into a critical new fundraising quarter, and now is the time to work together to ensure Jena has the momentum she needs to win this race.
Will you join me in supporting Jena’s campaign for Attorney General by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250706-email]
Thank you for standing with strong, fearless leaders like Jena.
With gratitude,
Betsy Markey

Thank you! Because of your support, we closed on our end-of-quarter goal and showed the GOP that grassroots supporters won’t back down in the face of their chaos. **Now, we’re stepping into the new quarter with the resources we need to fight back against Donald Trump and the Republican extreme agenda.** Small dollar donations fuel _everything_ we do — from organizing and reaching voters to electing Democrats who will stand up for Americans everywhere. Your support means we can keep organizing, speaking out, and working to flip the Senate so we can protect the programs that millions of Americans count on. We have the momentum. Now, as we kick off the new quarter, I’m asking you to help us stay ahead of the curve and keep building our movement to defeat Donald Trump and his Republican trifecta. = | | = From the bottom of my heart, thank you for standing with me in this work. name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Fan BANNED from stadium after taunting Diamondbacks second baseman to tears
body:
The Arizona Diamondbacks’ recent 4-1 win over the White Sox in Chicago wasn’t all fun and games, after second baseman Ketel Marte appeared to break down in tears at second base after a fan reportedly heckled him about his late mother.The heckling took place during Marte’s at-bat in the seventh inning, before he was then consoled by manager Torey Lovullo and shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.The spectator is alleged to have made a derogatory remark about Marte’s mother, who passed away after a car accident in 2017.After the incident, Lovullo and Diamondbacks bench coach Jeff Banister asked security to remove the fan from the stadium, and security complied. Now, the White Sox organization has banned the fan from the ballpark. | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-Bg)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

The Arizona Diamondbacks’ recent 4-1 win over the White Sox in Chicago wasn’t all fun and games, after second baseman Ketel Marte appeared to break down in tears at second base after a fan reportedly heckled him about his late mother.The heckling took place during Marte’s at-bat in the seventh inning, before he was then consoled by manager Torey Lovullo and shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.The spectator is alleged to have made a derogatory remark about Marte’s mother, who passed away after a car accident in 2017.After the incident, Lovullo and Diamondbacks bench coach Jeff Banister asked security to remove the fan from the stadium, and security complied. name: Troy Downing
subject: SHOCKING: Chinese Spies Caught Targeting U.S. Military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
America is under attack from within. We must respond.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._EGshE9ra0d0f5Vg)Peter,
I’m writing to alert you to an alarming development that threatens national security.
Two Chinese nationals have just been arrested for **spying on U.S. Navy personnel and military installations** on behalf of the Chinese Communist Party.
According to the Department of Justice, these operatives were tasked with recruiting U.S. service members to assist with covert operations, gathering sensitive intelligence, and even delivering cash payments through “**dead** **drops** ” — all under the direction of China’s Ministry of State Security.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._a5-J77HqUw)This is not an isolated incident. It’s part of a coordinated campaign by Communist China to infiltrate and weaken the United States from within.
Thanks to the exceptional work of the **FBI and Naval Criminal Investigative Service** , these agents have been caught, and a clear message has been sent: **_The United States will not tolerate espionage on our soil._**
But make no mistake: this is far from over.
The Chinese Communist Party is spending billions to steal our data, buy up our farmland, and target our military, technology, and infrastructure.
We must stay vigilant. We must remain strong. And we must act now.
The Trump administration has taken decisive steps to confront the CCP and strengthen national defenses. But to finish the job, we need allies in Congress who will put America First and not back down.
[Will you chip in to my America First campaign to support my fight in Congress against the Chinese Communist Party?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._vyVNHexlgvvItMw)[RUSH YOUR DONATION NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._8bubv5L1ume87EBw)This is a national security emergency. The threat is real. And the time to act is now.
Thank you for your patriotic support.
-Troy Downing| |
---

subject: Law and Order is BACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We won’t stop until the border is secure

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
|
---
Did you see the news? The Trump administration announced that 969 illegal immigrants were arrested in just ONE DAY. We’ve been asking for this for the last 4 years, and it's good to see law and order is back on the menu.

I also made border security a pillar of my campaign and will support this administration's moves at every step. But we still need to finish the job and secure our border once and for all.

With all the recent pushback from Democrats, we’re going to need the support of the American people to secure our border finally. **[**Will you spare a minute to sign your name and chip in to support finishing the border wall?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ApkklGQ)**

Consumer Reports just released its annual rankings of the [most reliable car brands](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE-DOyx4_gEXFGncbdqU1rN5XrPBYAG71t4-cqScIO1oNJrv-7pNN3Tehfsn7mTKGqdAZ_ZUCqVpj7kk8g5nTwumfBKWjdIeJxDQcaG4UJNF599TW1mzEgE1FRmpOqk1qKGpNiOxG-YroEUuclC4ChBke9VroHmWlTPXmlBCSSH6BmqpxdCtSmq56kYPwFpB1pWY6kd0oWy0-nd8UaqXuFfebKUcmTUfDEYG43me9QN9PIL7vgoMRqmHoW0bBuMFxP-I-IKJzwmD5UsM-blT4omOmErmJb5jQb7FYJHn54zpyWCskrHH6bx3uVesFfcdnf99Uf6l7mXgJwAA__8nYoNg), as we report below. ## Texas Flooding Kills 70, Dozens Still Missing
At least [70 people are confirmed dead](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHK3CAURp_G7Ax6TaJZuCiU7P5uSuky3F-vicXEoM5M5-1LCn2Crg8cvu_8_Fg_MKZ4bt_wINtCXk961UStUVmPXFuhFPEzkcNSX4Rtp3LkFQSMXGgu9Ooxpvc6dN4GIiDVkZV6lMaAnlW3W0IfZqcEGiECTQYCjW6aYZ4HFDBRF-1tE1poKcSkoJdGzGPQ0shglJmBDYJ8bLn0v3I8204hvfOTSu_y0SW7t3ZVpr4wWBgs-OnuB_2Wb8xg-fGdwZLik_jj8tioMlga_cbKQ8rZx3P7B7hU3BN6DoI7PC4qlT9OdC4_zkb-9qsleqa-SlCDMcNkumL99YopxTppNojtwJj-7mr_FfNp4U8AAAD__9jUh0A) as of Sunday afternoon after catastrophic flooding tore through central Texas, with the majority in Kerr County, including 21 children. President Trump, who is [expected to visit the state on Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd45gHAcoKF7jLq_d0gJ7HGYFxoLZZP33q-wvbH2le3TOx32-e0q0P_77jI63Mu_4agmZsc65NK6YyIeEi6_thZ4j1lxmkDD2UvdSz6undM7XbnUbIuDQoVN6VMaAtkMX3QhKbzpoBPQYgpewWGusDWqBm7ahI_d-k1pqJeVtgIsy0o6bVkZtZjAWxFXiSlzq5bPQzhG3dJYn1stScpdcZD6aGP4JmARMHDFSSu9NwBRLxreQgMmvmXZqXD1T2QVM42C0Uqrn-pWP_qgl-JDO_kmNuGf89q3fKq3-FDB11a3Hi1KidtPiKh_Z0y-j4z9Fezr4CQAA__981YFk), signed a major disaster declaration, and FEMA is on the ground alongside local crews handling rescues and recovery. Survivors described waking to water rushing through homes—a [woman and her son clung to a tree](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLturDAYhJ_GdEa-4Fvh4jR0e9qUyIt_gyODV7aB7NtHRHmDdJ800ozm-3hMDxdT3Jf_bgPbQp52uGqC1qBMW66tQIrumWB2pV7g2gplyxMjTGCiMFGTdzG9p6HzNgAw4B1YqgTVminDu9Ua48UspQlmUEL64CmVggAfvDRCctlFe7cRRRQlRHLWU02MCIpqGjTXhqGBgI8tl_4zx72tENI7n1D6OW9dsmtrr4r4P8RGxMbruvr9Od8v7hyx8UbExqPiX2rw5SoOKWcf9wXXo5zxzKXi5XDepeMFuMQTCi7z7hhVRJuuWP-6YkqxSoUGsmwupp_99idpp2XfAQAA____noE1), a man escaped through a window and stood for hours on a narrow box above the flood. At Camp Mystic, five young girls died, and at least a dozen more remain missing. One father searching for his daughter [instead found the body of another child](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ8Gd0QYbGMXFLdxl9tuaRE4xz67_ERAks3br7yvsM1opJE-zczHdbtaCpT2_zaCaZi3BK8aoDUoW8y1FQhkbwGcLfUFth1QYt6kkCMXmgu9eUvhvQ2dNwggQXVgej328yz1orrDTE4NQ68WnIRDcNqrxYHHEdwNBeLSkTlpQgvdCzEpeelnsYyo-7nHWc2LZIMATy2Xy2em1A7A8M5PKBeXYxfM0dq9MvWPyZXJNb3vubYzYnI9wUyuQp9yukfl5z4mV289r2CLOyjtHHPh3j72o0HhlHiDb1s5hpx95dF-QeV7ociRkmdy7Yrx9xeFQHXSbBB7tBR-67Q_ffg08icAAP__nBiFgA). Here’s a [list of reputable places](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1vgzAQQH8NbI7OH2AYPHTJlq4dkcHn2JXJIfsUmn9fpX-h85Pek97Xbbn5XPLj_ul3dBxpeeDZCjJjXXZqXLFkvxbcfG0nek5Yd1oUqEGAFWCX4HN5LaYPLiIq1D06aQc5TcrOuk8uqAArrLjOm5mDh3EI0oC21ns9rGj67N42sGAlwKjVRU4wD9HKScZJT7PqDGDITPXyTfnBCWN50RPrZaO9Ly4xH63TH526dup6IB0F36hT10SnYBIJyyGeeeO8N0FRcELB-OObiIUoNCGlHa0cTF9dOM5cSm6j7Qzcd5_LX4b_9ebp1G8AAAD__yWZd94) where you can donate to help flood victims in central Texas. Every bit helps. _The Flyover_ is making a donation too.
## Bitcoin Whale Moves $8.6 Billion in Single Day
July 4 saw the [largest single-day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGOozAQQNHTwA5kG4jNwovMgixGGWmkSFlaBS5CtWyMTCV0bt_qvkJf4H_p3a_uChRoffyDiJbn5FY89oDMmF1MO2cMBGPACfJ-IPCCOSanhOoqoSuhnQcKb9eW3s6ICpsSrdSdNEbpvikX22Dn21bC5GcjJJ6gH9Wo5nHSXnmYppLsd01ooaUQp0bV0oi-m7U0cjaN6VXRCvTEKdcfiVZecA7v9MJcTymWwS7M214050INhRqO46g3zFvAT-J3DVSoYYMHFmrwKUdYuRqJp0RrdSwQsIrphXtlquezjiwvl_-35-purvl7_7Pqc5mt3w4KgfaTLlrxiEDhZ8y_0npZ9RUAAP__5x5_qA) transfer of decades-old bitcoin in history, as a wallet that had been dormant for 14 years transferred 80,000 bitcoin, worth about $8.6 billion, to new addresses. The bitcoin was purchased for less than $210,000 in 2011, during bitcoin’s early-adopter timeframe known as the Satoshi era. Large, early investments like this are known as [whales](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O3CAQRZ_G7rBg_AMuKNK427QpLQzj9URgVjBZy28f7b7C119dnXP-PNaHo0jn87dLaHnP64lXjciMZU25csFIbovoXakXOj6wpLyChFFILaReg6N4r0Mb7I4I2LdolR6VMaDnvj2s2s3olJsAvdcOpiCNcRKH3mvEGUNL9vMmtdRKyqmHThk5j7tWRu2mNzM0g8RAnEv3N9PJB-7xzm8snc-pjfZgftWm_9XA0sAS0Jf7xZ3PDSw9mEmbBpZ0V8ZC-V8VG7HPdIrrcBGFERvFSPkU0ZUnVhZfH5HyG8XGXhxUOZe7LTa8rs-0TroZ5DM5il8A_lG1t4X_AQAA__9ScYKB). The transfer went to eight addresses with a modernized format—10,000 bitcoin each—presumably as a security measure against future computing attacks. The owner of the bitcoin is unknown, spurring speculation that it could even belong to Satoshi Nakamoto, the mysterious creator of bitcoin who has never revealed his or her identity.
## Most Reliable Car Brands of 2025
Subaru has emerged as the [most reliable](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAURp8GNiPjH2wPHrqwpWtH5MB1uK3BkX0blLevaNQn6PRtR985H5fpEjDhfnsPG3iKedrhqAmIoExbrlQgYbgmmEOpBwRaoWx5Elxoxg3jZloCpuek2sVHAAGyBd8b3VsrjJPt6mdnpIrDdV6kHpxeojLaOGulis4a1bfoTxo33PScD1J0veVOR9PbPlppnWgUhwUpl-4z404rxPTMDyjdnLc2-ZXoXhv51oixEeNxHN2c9_q9QSlwz4Vql8utEeNp8Br2ksKE9GT52KGwGghrDDNh3k_KmtkWvqAyWoGdHdhfCHZyWDBWKK2Vk7YRY1v8cj8wJayDaRS_bQHT7z36V9OHFz8BAAD__30Ci8s) car brand for 2025, according to Consumer Reports, taking the honors that usually go to Toyota or Lexus. Consumer Reports ranked 22 brands based on survey data on issues drivers have faced over the last year. Japanese automakers commanded all six top ratings and eight of the top 10, with Subaru, Lexus, and Toyota scoring above 60 on the 100-point rating system. Experts credit Subaru’s [conservative redesigns](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE-DOyx4_gEXFGncbdqU1rN5XrPBYAG71t4-cqScIO1oNJrv-7pNN3Tehfsn7mTKGqdAZ_ZUCqVpj7kk8g5nTwumfBKWjdIeJxDQcaG4UJNF599TW1mzEgE1FRmpOqk1qKGpNiOxG-YroEUuclC4ChBke9VroHmWlTPXmlBCSSH6BmqpxdCtSmq56kYPwFpB1pWY6kd0oWy0-nd8UaqXuFfebKUcmTUfDEYG43me9QN9PIL7vgoMRqmHoW0bBuMFxP-I-IKJzwmD5UsM-blT4omOmErmJb5jQb7FYJHn54zpyWCskrHH6bx3uVesFfcdnf99Uf6l7mXgJwAA__8nYoNg) and smaller model lineup for its high rating, while other brands trying to implement cutting-edge technology put themselves at risk of increased issues.

clean_body: Subaru has emerged as the car brand for 2025, according to Consumer Reports, taking the honors that usually go to Toyota or Lexus. | | | | | | Monday, July 7, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1898, the United States formally through the Newlands Resolution, a joint congressional measure signed into law by President William McKinley. Consumer Reports just released its annual rankings of the , as we report below. We want to hear from you: what car do you drive, and has it been reliable? Hit reply and let us know. Get your free Beginner's Guide to Gold IRAs from today's sponsor, . | Texas Flooding Kills 70, Dozens Still Missing At least as of Sunday afternoon after catastrophic flooding tore through central Texas, with the majority in Kerr County, including 21 children. President Trump, who is , signed a major disaster declaration, and FEMA is on the ground alongside local crews handling rescues and recovery. Survivors described waking to water rushing through homes—a , a man escaped through a window and stood for hours on a narrow box above the flood. At Camp Mystic, five young girls died, and at least a dozen more remain missing. One father searching for his daughter . Here’s a where you can donate to help flood victims in central Texas. Every bit helps. The Flyover is making a donation too. Bitcoin Whale Moves $8.6 Billion in Single Day July 4 saw the transfer of decades-old bitcoin in history, as a wallet that had been dormant for 14 years transferred 80,000 bitcoin, worth about $8.6 billion, to new addresses. The bitcoin was purchased for less than $210,000 in 2011, during bitcoin’s early-adopter timeframe known as the Satoshi era. Large, early investments like this are known as . The transfer went to eight addresses with a modernized format—10,000 bitcoin each—presumably as a security measure against future computing attacks. The owner of the bitcoin is unknown, spurring speculation that it could even belong to Satoshi Nakamoto, the mysterious creator of bitcoin who has never revealed his or her identity. Most Reliable Car Brands of 2025 Subaru has emerged as the car brand for 2025, according to Consumer Reports, taking the honors that usually go to Toyota or Lexus. Consumer Reports ranked 22 brands based on survey data on issues drivers have faced over the last year. Japanese automakers commanded all six top ratings and eight of the top 10, with Subaru, Lexus, and Toyota scoring above 60 on the 100-point rating system. Experts credit Subaru’s and smaller model lineup for its high rating, while other brands trying to implement cutting-edge technology put themselves at risk of increased issues. name: Tanya Lloyd
subject: Welcome to our campaign for America's rural revival
body:
Do you agree that we need a kindergarten teacher in Congress?

| | | [ ](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCfDLIkkjdPcC_U3XuHRoCIwMELeQenzQ2oHmoOYJU340&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=1)
---
Dear Peter,
---
You joined my congressional campaign in the last cycle, and I want you to know how much that meant to me. Running for Congress was never something I planned, but I am deeply frustrated by the current state of our country—the constant attacks on our democracy and institutions, and our reckless approach to war. I love my work as a kindergarten teacher and am a farm girl at heart, but I can't sit on the sidelines. This moment demands leadership, especially in districts like ours. That’s why I am running for Congress against Republican incumbent Michael Cloud in Texas’s 27th District again. **With lessons learned,** **I am committed to flipping this district blue.[With your help, I know we can do it. Please join our campaign. Together, we can finish what we started in the last cycle.](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WY5G_kCbO_Gc35nYtLQ2V0PM&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=2)**
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---
[ ](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WYzRa7qo_RHFBw2eEVKuN4k0&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=7)
---
When elected, I will work tirelessly to ensure that:
* **Healthcare is a universal right** , not a privilege, and people have guaranteed access to abortion and full reproductive rights.
* **Every job pays a living wage** , and families benefit from universal daycare.
* **Public education is fully funded** , and all children have access to early education.
* **Agricultural policy incentivizes conservation** , dramatically reduces taxpayer costs, and requires big agribusiness to pay the farmers' real price for raw goods.

For the past two decades, I have served my community in a variety of roles: as a member of the school district’s bond oversight board, a 4-H club manager, a Meals on Wheels volunteer, a founding member of the Lockhart FFA Booster Club, president of the Lockhart Athletic Booster Club, and on numerous other committees dedicated to serving our community. Through these experiences, I have learned that relationships matter most—and that we all want the same basic things: to live in dignity, security, and peace, surrounded by love and care. [**Would you consider becoming a founding donor to our 2026 campaign and signing up for a monthly donation?**](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WYzRa7qo_RHFBw2eEVKuN4k0&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=8)
---
| [](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WYzRa7qo_RHFBw2eEVKuN4k0&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=9 "DONATE >>") [DONATE >>](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WYzRa7qo_RHFBw2eEVKuN4k0&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=9)
---
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out. My cell phone is 512-585-1459. With appreciation,
---
[ ](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WYzRa7qo_RHFBw2eEVKuN4k0&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=10)
---
Tanya Lloyd Candidate for U.S. Congress (TX-27)
---
| [ ](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=uGD1_JWQzocUoO6G1sZMF-tYIAuKQ97Z_lDiPedGAn11JJNENg30eeUPXVkqayxCUUImQiDiaLSCNW4Cnm-WYzRa7qo_RHFBw2eEVKuN4k0&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=11)
---
| Tanya Lloyd is a fifth-generation Texan and longtime public school teacher running for the U.S. House of Representatives in Texas’ 27th Congressional District. After working in car dealerships and real estate, Lloyd became a nontraditional student in her early 30s, earning a bachelor’s degree in education and becoming a teacher in the Lockhart Independent School District. **Lloyd is running as a Democrat, motivated by her firsthand experiences with rural and working-class families.** Lloyd’s campaign priorities include protecting public education, strengthening democracy, expanding rural healthcare, supporting reproductive rights, protecting farmers, and championing economic investments for working families.
---
| [ ](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=gtygs8y15la-QqWnug14PGiAtvCokDnXGM3KCg-FOEJeaFV-eFr73E8S_yEkGbmg&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=12) | [ ](https://www.tanyafortexas.com/r?u=mGkj6P31KIkRMZhtjQusDTV7GFpUpg6VLLUuif8PWjmYgRv583yf3UJdtRw-D104&e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=13) | [ ](http://www.tanyafortexas.com/?e=e318ce027ee4de3e55dda42c4424aaf7&utm_source=tanyafortexas&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024_sign_ups_and_volunteers_o&n=14)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Federal Disaster Declared, Lab-Grown Meat Ban, and a Belly-Flopping Contest
body:
A [federal disaster](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uwzAMhuHT2JsMmv5RPGjoki1dOxqsSSVCaSuQ1Di5fZEUPUF3gi-e7-M0nyho2M7vtIordx_nTfasUoqk2QtLIuWQKRdJLItSElaaEXAwYA3YmSnoY-5rdp_AU1uLa-3QHg4jjH19cWPrFx4JmbFbCDoP2B0m9Dh5tgONdXDPZ2DBti3AMDSM2C8WFoSx952VqgfhUGJqykWK3Cl7fcSbpGaJa63uUso1V91bhccKj_u-N0_CLvL1PKjwyHEjZVPS93o1OZy3bP5I5tdEJcTNsBDrw7wSxmuMnA3CNLR9VyfH1z2ohjzaqofzSkFf_fK_1W4OfwIAAP__DVWC6A) has been declared as the death toll from this weekend’s devastating flooding in the Hill Country and Central Texas [approaches 80](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8Gd1jjCRinoNjGXbbd0iIwJGixiWASx29_lbzC7b8fnfPvslxcymm7_XUrWX7Hsmy0t0zMVJdIgarLITXXmGogn12lkN2CgFqCkWCW4FI-FtUFe4VwHjqyg9HDNI0wqu5uo76aqxnO6KOZ_GnC6HVE0jSNUY3Od8l-xsCAGQYArfuAqLwBjzCqeDIkFFBIXGrPd2J6uxbzUV5Ue1_WLts786OJ0x-Bs8B53_c-lrdxz8Zp-0QEzh8mgfO3LGMuJaTtJr1bH3I9Gicv_1Ot0pfnxkdXbXjsKefURiMU3FaX8veLf2foZfEnAAD__2AXfII), with dozens still missing.

# Monday, July 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1891, the U.S. secretary of the treasury officially opened the [new port of Velasco](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGv2yAQxv8avMXCGIw9eIhaeaj0urRVR-sMR4xKIIJ7cbL0b6-e4w6du_B93KffnXT3821-Ax98vHyFK470cGmOuJWARJhnhxYzBOsLFMJs0QTIaAPMggt14vrE9WzBh-csKzsu3A5NhWOjVdP3He9ktY6uXyQa4VrLh16pxVml7NLJYWjkADhUfvxoxjXXTcO5UrUVQhrNjeCddK1GJjlaTynXtCLhA4oLz3THXJt0rcK4Et0Ka89MTExM27bVVFZIMfiIdcoXJqYVol1S-sXEhJGyx8LEdMcAxaQTPZhoWXv-zdoz4YNY-_n7ikwowW8p0242KLsm57zxEMLz9b1hRLvb5VWhg_wRPR3JNwLCF17QZCTIB-3-QSgjlPe_Wdzly_sxSX-8n3bb9ENT5dHeNh-CL51mkl-u4MO-D_q_K95H8ScAAP__1HOp7g) near the site of Old Velasco on the Brazos River. Following the Galveston Hurricane of 1900 and the diversion of the river, the nearby Port Freeport became the more viable deepwater port. Our hearts go out to the families across the state facing the loss of loved ones and homes following the deadly flooding in the Hill Country and Central Texas this past weekend. _The Texas Flyover_ is making a special donation to help where we can. Here’s a list of places where [you can donate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1y5CAQhU-DMqagBWomINhEmTfdUIXolkUZiSnAluf2W-MrOH71_r5_b8tbSDmd73_Dwb5_b2U5-WqZe-e6bExcQ6bUQutciWMOlSmHBRRYqVAqXCik_FzMQH5VdNcDe41WOzepyQy7d1a7SGg3N7ox3KPTyk3aTMystUU9JP8KU6hQa6WsvRGAiagiqMlsI7Iwiin1Um99587foW35Wb643mI5huz33h9NjH8EzALm67puH3w2-1IFzKH2FDMLmF_HBMyxHMfnmfpTwPzBtcpYPs_-lFsuhZr8KZB7uWQvcuf8kFTO0FM5X2bAUeIdNSCipBWCNMh3ua5xlYSkNwdx1RqH6ulxpZxTm1AY9X6ElH_29t9R_vLwPwAA__8Syo89) supplies or money as well. Every bit helps. ## Federal Disaster Declared in Kerr County
A [federal disaster](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uwzAMhuHT2JsMmv5RPGjoki1dOxqsSSVCaSuQ1Di5fZEUPUF3gi-e7-M0nyho2M7vtIordx_nTfasUoqk2QtLIuWQKRdJLItSElaaEXAwYA3YmSnoY-5rdp_AU1uLa-3QHg4jjH19cWPrFx4JmbFbCDoP2B0m9Dh5tgONdXDPZ2DBti3AMDSM2C8WFoSx952VqgfhUGJqykWK3Cl7fcSbpGaJa63uUso1V91bhccKj_u-N0_CLvL1PKjwyHEjZVPS93o1OZy3bP5I5tdEJcTNsBDrw7wSxmuMnA3CNLR9VyfH1z2ohjzaqofzSkFf_fK_1W4OfwIAAP__DVWC6A) has been declared as the death toll from this weekend’s devastating flooding in the Hill Country and Central Texas [approaches 80](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8Gd1jjCRinoNjGXbbd0iIwJGixiWASx29_lbzC7b8fnfPvslxcymm7_XUrWX7Hsmy0t0zMVJdIgarLITXXmGogn12lkN2CgFqCkWCW4FI-FtUFe4VwHjqyg9HDNI0wqu5uo76aqxnO6KOZ_GnC6HVE0jSNUY3Od8l-xsCAGQYArfuAqLwBjzCqeDIkFFBIXGrPd2J6uxbzUV5Ue1_WLts786OJ0x-Bs8B53_c-lrdxz8Zp-0QEzh8mgfO3LGMuJaTtJr1bH3I9Gicv_1Ot0pfnxkdXbXjsKefURiMU3FaX8veLf2foZfEnAAD__2AXfII), with dozens still missing. In addition to at least 68 deaths in Kerr County, where at least 11 died at a Christian girls' camp, nearly a dozen people died in and around Travis County. More than 850 people have been rescued after an estimated [100 billion gallons of rain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u4zAMgJ9G3hhQ8o-awcMt3nrrjQZjUYmutFRIbN28_cF5hVsIAgT44fv-vK_vlCTl-2_aedafWNbMRxNW5bpGDlxJQmrUlGvgTahyEFoduhHQA_o1UJLnOnRhvmG42o5n60f79jbhNHSPGSm6vu8n21sbAvtrsNNtdD1e-3ELMXRpPp-hR28t4jhegnPD5nFzOA2x92wG5JC01Is-WPmHWpRn-eZ62creyfxQ_Wym_2XcYtxyHMflo5GeR-OW08a4RcpGYtxyooxb0J9jMm7hpmkn5QAWEW5JJJUMdxIpuUGJUClliCwCJcMH1wpb-cr6hL9f8oQB9EHaYC-VzzVDTnSnShBJpMErDkQph3FLV-fweZyINnkz4H2nJC8J_b_037P7FwAA__8zJ5gG) fell in just a few hours Friday morning, causing the Guadalupe River to rise 26 feet in 45 minutes. Camp Mystic officials have confirmed the deaths of at least 10 girls and [camp co-owner Dick Eastland](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOiPjGEwKF9fQ5dor0WIvYJ2xkXcJydv_Sl7hr0eame_795geEGJI61_Y0fJryVPCiyIyY5kW9Fgg-kBAjMWji1DQR5iUVJ2QRkgzeQjxPena21n6e1ujbU3XDkMve11vtsNZKWj1bXauH9wAuvfO-3m4O93Ow1wH-ymTRpq2lbLrGq-UdkY6JXu93AxWWqIPnEvDGzK-gJb4zk8sjct7He3GfFB1-1OpsVLjdV3Nkl8fik9eqfGkSo0Fj3OOwUESLqe1INEOSRQ8U2Ak4eFcN8ZCAhbGIr47wsF-iCXm7ENaBW-Q_pNw-UwckUhsWDJSXaw_rhBjoN5UWq47hPj9xr8z-rTqJwAA__-VZY_Q), who was hailed as a hero for risking his life to save campers in danger. U.S. Rep August Pfluger (R-San Angelo), whose daughters were attending the camp and were reunited safely with their family, praised the “countless heroes who acted so bravely during this tragic situation.” Here's a [list of ways](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1y5CAQhU-DMqagBWomINhEmTfdUIXolkUZiSnAluf2W-MrOH71_r5_b8tbSDmd73_Dwb5_b2U5-WqZe-e6bExcQ6bUQutciWMOlSmHBRRYqVAqXCik_FzMQH5VdNcDe41WOzepyQy7d1a7SGg3N7ox3KPTyk3aTMystUU9JP8KU6hQa6WsvRGAiagiqMlsI7Iwiin1Um99587foW35Wb643mI5huz33h9NjH8EzALm67puH3w2-1IFzKH2FDMLmF_HBMyxHMfnmfpTwPzBtcpYPs_-lFsuhZr8KZB7uWQvcuf8kFTO0FM5X2bAUeIdNSCipBWCNMh3ua5xlYSkNwdx1RqH6ulxpZxTm1AY9X6ElH_29t9R_vLwPwAA__8Syo89) you can help those affected by this disaster.
## Officer Shot Outside Alvarado ICE Facility
An Alvarado police officer was shot in the neck Friday night while responding to a call about a suspicious person outside the [federal Prairieland Detention Facility](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUL3SoyAUfRrtcABRTEGxjV223dJBuERmEJzLTUz26XfMPsLXnr855_y5L3cbU8yP33YHQ-9QlgxnTUAEuATwgDb5WG0lQA8uWQSf7CK5HBjXjOvF25g-i2q9Wbm_iRaM0IOYppGPqt2MUJPgaprspFYhRxiDn-Qaeqf0be3XoY3mCuOaayE4H4bOS6mc5k7yUYVeQ6M4-EgFO9qA4G1rSJ_yAuxc2dtkNqKjNv2vRs6NnM_z7EJ5XysuvpHzszZy_vrYUVJ0wEoI0QGyuhViGSyyC_VAkCmWzBxkAmSEz_34L442VXZg2WMF9hewMCoJ0GYHLRp_nDGlWEfdKP7YbUzfavSzQ19G_gsAAP__WbWNxQ). Eight armed suspects were arrested, and the officer was released from the hospital after receiving treatment. Officers were dispatched to the detention center shortly before 11 p.m. When one of them [tried to engage a person](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL-G6mis1pToFCrcCEhxaVMKPHJpbUCRArm2zn8f6H7hysEMHmbm78fy4ThxfvxxG03yFcuS6WiJRKgukQJVlwI314RqIJ9cpZDcgoCDBqvBLsFxei-mC9MnhF99R1Nvh_52G2E03TphtBDcYIYIDkbzeYWhhwAYze02jggdTycMLNi-BxiGS0A03oJHGE28WlIGKLCUepGVhL5ci-ldXlQvvmxdmlaRvanrXeGscD6O47K1fHoKZ8r62RTO5yiFs6-80SlLlVV_s_ReEnvSJUb2VDXnf89KQXPWbS1FOD90eUrjQPrMBRLKwiXr6DwnlrfC2VV9v_e_8WX2rk5hPzglbqNVBh6b4_TdVH7272vC_wEAAP__Ez6Qhw) who appeared to be carrying a firearm, multiple suspects began shooting at the officers before fleeing. According to a federal law enforcement official, at least a dozen black-clad masked suspects vandalized vehicles and security cameras in the detention center parking lot before [setting off fireworks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSqyAUhJ8GO5zjEeS3oLiNXW57S4fAIZIh4gDG-PZ3zCv87e7szu737zbfTIhhffw1L9L149O80lEi1Up59uQom-hCMaVSdmSjyeSimRFQclAc1OxMiOcsGqfv4MauId0p2f38DDCIZtESRS_83Q40AnlLIEdnJWLf-16NQE3QVxkoUF0HIGXrEIVVYBEG4XtFTAC5UFNu60KVPqb4eKY35damVxP1UutWWP-H4cRwOo6jtfdyvbh8htM3wnC6JIaTiW-TjUt8SzFY4sn7YCnzsqTKy142srXwtNHKfcjEfdpzXXjy_LnHkz_Tspa0cpv2tZ4MpyZrtx0hxlAGxQQ8XibE77T6O6Bvjf8DAAD__3XWjVk) to attract the attention of local officers. Some of those arrested were wearing body armor. The following morning, U.S. Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche said the DOJ is “closely monitoring the attacks on DHS detention facilities,” [adding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L_O4yAQBPCnsTusBfPnc0FxTbpce6VFYIlXISaCVZy8_Sl5ha8f_UYz_87rOVCh_fo33NHzK9d1x6MXZMa2ZkzYQknUQ2dsCWMJDVMJqwJlBDgBbk2BynvVY_IXSIsc0Utn5M-PBavHzeukjHUG85KiRRuddlbqRS8XNYfs7Ej-g4EDJyWAMVNSSkcHUYHVeXY4aMBEXNvEGzK-Qs_lXZ_YpljvY_Eb86MP859BnQZ1Oo5j-kw4EG-fwKBONWeK2ETfKovAHOJNfB1BEUVCxp2p7iKHSIX4LRQsRs5mbD49DiqFunWDhus9UPmW8u-uenr1PwAA___Eg34E) that the department “has zero tolerance for assaults on federal officers or property.”
## Texas Bans Lab-Grown Meat
A new state law temporarily bans the sale of cultivated, or lab-grown, meat in Texas for two years beginning Sept. 1. The U.S. is one of a handful of countries that permit the sale of cultivated meat. Texas is the [seventh state](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU9jOkdjx2C2cLENXbbdEg32ECwNENkjSG6_Sq6w_f_vSe_3Nt4wc97uP7hSkOe8jxudlUmEyjhTooKccsUqVBJFxkKJcbRgWw1egx8TZn6NrklhgvRlGgrGt6bvO-hcs4Tko3VkAJzzxntHJsWrdRS7fm6t65sc3jDw4I0BaNtLstZFD9FC5-arJ-WAUpa9XGQhoSfWmV_7QeUS97XhsIg8qrp-KzsoO2wojGehI9P5Hig7YJEcmZQdPm89UdxXqrrSQZssugoK6Qk3zTjpe9nPTa-E0pSQHmdmzrXzysF9xcwfqfwv1RHsXwAAAP__z-p-uA) to implement a ban. Senate Bill 261 [received bipartisan support](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ9G6misln92oSKNukubUliSS5vIWjxQjHX39oH8ClcNBgN8GHx_PtYPKlK2-2968ty_cl03Pnbh3rmtmRM3klR22ju3xFGocRJaEdAq8Ar8mqjI92rGNAdIt2nkefJ2ul4dODM-Zh2yCROHwFq7qL3NwIYwTu5qPUc9lvmEgQc_TQDWXhKiiR4igjNZex4McCq9tkt_cOcv2rN81xe3S6zPUeZH75_7oH8NuAy4HMdx-fv6x-c44EKtlyg84CIln5FrTWejoO6tHpt6MnX1xqpAmxI6FIVQe1c7b9RZhSKi0E0DLuhuimwiYzUrjzdQBiEoStopALglm3OmyGOb0-dRRMru_GDg_qQi77v9Z5JfM_4PAAD__9x4jmE) in the Texas Legislature and was signed by Gov. Greg Abbott. Proponents of the ban, like the Center for the Environment and Welfare, have raised concerns about the long-term health effects of lab-grown meat. On the other hand, companies like Austin-based Bio B-Q and Upside Foods in Berkeley argue it is more ethical and efficient. “ _There is no slaughterhouse, there is no poop, there is no skin, guts, there’s no antibiotics used_ ,” [said Dr. Uma Valeti](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3u4yAQxJ8Gd1gL4SMpKK5xl2uvtBazTtBtcARcnLz9yXmFfzuj34xm_lznK2bO5fYbHxT6e93mQntj6p3qvFKiipxyw9apJloYKyXGWYO2ErwEPyfM_JnNkEKEdFEDBeWtOp8dODPcAyIoB9ras3XWGeUUOtIYES6X6JIdcjjCwINXCsDaMWltFg-LBmfWkydhgFLuWx37nTq9sa382V5Ux2V7DBzuvT-bOP0SehJ62vd9_PvGcphCT8caoacvJp8b556XQ2CM8la3vciINdLyj2RDJhmxFEoyF_lFhJ6GGtJzz8y5OS8M3B6Y-Vvdf3bYK-j_AQAA__8v9H-_), CEO and Founder of Upside Foods.

**➤ Beachcomber** Daniel Sawyer found what UT Austin scientist Alan Slade believes is the base of an ancient Paleoindian spearhead called a Clovis point. The last report of a Clovis point discovery on the upper Texas coast was in 1987. clean_body: A has been declared as the death toll from this weekend’s devastating flooding in the Hill Country and Central Texas , with dozens still missing. | | | | | | Monday, July 7, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1891, the U.S. secretary of the treasury officially opened the near the site of Old Velasco on the Brazos River. Following the Galveston Hurricane of 1900 and the diversion of the river, the nearby Port Freeport became the more viable deepwater port. Our hearts go out to the families across the state facing the loss of loved ones and homes following the deadly flooding in the Hill Country and Central Texas this past weekend. The Texas Flyover is making a special donation to help where we can. Here’s a list of places where supplies or money as well. Every bit helps. Get your free Beginner's Guide to Gold IRAs from today's sponsor, . Abilene 🌩️ 88/74° | Amarillo 🌩️ 88/67° | Austin 🌩️ 91/74° | Brownsville ⛅ 92/79° | Corpus Christi ⛅ 92/79° | DFW 🌩️ 91/74° | El Paso 🌩️ 100/78° | Houston 🌩️ 90/77° | Laredo 🌤️ 97/77° | Lubbock 🌩️ 92/71° | Midland ⛅ 91/72° | San Antonio 🌩️ 91/76° | Tyler 🌦️ 92/74° | Waco 🌩️ 90/74° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Federal Disaster Declared in Kerr County A has been declared as the death toll from this weekend’s devastating flooding in the Hill Country and Central Texas , with dozens still missing. In addition to at least 68 deaths in Kerr County, where at least 11 died at a Christian girls' camp, nearly a dozen people died in and around Travis County. More than 850 people have been rescued after an estimated fell in just a few hours Friday morning, causing the Guadalupe River to rise 26 feet in 45 minutes. Camp Mystic officials have confirmed the deaths of at least 10 girls and , who was hailed as a hero for risking his life to save campers in danger. U.S. Rep August Pfluger (R-San Angelo), whose daughters were attending the camp and were reunited safely with their family, praised the “countless heroes who acted so bravely during this tragic situation.” Here's a you can help those affected by this disaster. Officer Shot Outside Alvarado ICE Facility An Alvarado police officer was shot in the neck Friday night while responding to a call about a suspicious person outside the . Eight armed suspects were arrested, and the officer was released from the hospital after receiving treatment. Officers were dispatched to the detention center shortly before 11 p.m. When one of them who appeared to be carrying a firearm, multiple suspects began shooting at the officers before fleeing. According to a federal law enforcement official, at least a dozen black-clad masked suspects vandalized vehicles and security cameras in the detention center parking lot before to attract the attention of local officers. Some of those arrested were wearing body armor. The following morning, U.S. Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche said the DOJ is “closely monitoring the attacks on DHS detention facilities,” that the department “has zero tolerance for assaults on federal officers or property.” Texas Bans Lab-Grown Meat A new state law temporarily bans the sale of cultivated, or lab-grown, meat in Texas for two years beginning Sept. 1. The U.S. is one of a handful of countries that permit the sale of cultivated meat. Texas is the to implement a ban. Senate Bill 261 in the Texas Legislature and was signed by Gov. Greg Abbott. Proponents of the ban, like the Center for the Environment and Welfare, have raised concerns about the long-term health effects of lab-grown meat. On the other hand, companies like Austin-based Bio B-Q and Upside Foods in Berkeley argue it is more ethical and efficient. “ There is no slaughterhouse, there is no poop, there is no skin, guts, there’s no antibiotics used ,” -, CEO and Founder of Upside Foods. | Flying together with our sponsor The Top Five Advantages of a Gold IRA Are you interested in learning more about what a Gold IRA can do for you? Gold IRAs have numerous advantages for savers, both those nearing retirement and those earlier in their careers. For example, during the 2008 financial crisis, investors who added gold to their portfolios saw their investments strongly outperform those who kept their assets solely in stocks. That’s the power of a Gold IRA. Here are the to moving your money into a Gold IRA today... 1. Portfolio Diversification For Today's Chaotic World 2. Benjamin Chitenje, 53, fled the scene but was later arrested and charged with multiple offenses. () ➤ Fannin County: Krystal Wilson, a records clerk for the sheriff’s office, has been arrested for allegedly embezzling $230,000 in funds associated with jail inmate commissary accounts. () ➤ Marshall: The city plans to replace 850 lead pipelines to comply with new EPA regulations after receiving $7.5 million in grant funding from the Texas Water Development Board. () ➤ Stamford: Rodeo fans who attended the 95th annual Texas Cowboy Reunion this weekend were treated to an impromptu belly-flopping contest after rain created a huge mud puddle in the middle of the arena. () ➤ Dallas: The city has temporarily suspended enforcement of a voter-approved charter amendment that restricts police from arresting people with less than four ounces of marijuana. Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has sued multiple jurisdictions where similar initiatives were passed. () ➤ Tyler: The Cedar Creek Veterans Foundation organized three air shows this past weekend to raise money for charities supporting veterans. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Promise Made. Promises Kept.
body:
I’m standing with President Trump. Are you?

| | | | |
---
Right now, President Trump is leading the charge to deliver for America with his **One Big Beautiful Bill** and I am proud to stand with him every step of the way.
**[I’ve worked closely with President Trump to ensure the Big Beautiful Bill is a bold America First vision to get our country back on track](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).**

[STAND WITH ELISE AND PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, let me tell you about this landmark victory.
The Big Beautiful Bill delivers** _ the largest tax cut in American history_**, creates opportunity to **_unleash energy dominance and economic growth_** , provides crucial funding to **_secure our borders_**, and **_cuts wasteful spending_**.
The BBB delivers on President Trump's promises to **_eliminate taxes on tips and overtime pay_** so workers can finally keep more of what THEY earn!
It also helps American families by _**doubling the child tax credit**_ , _**expanding access to affordable childcare**_ , _**supporting educational opportunity**_ , _**holding universities accountable for abandoning our values**_ , and even _**creates newborn baby investment accounts**_ so that every American child will have a strong start in life.
But it doesn’t just stop there!
It protects Americans by strengthening Medicaid to makes sure that defrauding programs built to help our nation's most vulnerable is harder than ever.
And this bill cracks down on crime in sanctuary cities with _**over $175 billion to deport criminal illegal aliens**_ and funds _**10,000 new ICE officers**_ to secure our borders.

**[This is what America First leadership looks like!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
[STAND WITH ELISE AND PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, this is a major win for America First but our work isn't done. I will continue to stand with President Trump to fight to deliver safety and prosperity for hardworking American families in every corner of our country.
We are delivering the agenda Americans voted for but this is only the beginning. To finish this fight we need the continued support of every patriot who wants to Make America Great Again.

**_[Please make a contribution today to support my efforts to elect America First leaders who will help President Trump get the job done](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aLJI/?__vbtrk=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAxMDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

clean_body: I’m standing with President Trump. Are you? | | | | | Right now, President Trump is leading the charge to deliver for America with his One Big Beautiful Bill and I am proud to stand with him every step of the way. . Friend, let me tell you about this landmark victory. The Big Beautiful Bill delivers the largest tax cut in American history, creates opportunity to unleash energy dominance and economic growth , provides crucial funding to secure our borders, and cuts wasteful spending. The BBB delivers on President Trump's promises to eliminate taxes on tips and overtime pay so workers can finally keep more of what THEY earn! It also helps American families by doubling the child tax credit , expanding access to affordable childcare , supporting educational opportunity , holding universities accountable for abandoning our values , and even creates newborn baby investment accounts so that every American child will have a strong start in life. But it doesn’t just stop there! It protects Americans by strengthening Medicaid to makes sure that defrauding programs built to help our nation's most vulnerable is harder than ever. And this bill cracks down on crime in sanctuary cities with over $175 billion to deport criminal illegal aliens and funds 10,000 new ICE officers to secure our borders. Fellow patriot, this is a major win for America First but our work isn't done. I will continue to stand with President Trump to fight to deliver safety and prosperity for hardworking American families in every corner of our country. We are delivering the agenda Americans voted for but this is only the beginning. To finish this fight we need the continued support of every patriot who wants to Make America Great Again. . Your fellow patriot, Elise Stefanik | | | | | | | | | | _ | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: The Maine Wire
subject: Answers Elusive in Killing of Tenants Harbor Woman
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Answers Elusive in Killing of Tenants Harbor Woman (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=4917a531d4&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Sam Patten on Jul 07, 2025 06:56 am
Since Thursday, when authorities declared the death of a Tenants Harbor woman on or near a pond in Union to be a homicide, few answers have emerged to how 48-year-old Sunshine Stewart was killed last week. “If you don’t like your life, change it,” read the tattoo inscribed on her shoulder, which seems to reflect [...]

The post Answers Elusive in Killing of Tenants Harbor Woman (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=5c70d59a92&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=91dbe3f011&e=f093fa355c) .

** How America Can Break Free From China’s Minerals Stranglehold (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=79ba77cdc3&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By DCNF on Jul 07, 2025 06:55 am
America has a real shot at ending its dangerous reliance on the People’s Republic of China (PRC) for rare earth elements, but only if it is willing to take decisive action, industry experts say. Rare earths are a group of 17 metallic elements integral to the production of vehicles, weapons systems, wind turbines, smartphones, medical [...]

------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Jul 07, 2025 06:50 am
The Portland Press Herald appears to have been erroneously reporting that two of its former staffers would be the first married couple to win Jeopardy, angering the wildly-popular TV show’s fanbase across the country. A number of widely-followed news sites, including Yahoo Entertainment, are reporting that the Maine paper’s false stories on the married Jeopardy [...]

In 1991, the Republican Party faced a daunting challenge. What would you choose to end your career over?
For Thom Tillis, Senator of North Carolina, it was Trump's big beautiful bill. For Tillis, this bill was a bridge too far. "So what do I tell 663,000 people in two years or three years when President Trump breaks his promise by pushing them off of Medicaid because the funding is not there anymore, guys?" After Trump called him to threaten him, Tillis announced that he would be retiring from his Senate seat in '26\. In his retirement announcement, Tillis said, "It's become increasingly evident that leaders who are willing to embrace bipartisanship, compromise, and demonstrate independent thinking are becoming an endangered species." 663,000 in North Carolina corresponds to millions across the country who will lose health care coverage.
Said Tillis, "[T]he choice is between spending another six years navigating the political theatre and partisan gridlock in Washington or spending that time with the love of my life Susan, our two children, three beautiful grandchildren, and the rest of our extended family back home. It's not a hard choice, and I will not be seeking re-election." By the way, Tillis is 64 years old, which means in D.C. terms he should have had another 2 or 3 terms ahead of him.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/be29a5c5-b113-4bcd-8f83-cb358244d2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Half-a-dozen Republican members of Congress had issues with the deficit-exploding aspects of the bill. They, however, capitulated when the bill came back to them from the Senate. Tillis's example probably cut the other way, where they saw that opposition to the bill in Trump's party would be a career-ender.
In American politics today, principle serves as a counterexample of what not to do.
The Big Dark Bill strips millions of healthcare in service of tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans. It expunges renewable energy incentives that were just passed a few years ago. It expands the deficit when firms are beginning to downgrade American debt and solvency. I hate the bill and see it as irresponsible and dehumanizing. It has something to despise for everyone. How does something like this pass?
Because no one wanted to stand in its way and get run over.
A number of years ago I was in Washington D.C. meeting with a group of prominent lobbyists. I asked them, "AI is going to upend the labor market in the coming years. Who in D.C. will do something about this problem?"
We went around the table. The first few people referenced thinktanks or industry trade groups or a couple members of Congress who had expressed interest in technology. The last person, who was the most venerable and respected person in the room said, "Andrew, the fact is you're in the wrong town. No one in this town will do anything about the problem you're describing. This is a town of followers, not leaders. The only way they might do something is if you were to bring a tidal wave crashing down on their heads."
There was a lot of following last week and not a ton of leadership. Trump has been the equivalent of a tidal wave.
A friend in D.C. said something to me more recently; "Never have I seen so many people who are theoretically powerful cast themselves as powerless to do something when you talk to them. They're all like, 'well I'm just a junior member of Congress' or 'I'm just an operative.' There's a lot of passing the buck."
Democrats reading this will gnash their teeth at the fecklessness and hypocrisy demonstrated by the Republican ranks over the passage of this destructive bill. Yet just over a year ago, the Democrats were falling over themselves [defending](https://substack.com/redirect/c2da5d3d-f1f9-46d6-9912-42631dda5aee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Joe Biden's continuing perspicacity and vitality, contributing mightily to the Republican control we see today. They cast out [Dean Phillips](https://substack.com/redirect/c2da5d3d-f1f9-46d6-9912-42631dda5aee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) rather than listen to what he was saying. Conformity and following-the-leader-no-matter-what are alive and well in both parties today. Who wants to be the person on the outside looking in? It won't matter anyway. Just join the chorus, and if the chorus is in the wrong, you will keep your station within the group.
The purpose of the group is another matter entirely.
A bill like this passes in a nation where people don't matter. A sane group of Independent legislators would have rejected it as too extreme. Millions will pay a price in the months to come. Who will they blame? Institutions are fraying right and left, and people believe the folks on their own side.
The water level is rising fast in American life. Another tidal wave is building.
In 18 months, Thom Tillis will head home to his family in North Carolina. His colleagues will warmly applaud his farewell speech while welcoming or bemoaning his replacement. They will silently congratulate themselves for not succumbing to principle. Who wants to go home? It didn't make a difference anyway. His stand will recede into memory.
How to breed leadership in a system that rewards its opposite? By changing the system itself. It's the only path out.
To see what Forward is doing in your state, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/64ee4395-8851-4af0-8f74-9283e9baf11d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For my book on political incentives, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/f9de96ec-0fd7-4f3e-ba3c-7a95d51acfbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For my conversation with Zach taking your questions this week, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/be29a5c5-b113-4bcd-8f83-cb358244d2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Hope that your Summer is going well! Don't forget to put down your phone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/70083f4e-6901-462a-9c5b-bab9e3c5899c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Historic Supreme Court Win! Fund the Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood Nationwide
body:
Great news as champions for life today!

| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrq5hucb72t5jf342u7s1kslpjd6ubj0gnpnrncg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62o34cdh2bs)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjtjnu7uh7jp7ved35b56b5kk52nt9r3hrg67cso_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62o34cdh2bs) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z77uhn3rg0220i5l7m3tad0242hj1imknov2ckfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62o34cdh2bs) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel ****

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z90iet5k0jue71n98ia107h4kh70hhec5cl420jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62o34cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgm6or1cjh649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk71epfqmvljsmumb57dmduiinult1t4qio0ks20_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62o34cdh2bs)_

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: New York is going to BURN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country. Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeg5eubj7g71rq92ok6g669lj4kluri287vrcbt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)
Friend,

We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country.

**Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani: The socialist candidate for mayor of New York City.**
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlphavhne8p073gkm1hp9qj27ejgpl27jv9b2m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)
It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions.

Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to “globalize the intifada” and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization.

_Everything about him runs counter to America First_.

**The fact that he could win in arguably America's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on.**

Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to [BUILD THE RED WALL](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z06b7lskh3gkh8p5au2htr02hg40dqptathihemg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs).

We must ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in cities, counties, and states across the country.

Help us [put America First](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4kvacsccmqf2rtlk516pbbqrb5no69aqohjpq2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs) and [stop the spread of socialism in America](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgm37c9115att3buij5q0f0biqa3kf0aha2abg78_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs) by donating today.
[Build the Red Wall](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoe9b5eef692kvojagt6i3cb4780pdc0un1rqp4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)
**Friend, the future of Trump’s agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York.**

While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake.

New York symbolizes America to the world.

It’s the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts.

America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome.

**And of course, that's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it.**

If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it.

Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani.

But we can’t do it without you, Friend.

**Please donate today to make America First the law of the land in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**
[Donate $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za1a9joj666nahgsj6rqf8q0u965unkjv8ba562g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhts52s8uue5l3ebmene3n6nhg4mt28uh1l7adu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2gndavvqtbql22b6f409iq7cvrhnh32f7026jfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrb6r4ahrfu6jao7abtsfmvl9kh3mdemf1607pdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1fk760fargjmu365lunn83o4q6qabs3dodbah68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4k77mp0ppo7ol2v4ikqjukjs01tvm1u3slioago_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpe4ceno8tp9jcejc54igam7p0v1ln99g1e0pto0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)

_[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1874itfgeav6or8mrqh11jhfi4d9jr98rpocrho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjg62p72c3h2bs)_
For America,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Far too often, the bravery and vision of our Founding Fathers is forgotten. They risked everything to create a country built on the principles of freedom, justice, and equality.
Today, we're facing a new challenge. The Radical Left is working tirelessly to undermine our values and destroy the very fabric of our society. But we won't let them succeed.
That's why we're inviting you to join the 1776 Club, a group of America First Patriots dedicated to defending our nation's founding principles and promoting the values that have made America great. Your membership is pending and we would be HONORED to have you join our ranks!
As a member, you'd join a community that's committed to defending our Constitutional rights and freedoms, preserving our nation's history, and promoting the values that have always made America strong.
We need you standing alongside us and other like-minded Americans who share your passion for our country and its founding principles.
