name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I want a chance to earn your trust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning |

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=efc0a02b2ddd46debbfb669c175a92a7&_e=3RV9_yNCl_Mc9F_oVSZeus9D66R4qZhWL3IBn0JwiRen5ezK8owSh9-QLFCQkea3M3yio5Rd4Ks7lqdidP4wiz3Xb1CR1D-bpwRlA1v89CbNEBVOLQo3zF47hckiKVClGDHIRibVgnqGeWScCoxyvjdY0pqTsHI096DaFvnpsAGJdb-4G26yapmIbeJM5it_Zb3F5JJ3SiusjN643hOT2TQbvoXozIvobxDkQUysIxKcUmicsteonEt7nF9t34AkAQ_HwGEd3abcYSu5I_vzwUoTWwDonfRYwROLrXAeU7FUoHSx-ZJtRZazsdmaZKhxeiTZXufAHGo61B8l4Km853PXv9NljLhn5uxQldVOnzEb8QB9AEwxtrC4YgKhT_7QR1X-iph7HanpMKV7vH2mkgTrzlslEJqRb-J0CjizfWDzunjckIqv-C-DGt64XFF2Yk9lH02diEzc5Esal-fotG3R_OYBpD3K2j9ZYaCIrnCLoz354mLdy-0R1ornTJBu8ZPV3TnfdWEAfoQ8LU10ecZ84tCenPxyRsOR04Wq9F2yzhPdg_0YDXiDX5v-xHkVS2TzrHHZ4B_5HEvIrKiOuyPoPVaruago6JC3HoGCGoNbBfkqG1thCK9284x4I21y6THf0DFD82pD2WzM25IJ2OwagLomrvYt6UB-7ObwFpGenYSR_AWR8WpQ6IH6QEh3f4-r7Y-5xd4d9iXuTEIWBwQUFLSO02-5P3iZCclbB0CmtaPGieiEcp1ZO5suHod8ZQsFY7Ne8yoBDQ07eFc2S0LBCbMnEFbbWnY6lwQtkmA%3D)
**_ **_Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win._**
_
_ _[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=efc0a02b2ddd46debbfb669c175a92a7&_e=3RV9_yNCl_Mc9F_oVSZeus9D66R4qZhWL3IBn0JwiRen5ezK8owSh9-QLFCQkea3NF6BmHPS_zU7PyUrE02JnCh-JJbQLtoeLd0lJ9f6m3ivXAAypuUHbB5nq4qouk-fU6o_csiQkPeTOU4Bj6qxQonDrF7v7WdErmR9CFiHtoOxxRqQppA_wTCGXdKWtTYYNApIGh8E09wcDcJgxEBsGP4hnyrPdysg6do7n6dp-2dBHmuzw_82-6g-0MEC9gHfc-lBq43ZYIbhOHasybNNgPEFPRodKf9yBDI6bfvgjoywIs203IAXlro103qg2R_iYSeh1ozmQS5zy0yAoL7HTRzaqFydnqprIEzHMUmMTlKUUJlhbNjyuTaOGVW91RxyjvnKqidIeEJKffge268bZjGMNZLWEThlK3sl1tsUXFZMABYaTvgzQXTf9dBHZHb_tQ15sEcn93af6kvTwbgv4AD9Bnw49Kp8cHSHMPrwPxDILdMGkKhcVKlRVPJDoRvXFmyVwlrhY4pcvwTQimzoB4dl_yqhq-ysQfzSCt1HJZlrembtXPt63h-KuCyxUELcbGKCqsV1mTaEtazIUQPa9RipGDAqNE1Ip0AnP4ryNScUMdi6bWpXWXmWUMSUt161U2dqCtxh1foTdtMGUTyjEKHDoyvU_DuKckfoWMAO5vbVTVnUNj-POycLapidRMpuQt-XN8tTDvcE4ud4hbogjgwR18JAs9ONMgo07563XK3nMFlw69hA0-9H4cWV9EBRJ_fm3hxHAb4ssB4jxyOH8X83uDShzkmlAep2DbQlPXg%3D)_

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=efc0a02b2ddd46debbfb669c175a92a7&_e=3RV9_yNCl_Mc9F_oVSZeus9D66R4qZhWL3IBn0JwiRen5ezK8owSh9-QLFCQkea3M3yio5Rd4Ks7lqdidP4wiz3Xb1CR1D-bpwRlA1v89CbNEBVOLQo3zF47hckiKVClGDHIRibVgnqGeWScCoxyvjdY0pqTsHI096DaFvnpsAGJdb-4G26yapmIbeJM5it_Zb3F5JJ3SiusjN643hOT2TQbvoXozIvobxDkQUysIxKcUmicsteonEt7nF9t34AkAQ_HwGEd3abcYSu5I_vzwUoTWwDonfRYwROLrXAeU7G7T_OF79_6vdLWdRT2TVmqnhw3mSvtrv6Q-LSw0s3B2hWH69HupOcP7D2RBQv5OgCsJoyBQF4TNaH4XePx-gZ8NLuW2rikY5eaR4DFp4ZnUHNzfO2P53Mw3dlmeWjAZrTaiyT2ACjEoKFwVdbpnKcfwk4UiLoMh7pr-InTs1S6GFG6AcMYcqFd2uSH4_-FQqBWBKuKe2NWdJiBtQ9s8GQ3hmVvjoXUACnTBm2l9SiuBCXAklSUewGLSDaLnf2JSKqUcyiwlNBvE8pVGjuCF-Lnhqk3ys799jDzG0IPFAYHWgJN1slAG1OdTN88i6zAhXQuEEWMM9Wj5y2JLkRwK5nY0dOKWfge4OVUGgNTUGrkaUbVD2G9ondsKA6pwcbxdwYgXGJMIMYEIcB_enByjyroYHKpm2BQO5KqEZe-a5aIaNaeJe5pt7AVo1ie-AgzDlmJU5qZs77LcxoVUvDwldL-igIvr2WAgtmTkqky48bcYg8ZmXp4w7COVbSNlIUa9WI%3D)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

clean_body: I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37c08b5e-e8cf-4f0a-a15f-5b4582c8993c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This Independence Day, some within the Latino community had not only voiced their desire to not celebrate this important holiday, but instead participate in events that put them on the side of another country.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Cbsk7t-RcSbsKemPeeRVPIgkXFPeR0aOHNxnKCOPax0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167620142)
This was most evident in Los Angeles. While the full-blown riots from last month are no longer an issue, tensions are still high in the region since immigration enforcement operations are still continuing at a rapid pace. Videos of the arrests of illegal aliens in public circulate on social media, providing ever more "reasons" for the locals to stay angry at the Trump administration.
Multiple protests took place in Los Angeles County on Friday, Independence Day. The most well-attended were the ones that took place at city hall and the federal building a few blocks away.
The protests were as expected: Mexican flags being waved, the fewer American flags being used were upside down, vulgar signs aimed at ICE and President Donald Trump, and harassment of federal forces protecting the federal building. You can watch the video of the hectic protest here.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7d7447a0-eba6-49dc-ba57-10c5da8c5cf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**Together with Next Thing Technologies**
# **[The Grid Can't Handle AI -- But This $6 Company Might](https://substack.com/redirect/09d30e82-bcda-463b-b7cf-5c7e0bf58a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
AI is booming.
But there's a growing problem no one wants to admit: **our infrastructure isn 't ready for it**.1
The U.S. grid is already stretched thin. In many states, it's decades overdue for upgrades. Now layer on thousands of energy-hungry AI data centers -- and it's a recipe for blackouts, water shortages, and failure.1
In fact, just this month, Bloomberg reported that AI data centers are **draining millions of gallons of water** from drought-prone areas in the U.S.9
Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia is going the opposite direction -- investing **$100 billion** to build ultra-modern AI power hubs running on next-gen energy tech.
**The U.S. needs a breakthrough. That 's where [Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/09d30e82-bcda-463b-b7cf-5c7e0bf58a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) comes in.**
They're the first American company9 to develop a commercially-viable1 sodium-ion battery pack that can power AI infrastructure.1
Why it matters:
* Sodium is **1,400 × more abundant than lithium**9
* Batteries are projected to be **up to 60% cheaper** 6
* They're safer and scalable1

Over **7,800 investors** have already backed them with **$7M+**.3
You **[can still invest in their current round at just $6/share](https://substack.com/redirect/09d30e82-bcda-463b-b7cf-5c7e0bf58a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 4 -- **with up to 20% bonus shares** 4
The company's share offering price has increased 209% since its first funding round, which sold out completely.2
This opportunity won't stay under the radar much longer...4
And the next time you hear about it, **it may be too late to get it for just $6/share.** 4
**[👉 Click here to invest before it's too late](https://substack.com/redirect/09d30e82-bcda-463b-b7cf-5c7e0bf58a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**4
[Invest Today](https://substack.com/redirect/09d30e82-bcda-463b-b7cf-5c7e0bf58a02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass (D) continues to egg on the far-left's behavior. On X, she said, "This July 4th, let's remember what patriotism really means: defending our values, our people, and our Constitution. Send the troops home. Stop the raids. Stand for freedom."
Covering the recent anti-ICE riots and protests has been interesting for me as someone whose family originates from Mexico. I was born and raised in the United States in a mostly white town. This is not a complaint, rather the opposite. I see both sides of the issue, but I also reported on the four-year long border crisis during the Biden-Harris administration. It was a deliberate invasion of our nation, plain and simple. It angers me to this day what was purposefully done in the name of "compassion." It was anything but that.
That is one thing that frustrates me when I see my fellow Latinos raging against Trump. The main reason why we are in this mess to begin with is because the Democrats opened up our borders because they wanted to the opposite of Trump and damn the consequences. No one, except those who are in on the corruption, benefited from the open border. Americans lost out, the illegal migrants lost out, and even Mexicans who live in Mexico felt the negative consequences of the entire world flooding their country to get to the United States.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Cbsk7t-RcSbsKemPeeRVPIgkXFPeR0aOHNxnKCOPax0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167620142)
Trump won on carrying out the largest deportation effort in recent history. What is happening should not be surprising to anyone who was even half-listening. The deportations and enhanced restrictions on legal immigration are necessary if we want to return to how the country should be. It should be filled with people who want to put America First.
Covering the anti-ICE protests and riots revealed just how large swaths of the population in Los Angeles are not loyal to the United States and also wish to see its destruction. It further showed how many Latinos in the area still wish to be victims of history despite not being alive when the United States took part of Mexico during the war. They can whine and moan how southern California was once part of Mexico all they want, but it doesn't change that it belongs to the U.S.
I am glad I did not fall into the perpetual victimhood mentality many minorities within our country cling to. I am an American. I served in the U.S. Marine Corps. My home is here and while I love certain aspects of Mexico, it is not my country. It has become cliche to say, but it is definitely true that while many wave Mexican flags at these events, they would never move to Mexico.
It is unfortunate that illegal aliens who have been here for a long time and are simply working are being swept up in the raids targeting others, but this is the result of Washington, D.C. not taking immigration seriously for decades and Trump having to be the one to put his foot down to solve it for good.
With the Big Beautiful Bill now officially law, thereby giving Immigration and Customs Enforcement billions more dollars, this is only the beginning.

My home is here... | | | Jul 7| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- This Independence Day, some within the Latino community had not only voiced their desire to not celebrate this important holiday, but instead participate in events that put them on the side of another country. This was most evident in Los Angeles. While the full-blown riots from last month are no longer an issue, tensions are still high in the region since immigration enforcement operations are still continuing at a rapid pace. Videos of the arrests of illegal aliens in public circulate on social media, providing ever more "reasons" for the locals to stay angry at the Trump administration. Multiple protests took place in Los Angeles County on Friday, Independence Day. The most well-attended were the ones that took place at city hall and the federal building a few blocks away. The protests were as expected: Mexican flags being waved, the fewer American flags being used were upside down, vulgar signs aimed at ICE and President Donald Trump, and harassment of federal forces protecting the federal building. You can watch the video of the hectic protest here. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Together with Next Thing Technologies AI is booming. But there's a growing problem no one wants to admit: our infrastructure isn 't ready for it.1 The U.S. grid is already stretched thin. In many states, it's decades overdue for upgrades. Now layer on thousands of energy-hungry AI data centers -- and it's a recipe for blackouts, water shortages, and failure.1 In fact, just this month, Bloomberg reported that AI data centers are draining millions of gallons of water from drought-prone areas in the U.S.9 Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia is going the opposite direction -- investing $100 billion to build ultra-modern AI power hubs running on next-gen energy tech. The U.S. needs a breakthrough. That 's where comes in. They're the first American company9 to develop a commercially-viable1 sodium-ion battery pack that can power AI infrastructure.1 Why it matters: Sodium is 1,400 × more abundant than lithium9 Batteries are projected to be up to 60% cheaper 6 They're safer and scalable1 Over 7,800 investors have already backed them with $7M+.3 You 4 -- with up to 20% bonus shares 4 The company's share offering price has increased 209% since its first funding round, which sold out completely.2 This opportunity won't stay under the radar much longer...4 And the next time you hear about it, it may be too late to get it for just $6/share. 4 (Piece continued) Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass (D) continues to egg on the far-left's behavior. On X, she said, "This July 4th, let's remember what patriotism really means: defending our values, our people, and our Constitution. Send the troops home. Stop the raids. Stand for freedom." Covering the recent anti-ICE riots and protests has been interesting for me as someone whose family originates from Mexico. I was born and raised in the United States in a mostly white town. This is not a complaint, rather the opposite. I see both sides of the issue, but I also reported on the four-year long border crisis during the Biden-Harris administration. It was a deliberate invasion of our nation, plain and simple. It angers me to this day what was purposefully done in the name of "compassion." It was anything but that. That is one thing that frustrates me when I see my fellow Latinos raging against Trump. The main reason why we are in this mess to begin with is because the Democrats opened up our borders because they wanted to the opposite of Trump and damn the consequences. No one, except those who are in on the corruption, benefited from the open border. Americans lost out, the illegal migrants lost out, and even Mexicans who live in Mexico felt the negative consequences of the entire world flooding their country to get to the United States. Trump won on carrying out the largest deportation effort in recent history. What is happening should not be surprising to anyone who was even half-listening. The deportations and enhanced restrictions on legal immigration are necessary if we want to return to how the country should be. It should be filled with people who want to put America First. Covering the anti-ICE protests and riots revealed just how large swaths of the population in Los Angeles are not loyal to the United States and also wish to see its destruction. It further showed how many Latinos in the area still wish to be victims of history despite not being alive when the United States took part of Mexico during the war. They can whine and moan how southern California was once part of Mexico all they want, but it doesn't change that it belongs to the U.S. I am glad I did not fall into the perpetual victimhood mentality many minorities within our country cling to. I am an American. I served in the U.S. Marine Corps. My home is here and while I love certain aspects of Mexico, it is not my country. It has become cliche to say, but it is definitely true that while many wave Mexican flags at these events, they would never move to Mexico. It is unfortunate that illegal aliens who have been here for a long time and are simply working are being swept up in the raids targeting others, but this is the result of Washington, D.C. not taking immigration seriously for decades and Trump having to be the one to put his foot down to solve it for good. With the Big Beautiful Bill now officially law, thereby giving Immigration and Customs Enforcement billions more dollars, this is only the beginning. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. | Loving Virginia's 5th Congressional District and my Team!
FYI: Team McGuire is working diligently to resolve your issues related to the IRS, Social Security, VA, and other federal casework.
Team McGuire has returned
$2,604,425.44
back in to the pockets of constituents in VA-05. Not too shaby for the first 6 months!
We are working with President Trump, Speaker Johnson, and the rest of our Republican Conference to Make America Great Again For All Americans!
FYI: The House Armed Services Committee is working on the NDAA Markup. We hope to get a bill through our committee by the end of July.
The following is some of what I've been up to and what is on my mind:

| The Golden Age; the constant fear mongering from the left isn't working. Even Democrats have to admit it, President Trump and the Republican Party really are Making America Great Again!
After celebrating America's 249th birthday at the incredible Scottsville 4th of July Parade, Tracy and I headed to Washington, D.C. to finish the mission in a big way: witnessing President Donald J. Trump sign the One Big Beautiful Bill into law.
This Independence Day was a powerful celebration of patriotism and love for our country. The B-2 bomber flyover, accompanied by F-35 and F-22 fighters over the White House, was a striking display of American military strength, and a clear reminder of why peace through strength is essential to protecting the nation we hold dear. We were honored to stay and watch the fireworks from the White House alongside President Trump, First Lady Melania, and patriotic Americans from across the country. It was an unforgettable night. Tracy and I made the drive back to the district late Friday night, and I'm already looking forward to seeing many of you again soon. It remains the highest honor of my life to represent the incredible people of Virginia's 5th Congressional District.

| My friend Tara Durant has my full endorsement for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. As a Navy SEAL and someone who has had the privilege of working alongside her in the General Assembly, I can personally vouch for Tara's toughness, integrity, and unwavering commitment to defending our nation's core principles. I'm asking conservatives across VA-07 to join us in this fight. Please visit TaraDurant.com to sign up to help her campaign, donate, and learn more her great candidacy.

| Medicaid Work Requirements Ok
---
| |
---
| During the Biden administration, there was a huge rise in child sex trafficking, with estimates suggesting as many as 500,000 children affected due to open borders, lax law enforcement, and more. Despite this alarming statistic, Democrats continue to focus on fearmongering over modest reforms proposed in the One Big Beautiful Bill, particularly changes to Medicaid.
Let's be clear: Republicans are not trying to "kick people off" anything. We are simply advocating for reasonable requirements, up to 20 hours a week of work, volunteerism, or education, for able-bodied adults without dependents to remain eligible for Medicaid and SNAP. This is far less demanding than the 30-hour work requirement signed into law under President Clinton.
Those who are able to work or study should contribute in some form. That's not cruelty; it's common sense. Moreover, taxpayer-funded benefits like Medicaid should never have been extended to illegal immigrants. That money should go to American citizens who play by the rules and need a helping hand, not to those who broke our laws to enter this country.
Democrats don't have a problem with lying. | Huge win for our country! From the moment President Trump was re-elected, activist judges have worked overtime to block the will of the American people by stretching the limits of their judicial power. But that era is coming to a close.
In a landmark ruling, the Supreme Court struck down the widespread abuse of nationwide injunctions, an extraordinary rebuke to the practice of low-level judges issuing sweeping orders to halt presidential policies nationwide. This is a monumental win for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the integrity of the presidency.
During President Trump's second term, 40 nationwide injunctions were filed against his executive actions, 35 of them originating from just five deep-blue jurisdictions: California, Maryland, Massachusetts, Washington, and the District of Columbia. These legal roadblocks were less about law and more about ideology, calculated efforts to stall an agenda that the American people decisively voted for.
Now, the Trump Administration can move forward decisively on critical policies to safeguard the nation, such as ending birthright citizenship, cutting funding to sanctuary cities, suspending refugee resettlement, freezing wasteful government spending, halting taxpayer-funded gender surgeries, and more.
The Supreme Court's common-sense decision was widely recognized as a pivotal moment: President Trump: "The Supreme Court has delivered a monumental victory for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the RULE OF LAW in striking down the excessive use of nationwide injunctions ... A handful of radical left judges tried to override the will of the American people. That was a grave threat to democracy." Attorney General Pam Bondi: "Americans are finally getting what they voted for. No longer will rogue judges strike down President Trump's policies across the entire nation."

clean_body: | | | | God Bless America! | | | == | == | Update July 6, 2025 | Loving Virginia's 5th Congressional District and my Team! FYI: Team McGuire is working diligently to resolve your issues related to the IRS, Social Security, VA, and other federal casework. Team McGuire has returned $2,604,425.44 back in to the pockets of constituents in VA-05. Not too shaby for the first 6 months! We are working with President Trump, Speaker Johnson, and the rest of our Republican Conference to Make America Great Again For All Americans! FYI: The House Armed Services Committee is working on the NDAA Markup. We hope to get a bill through our committee by the end of July. The following is some of what I've been up to and what is on my mind: | Trump Signs Big Beautiful Bill | | | | | | | Peace Through Strength | | | | | | My wife Tracy and Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt | | | | | | | | | | | The Golden Age; the constant fear mongering from the left isn't working. Even Democrats have to admit it, President Trump and the Republican Party really are Making America Great Again! After celebrating America's 249th birthday at the incredible Scottsville 4th of July Parade, Tracy and I headed to Washington, D.C. to finish the mission in a big way: witnessing President Donald J. Trump sign the One Big Beautiful Bill into law. This Independence Day was a powerful celebration of patriotism and love for our country. The B-2 bomber flyover, accompanied by F-35 and F-22 fighters over the White House, was a striking display of American military strength, and a clear reminder of why peace through strength is essential to protecting the nation we hold dear. We were honored to stay and watch the fireworks from the White House alongside President Trump, First Lady Melania, and patriotic Americans from across the country. It was an unforgettable night. Tracy and I made the drive back to the district late Friday night, and I'm already looking forward to seeing many of you again soon. It remains the highest honor of my life to represent the incredible people of Virginia's 5th Congressional District. | Speaker Mike Johnson's Epic Floor Speech | | == | Watch Speaker Mike Johnson deliver what I believe is his best speech on this bill so far. == | One Big Beautiful Bill Debate | | == | Promises made, Promises kept, it was an honor to be part of debate on this historic moment for the American people, One Big Beautiful Bill! == | Team Winsome for Governor HQ | | | Welcome Home Seth | | == Thanks to everyone who helped us help the second young man from our district over a two week period, Seth get home from Israel during the ballistic missile attacks from Iran and thanks to the 249,564 voters who sent me to DC so my team and I can help others. Grateful for you all. God Bless America! == | The One Big Beautiful Bill Act | | | President Trump, and House and Senate Republicans Delivered for the American People. We proudly passed the One Big Beautiful Bill Act to: ✅ Prevent the largest tax increase in American history ✅ Lower costs for families and businesses ✅ Secure the Southern Border ✅ Unleash American energy dominance ✅ Strengthen Medicaid ✅ Invest in a stronger National Defense Republicans have the winning message and policies to lead our country toward a safer, stronger, and more prosperous future. | Appomattox Sheriff Visits White House | | | | | | | Our Appomattox County, Sheriff, Robby Richardson, and his wife Taylor joined Tracy and me at the White House for the annual congressional picnic. Thank you to all of our men and women in law-enforcement for all you do to keep us safe. God bless America! | Endorsement Alert, Tara Durant | | | My friend Tara Durant has my full endorsement for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. As a Navy SEAL and someone who has had the privilege of working alongside her in the General Assembly, I can personally vouch for Tara's toughness, integrity, and unwavering commitment to defending our nation's core principles. I'm asking conservatives across VA-07 to join us in this fight. Please visit TaraDurant.com to sign up to help her campaign, donate, and learn more her great candidacy. | Medicaid Work Requirements Ok | | | During the Biden administration, there was a huge rise in child sex trafficking, with estimates suggesting as many as 500,000 children affected due to open borders, lax law enforcement, and more. Despite this alarming statistic, Democrats continue to focus on fearmongering over modest reforms proposed in the One Big Beautiful Bill, particularly changes to Medicaid. Let's be clear: Republicans are not trying to "kick people off" anything. We are simply advocating for reasonable requirements, up to 20 hours a week of work, volunteerism, or education, for able-bodied adults without dependents to remain eligible for Medicaid and SNAP. This is far less demanding than the 30-hour work requirement signed into law under President Clinton. Those who are able to work or study should contribute in some form. That's not cruelty; it's common sense. Moreover, taxpayer-funded benefits like Medicaid should never have been extended to illegal immigrants. That money should go to American citizens who play by the rules and need a helping hand, not to those who broke our laws to enter this country. Democrats don't have a problem with lying. For the facts, click link to watch my friend explain the purpose of the Medicaid changes in the One Big Beautiful Bill. Currently Medicaid is insolvent because many people are gaming the system. "We cannot afford to help people keep ripping off American tax payers". == | Winsome Sears Signs Up In All VA-05 Counties | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks to many volunteers including several elected officials like ==, Senator Luther Cifers, Delegate Wendell Walker, Delegate Buddy Fowler, Delegate Tommy Wright, Delegate David Owens, Sheriff Darrell Hodges, CA Wendy Hannah, Supervisor Sue Dibble, several GOP Chairs, and others for helping us put Winsome Earle Sears for Governor signs in all 24 counties of Virginia's 5th Congressional District. | A Historic Message From POTUS | | Central Virginia Criminal Justice Academy Graduation | | | | | | Thank you to our men and women in law enforcement for keeping us safe! | AG Jason Miyares Event | | | Two outstanding former colleagues of mine from the Virginia House of Delegates, now AG ==, have proven themselves to be incredibly effective public leaders. I strongly encourage you to support both of these proven leaders for re-election this November! | | My friend, Delegate Scott Wyatt, is a proven leader and he is up for re-election this November. | | My friend, Delegate AC Cordoza, is a proven leader and he is also up for re-election this November. | | | Tracy and I had a fantastic time at an event with our friends == and Chris LaCivita. Jason is doing an outstanding job keeping Virginians safe, and his leadership as Attorney General has never been more important. Please join us in supporting his re-election, spread the word and help keep Jason Miyares working for Virginia! | A Bill Maher Message To "Woke" Kids | | | Is Bill Maher right or wrong about Sharia Law in this video? == | WLNI The Morningline Lynchburg | | | We spoke about the Israel/ Iran Conflict with Mari and Brian on The Morningline. Trump's bombing of Iran was so successful, all the fake news outlets had to come out and pretend fourteen 30,000 pound bunker busters bombs did no damage. == | Pam Bondi, "What You Voted For" | | | Huge win for our country! From the moment President Trump was re-elected, activist judges have worked overtime to block the will of the American people by stretching the limits of their judicial power. But that era is coming to a close. In a landmark ruling, the Supreme Court struck down the widespread abuse of nationwide injunctions, an extraordinary rebuke to the practice of low-level judges issuing sweeping orders to halt presidential policies nationwide. This is a monumental win for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the integrity of the presidency. During President Trump's second term, 40 nationwide injunctions were filed against his executive actions, 35 of them originating from just five deep-blue jurisdictions: California, Maryland, Massachusetts, Washington, and the District of Columbia. These legal roadblocks were less about law and more about ideology, calculated efforts to stall an agenda that the American people decisively voted for. Now, the Trump Administration can move forward decisively on critical policies to safeguard the nation, such as ending birthright citizenship, cutting funding to sanctuary cities, suspending refugee resettlement, freezing wasteful government spending, halting taxpayer-funded gender surgeries, and more. The Supreme Court's common-sense decision was widely recognized as a pivotal moment: President Trump: "The Supreme Court has delivered a monumental victory for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the RULE OF LAW in striking down the excessive use of nationwide injunctions ... A handful of radical left judges tried to override the will of the American people. That was a grave threat to democracy." Attorney General Pam Bondi: "Americans are finally getting what they voted for. No longer will rogue judges strike down President Trump's policies across the entire nation." == | | | Cumberland County, Virginia | | Had a great time meeting some truly wonderful folks in Cumberland County, Virginia. You all should know by now I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger. She's running one heck of a campaign for Governor of Virginia, criss-crossing the Commonwealth, building a big coalition, and speaking directly to voters on the issues that matter most.
**But here's the problem, and it's a biggie:**
_Abigail's opponent is outspending her on ads._
If we don't make some smart, strategic investments, we could lose the biggest election in the country.
**[Peter, I need you to send a split contribution between Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots right now to fund her outreach to voters. There's no bigger election on the map in 2025, and Abigail has to win big so we can show this huckster in the White House what's what.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91168?refcode=em20250707-9093&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9093%2E614464%2ESVi4oX)**

Abigail is the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's office this year, and with Trump's inner circle cashing checks to Winsome Earle-Sears, it's high time we all stepped up and gave what we can to Abigail Spanberger.

Winning in August would diminish the GOP’s power in Georgia – and it’d be a disastrous upset for Trump and his authoritarian buddies.
Anything is possible when we come together and support candidates fighting for the causes that voters care about most. It’ll be tough, but **this seat is critical to building Democratic power in the legislature, so we can’t give up.**
**Letting far-right power go unchecked fuels hate and rolls back our rights. But together we can help support state Dems who are committed to building a better, safer, and more inclusive future.**
[Here’s the bottom line: Winning elections like this requires grassroots support. Contributions or gifts to DLCC Victory Fund are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

clean_body: Georgia Democrats are facing a key special election for a seat in the state Senate, and the stakes are sky high. We’re fighting to flip as many seats as possible in this ultra-competitive chamber. | | | | | ---|--- On August 26th, Georgia Democrats are facing a key special election for a seat in the state Senate, and the stakes are sky high. Debra Shigley is the lone Democrat in a race against Republicans in a GOP-held district. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Winning in August would diminish the GOP’s power in Georgia – and it’d be a disastrous upset for Trump and his authoritarian buddies. Anything is possible when we come together and support candidates fighting for the causes that voters care about most. It’ll be tough, but this seat is critical to building Democratic power in the legislature, so we can’t give up. Letting far-right power go unchecked fuels hate and rolls back our rights. But together we can help support state Dems who are committed to building a better, safer, and more inclusive future. Are you ready to fight back? name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: How GOP cuts will devastate your community hospital.
body:
TennCare slashes mean fewer doctors, closed clinics, and children left behind.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZJJACD6S73FF2HVQT1S28P7_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JZJJACD6S73FF2HVQT1S28P7_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Tennessee Republicans are gutting TennCare, and it’s our communities that will suffer. Republican cuts to Medicaid threaten rural hospitals, children’s clinics, mental health care, and life-saving services that Tennessee families rely on every single day. This isn’t about numbers on a spreadsheet — it’s about the lives of our loved ones and neighbors losing health care and entire communities losing hope.

The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus is shining a spotlight on what these cuts really mean. We’re breaking down how TennCare supports your local hospital, services for expectant mothers, school nurses, and mental health centers serving veterans and families in crisis. We’re collecting stories to make sure every lawmaker hears what’s at stake — directly from their constituents. If you or someone you love relies on TennCare, we need your voice. Share your story with us and help sound the alarm. Then contact your legislators and demand they reverse these cruel cuts before lives are lost.
---

| | Friends,

Bruce Blakeman is failing Nassau County – and this Friday’s fundraising deadline is our chance to hold him accountable. Just look at the damage he’s done:

Bruce Blakeman promised to bring in $9 billion in investment for Nassau County, but we have not seen a dime. **[If you want to see Nassau grow and develop, contribute here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111027784/555983268/-1414184198?contactdata=WyQ2zZye66xhTZcQQXzl9aMzRCpeBRo+vEPPC+rp8uKHj77H3d6y2Csn76oEfHdc58Pmt7sA3pmc3Jix0T8v6FhvkXZYfWdzOSWp0a5o0PU=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk5ODkzYWEtM2E1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oYji5TlNUpDqdzUnzfEfPtdT4S4APfKD6OrvaS5tqTg=&emci=6199f47b-2b5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f99893aa-3a5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Bruce Blakeman has been building his own personal militia while the Nassau County Detectives are going through one of the worst detective shortages in years. **[Click here to support my campaign and show that Nassau County needs a real police force, not this nonsense.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111027786/555983269/-1414184198?contactdata=WyQ2zZye66xhTZcQQXzl9aMzRCpeBRo+vEPPC+rp8uKHj77H3d6y2Csn76oEfHdc58Pmt7sA3pmc3Jix0T8v6FhvkXZYfWdzOSWp0a5o0PU=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk5ODkzYWEtM2E1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oYji5TlNUpDqdzUnzfEfPtdT4S4APfKD6OrvaS5tqTg=&emci=6199f47b-2b5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f99893aa-3a5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Bruce Blakeman said that he’d fix our broken property assessment system, but have you seen your taxes go down? **[Contribute to my campaign so we can fix the assessment system here in Nassau County.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111027789/555983273/-1414184198?contactdata=WyQ2zZye66xhTZcQQXzl9aMzRCpeBRo+vEPPC+rp8uKHj77H3d6y2Csn76oEfHdc58Pmt7sA3pmc3Jix0T8v6FhvkXZYfWdzOSWp0a5o0PU=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk5ODkzYWEtM2E1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oYji5TlNUpDqdzUnzfEfPtdT4S4APfKD6OrvaS5tqTg=&emci=6199f47b-2b5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f99893aa-3a5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Bruce Blakeman has been boasting of his relationship with the President, but whenever it comes time to protect the people of Nassau County he falls silent. **[Contribute right now to make sure your Nassau County Executive will fight for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111027794/555983275/-1414184198?contactdata=WyQ2zZye66xhTZcQQXzl9aMzRCpeBRo+vEPPC+rp8uKHj77H3d6y2Csn76oEfHdc58Pmt7sA3pmc3Jix0T8v6FhvkXZYfWdzOSWp0a5o0PU=&am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&left_to_give=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk5ODkzYWEtM2E1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oYji5TlNUpDqdzUnzfEfPtdT4S4APfKD6OrvaS5tqTg=&emci=6199f47b-2b5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f99893aa-3a5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Bruce Blakeman’s failures – from reckless spending to a broken property tax system – have held this county back for too long. **I am ready to lead with solutions, not politics. But we can't get there without you.**

Thank you for your support during our final push,
Seth Koslow

Beth Van Duyne
Congresswoman, TX-24

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

clean_body: They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over 24 cities. | Fellow American, You’re not gonna believe this... George Soros just dumped MILLIONS into Texas to try and flip our state blue. I wish I were kidding. Soros is bankrolling a group called **Texas Majority PAC , and they’ve teamed up with the Texas Democrats to launch a massive campaign— eight figures —to try and buy the 2026 elections. They’re calling it “Blue Texas.” I call it an absolute nightmare. They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over 24 cities. Look, Soros has spent years successfully destroying cities with soft-on-crime DAs and radical leftist prosecutors. And now he wants to bring that same chaos to every city across Texas? Not on my watch. I’ll tell you what this is really about: The left knows they can’t win on ideas. So they’re trying to BUY power. They want to pump cash into every corner of our state and hope Texans don’t notice what’s happening. Well, we noticed. And we’re not gonna sit back and let it happen. This is a critical moment. If Soros turns Texas blue, it’s game over for the country. We’re the last line of defense—and the radical left knows it. Let’s remind them who they’re messing with. Beth Van Duyne Congresswoman, TX-24 GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. clean_body: Fund free pro-bono support for clinics | Peter— Right now, we are up against unprecedented attacks on reproductive rights in the United States. People are being denied access to basic health care, clinics and providers are being threatened, and lives are at stake. Without your support, countless clinics would be forced to close—and the people who rely on them would lose access to essential care. Our matching gift offer has been extended, and every donation you make to the Center will now be tripled , up to $250,000. | "$35 = $105" "$75 = $225" "$100 = $300" "$250 = $750" "MATCH YOUR GIFT 3X" Every dollar you give will be amplified—and with so much at stake, every single gift counts. From day one of this second administration, President Trump has been targeting birth control, medication abortion, and abortion clinics. And every step of the way, the Center has been there to provide clinics and providers with the legal and advocacy support they need to keep their doors open and their medical care accessible... "DEFEND REPRO RIGHTS" Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. The second Trump administration has been one red flag after another. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

Photo by [Andrey Metelev](https://substack.com/redirect/08643493-074c-4c7a-837a-ce52c5c870a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/1cad31c0-48f2-4a93-9fee-d49523a6d14c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On May 1, 2025, Mississippi Governor Tate Reeves unveiled the Power Play initiative, a strategy to transform the state into a powerhouse of American energy production. Designed to drive economic development by attracting energy-intensive industries, this initiative positions Mississippi as a leader in meeting the nation's growing energy demands. With over $70 billion in capital projects and 20,000 jobs in the pipeline, Power Play is a game-changer for the state's future.
Mississippi currently ranks 13th in the U.S. for per capita energy production but consumes four times more energy than it generates. This gap poses a challenge as industries like data centers, manufacturing, and smelters require reliable and affordable power. Power Play aims to close this gap by boosting energy capacity, ensuring the state can support major private sector investments, such as those from Amazon Web Services. Governor Reeves has emphasized that "states with access to power are going to win," underscoring the initiative's role in securing Mississippi's economic edge.
**The initiative rests on several key strategies.**
First, it fosters public-private partnerships to spur innovation and develop advanced energy technologies. The inaugural Energy Summit in Jackson on May 1, 2025, brought together industry giants like ExxonMobil, Entergy, Chevron, and Mississippi Power, alongside government officials, to identify barriers and opportunities. These collaborations are critical to scaling up energy production efficiently.
Second, Power Play prioritizes regulatory reform to streamline permitting processes and reduce financial risks for energy projects. While many regulations fall under federal jurisdiction, the state is working to minimize red tape at the local level and coordinate with federal agencies. This approach aims to accelerate project timelines and make Mississippi an attractive destination for energy investments.
Third, the initiative embraces a diverse energy portfolio. Natural gas and nuclear power are highlighted as reliable, high-capacity options, with potential projects like nuclear reactor development at Yellow Creek Port under consideration. Additionally, there's growing interest in carbon capture technologies, exemplified by ExxonMobil's project in Yazoo City, and renewable sources like solar and wind. By remaining open to all affordable and reliable energy types, Mississippi wants to balance economic and environmental priorities.
Infrastructure enhancements are also a focus, including grid improvements, supply chain solutions, and workforce development to support energy projects. These efforts ensure the state can sustain long-term growth in its energy sector. Governor Reeves plans to hold additional summits to refine strategies and maintain momentum, keeping stakeholders engaged in this ambitious vision.
Despite its promise, Power Play faces challenges. Federal regulations remain a hurdle for large-scale projects, requiring careful navigation. Additionally, balancing traditional and emerging energy sources demands strategic planning to ensure reliability while addressing environmental concerns. However, Mississippi's proactive approach positions it to overcome these obstacles.
Mississippi's Power Play is a blueprint for economic prosperity. By leveraging partnerships, reducing barriers, and investing in diverse energy sources, the state is poised to become a hub for industrial investment and job creation. As Power Play gains traction, Mississippi is not just powering its grid but also fueling a brighter future for its residents and businesses.

clean_body: | | | Felon and fraudster Donald Trump is looking into deporting NYC Mayor candidate Zohran Mamdani! Donald Trump is feeling pretty insecure after Democrat and candidate of the people, Zohran Mamdani won his primary election for New York City mayor in a landslide. So naturally Trump wants to kick him out of the country or into a prison camp. Since Mamdani called for masked ICE agents to stop kidnapping and deporting New Yorkers, Trump has been calling him a communist and falsely accusing him of being here illegally. Those are LIES. Trump’s Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt says the administration is open to a “denaturalization-oriented” investigation against Mamdani, who is a US citizen. This is what brutal dictators do to the opposition. They vilify them and then they threaten or disappear them. We are the United States of America. We impeach insecure narcissist felons who abuse their power. # [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4853%2E35263%2Ev1H3RP)
Peter — I have an important request, and I don’t ask it lightly. As we continue our fight for working families in Wisconsin, your ongoing support is more vital than ever. Republicans are pushing _hard_ to fund their billionaire tax cuts off the backs of hardworking people, and without sustained support, our ability to counter these measures could fall short at a crucial time. **We must be prepared to fight back against every attempt to disenfranchise everyday people.** _Here's where you come in_ : By committing to a **recurring monthly contribution** , you fuel my team and I’s efforts to stand strong for the priorities of everyday people. Sustained support ensures that we have the resources necessary to make progress on these issues AND keep battling the special interests who want to influence our policy and our elections. Your ongoing commitment (no matter the amount) means that we can fully rely on grassroots supporters like you who stand with my work to protect our healthcare, equal rights, and vital programs folks depend on. **[Will you commit to a monthly contribution that will support our work to make life easier for everyday people?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-july25.oOjz9L&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250707_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4853%2E35263%2Ev1H3RP)** _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [DONATE $3 MONTHLY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4594?c0=stb-em-july25.c_NsTi&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250707_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4853%2E35263%2Ev1H3RP)

clean_body: | Peter — I have an important request, and I don’t ask it lightly. As we continue our fight for working families in Wisconsin, your ongoing support is more vital than ever. Republicans are pushing hard to fund their billionaire tax cuts off the backs of hardworking people, and without sustained support, our ability to counter these measures could fall short at a crucial time. We must be prepared to fight back against every attempt to disenfranchise everyday people. Here's where you come in : By committing to a recurring monthly contribution , you fuel my team and I’s efforts to stand strong for the priorities of everyday people. Sustained support ensures that we have the resources necessary to make progress on these issues AND keep battling the special interests who want to influence our policy and our elections. Your ongoing commitment (no matter the amount) means that we can fully rely on grassroots supporters like you who stand with my work to protect our healthcare, equal rights, and vital programs folks depend on. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. | | | | Together, we can ensure that every family has a fighter on their side. Thank you for your support, Tammy P.O. | Greater Georgia Newsletter July 7, 2025
---
| |
---
|
## July 1 Laws Taking Effect
---
As of July 1, a slate of bold, conservative laws championed by Greater Georgia allies officially take effect delivering real results for families, students, and taxpayers across our state. Take a look at what's changing and how it puts Georgians first. 👀⬇️
---
| [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010VNIlN-9_LSJMAmejtlTfb7sHomlZad5MXFE6zPBMyNlibyKzDlpA4kVrwN1qRXwm6a_chxKedASwUMmfL6HL0Ek1QJPvaD7WWTqBhamRdqEZLPoYWG4yMl8-raOOfkKFtDzLuHZMmtr849HFq3V4Hjb5flqq8b6PVLaxQAtmAfXD3ft_dBn_3CZtCD4kb-QC1o-UjHn5NClsG6KV2do7djKCy5Dei5rYFqxL8OCYHz-e2Lf9LJpKg6VAEZ824FP&c=PJC10JoS4i6wUFwnfHsXiHzeUxJWGWSD-eXfczaj5xpHSHwCWZFFtQ==&ch=MkMVKXbW_usPE5fs0__zIAjuhV7DyDz7QPkQRPD6gS2ncYsnicmTFQ==)

## Statewide Education Tour on Tort Reform
---
| On June 11, our team hosted an engaging discussion focused on tort reform and its benefits in lowering costs for Georgia families at the Greater Macon Chamber of Commerce. The event drew a lively crowd, and was praised by local press for our efforts to bring serious policy insights directly to the community.
A special thank you to Senate President Pro Tempore John Kennedy for joining us to emphasize the critical role of voter education in strengthening Georgia's conservative movement. His message echoed our mission: informed voters are empowered voters.
---
| [Read the Full Press Release](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010VNIlN-9_LSJMAmejtlTfb7sHomlZad5MXFE6zPBMyNlibyKzDlpA0mHOMQdUxyHbYtczdEUE_gGG_im-JaoVPlBAu6qhcV72ABj2BbcDr42qMhxtRPNE4AYy0qaWIzYtL-RIiH6qQHi4Fm7a-d6IKS1Uvzte_abhKKB-tYZxMSRT0nfagLZ0wAl1sLz_lTudfj4O3xYNUjSsk3QgiKuFyImMw18yiULDIwW0z6grblQPpV59490aZNtWqUfB3QG&c=PJC10JoS4i6wUFwnfHsXiHzeUxJWGWSD-eXfczaj5xpHSHwCWZFFtQ==&ch=MkMVKXbW_usPE5fs0__zIAjuhV7DyDz7QPkQRPD6gS2ncYsnicmTFQ==)

| |
---
| Congratulations to Georgia's New Senate Republican Leaders
---
| |
---
| |
---
| We're proud to congratulate Senator Larry Walker III of Perry on his nomination as the next President Pro Tempore and Senator Jason Anavitarte of Dallas on his election as Majority Leader of the Georgia Senate.
Both Senators are longtime advocates for Georgia's conservative values and have worked tirelessly to support pro-family, smart-growth policies. Their leadership will mark a new chapter for Georgia Republicans and we are looking forward to working alongside both of them.
---
| |
---
| PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION PRIMARY ANALYSIS
---
| We've heard from people across the state who simply didn't know there was a statewide primary on the ballot in 2025. That's reflected in the shockingly low turnout -- fewer than 2.9% of voters cast a ballot.
So let's use this as motivation to show Georgia the strength of our voice. This is exactly why we do the work we do every day to educate, engage, and mobilize voters -- and we know those efforts will pay off in November.
Take a look at this tool to see how your county compared in turnout, and let it fuel your outreach to friends and neighbors.
We'll be rolling out voter registration and mobilization volunteer efforts soon -- stay tuned and get ready to make a difference!
---

clean_body: New laws are saving you money! | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter July 7, 2025 | | | July 1 Laws Taking Effect As of July 1, a slate of bold, conservative laws championed by Greater Georgia allies officially take effect delivering real results for families, students, and taxpayers across our state. Take a look at what's changing and how it puts Georgians first. 👀⬇️ | == Statewide Education Tour on Tort Reform | On June 11, our team hosted an engaging discussion focused on tort reform and its benefits in lowering costs for Georgia families at the Greater Macon Chamber of Commerce. The event drew a lively crowd, and was praised by local press for our efforts to bring serious policy insights directly to the community. A special thank you to Senate President Pro Tempore John Kennedy for joining us to emphasize the critical role of voter education in strengthening Georgia's conservative movement. His message echoed our mission: informed voters are empowered voters. | == | == | == | | | Congratulations to Georgia's New Senate Republican Leaders | | | | | We're proud to congratulate Senator Larry Walker III of Perry on his nomination as the next President Pro Tempore and Senator Jason Anavitarte of Dallas on his election as Majority Leader of the Georgia Senate. Both Senators are longtime advocates for Georgia's conservative values and have worked tirelessly to support pro-family, smart-growth policies. Their leadership will mark a new chapter for Georgia Republicans and we are looking forward to working alongside both of them. | | | PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION PRIMARY ANALYSIS | We've heard from people across the state who simply didn't know there was a statewide primary on the ballot in 2025. That's reflected in the shockingly low turnout -- fewer than 2.9% of voters cast a ballot. So let's use this as motivation to show Georgia the strength of our voice. This is exactly why we do the work we do every day to educate, engage, and mobilize voters -- and we know those efforts will pay off in November. Take a look at this tool to see how your county compared in turnout, and let it fuel your outreach to friends and neighbors. We'll be rolling out voter registration and mobilization volunteer efforts soon -- stay tuned and get ready to make a difference! | == | | == | | | FALL VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES | | | Our field team is working on something big you won't want to miss! With a statewide election and municipal races on the ballot this November, we're gearing up for a major voter registration and mobilization effort. Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities! | | == | | | In the News | == Greater Georgia's founder and Small Business Administration Administrator Kelly Loeffler discuses the federal government's decisive action rooting out fraud. == Race for Georgia State House majority already underway. ==: Spotlight on new laws taking effect July 1. ==: Senator John Kennedy highlights recent success in passing tort reform legislation during Macon visit. | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988 | Atlanta, GA 30355 US | |

Friend: GOP Leader Mike Johnson is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives . He was reelected Speaker for the 119th Congress after securing Donald Trump's support, promising to push through his radical Project 2025/Agenda 47 plans to reshape our country.
The House started the year by passing a job-killing budget that slashes support for American citizens across the country. He's supported the DOGE efforts to gut the federal government, and most recently pushed through Trump's deeply unpopular "One Big, Beautiful Bill" that slashes healthcare in order to give billionaires more tax breaks.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about the job Speaker Johnson done so far. Please take our quick survey:

Team —
We can’t sugarcoat this: Republicans just passed the biggest Medicaid cut in American history — all to fund more tax breaks for billionaires.
And shockingly, California Republicans in swing districts voted YES.
➡️ David Valadao (CA-22)
➡️ Ken Calvert (CA-41)
➡️ Kevin Kiley (CA-03)
➡️ Young Kim (CA-40)
They all chose Trump over the people they’re supposed to represent. They voted to rip health care away from 17 million Americans — including tens of thousands of their own constituents.
Will you rush a donation to help us defeat Valadao, Calvert, Kiley, and Kim? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july25-trumpbill?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july25-trumpbill?&refcode=&amount=]We’re probably not telling you something you don’t already know, but this bill is a DISASTER for Californians:
— 17 million Americans could lose their healthcare;
— 5 million face cuts to food support;
— 1.75 million construction jobs are at risk;
— $3 trillion added to the national debt.
And it passed because California swing seat Republicans betrayed the American people.
Let’s be crystal clear: If you betray our healthcare, you lose your seat.
We’re launching an emergency push to fire these GOP traitors and flip their districts blue. But we urgently need to raise another $19,000 for our Swing Seat Fund to expand organizing and voter outreach programs now. Will you pitch in $ or more? name: DNC HQ
subject: $5 (not a typo)
body:
We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $5 really do?"
---
Derek, we have an important request: Can you pitch in $5 to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back against the harmful and disastrous MAGA agenda? No, that’s not a typo! _**Just $5._** We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $5 really do?” when Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress have billionaires behind them? **But it’s not just your $5.** It’s $5 from a bookkeeper in North Carolina, $5 from a caregiver in California, $5 from a teacher in Georgia — millions of $5 donations coming together to power our grassroots movement. So Derek, we’re asking you to join your fellow Democrats in this fight. Because when we all pitch in, we can take on Trump’s budget bill, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend our democracy by ensuring we hold Trump and his administration accountable. **[Will you give $5 (or more!) to help us win local and statewide races this year, take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028? This work is more important now than ever.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250707_3876_fr&amount=5&refcode2=3876_22930333_BtfsvA&akid=3876%2E22930333%2EBtfsvA)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_20250707_3876_fr&refcode2=3876_22930333_BtfsvA&akid=3876%2E22930333%2EBtfsvA)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250707_3876_fr&refcode2=3876_22930333_BtfsvA&akid=3876%2E22930333%2EBtfsvA)**
---
****
Every dollar counts, and we can’t fight back without you.
Thank you for your support,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Keisha Lance Bottoms
subject: Taking on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I stood up to him when I was mayor of Atlanta, fighting for Georgia in the face of his right-wing attacks. And I’ll keep up the fight for Georgians as our next governor.
#
Did you see the news, Peter?
**I’m running for governor of Georgia.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90789?refcode=em20250707-9094&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9094%2E614464%2E2Ahk4n)
We need a proven fighter to take on Donald Trump. That’s me.
I’ve taken on Donald Trump before: I stood up to him when I was mayor of Atlanta, fighting for Georgia in the face of his right-wing attacks.
**And I’ll keep up the fight for Georgians as our next governor.**
It won’t be easy. We know that Trump plays dirty, and his GOP cronies will spend BIG to defeat Democrats like me.
**But with you on my side, I know we can take on the GOP and _win._**
**[Peter, will you pitch in to our campaign for governor and State Democrats Committee? name: House GOP Membership
subject: As Ronald Reagan once said…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Renew your membership today!

"If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth."
-Ronald ReaganThe United States, the greatest nation in the history of the world, is under attack by radical forces that seek to destroy the very foundations of our freedom. As Ronald Reagan so eloquently put it, our nation is the last bastion of liberty, and it's up to us to defend it.
We must not forget the principles that have made America great: LIFE, LIBERTY, and the PURSUIT OF HAPPINESS. These are not just words, but the fundamental values that have guided our nation since its founding.
And it's up to us to protect them.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1qt59bf22ca8kjledpm6b402iebdmgvo3bpq53g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)[RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0c19gh6lpfk51ekh8065u4e54d33c0uv718enm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)
Reagan taught us that we are the light in a dark world, and that we must fight to preserve our freedom and our way of life. That's why I'm writing to you today, to ask for your continued support in this critical moment. The radical Washington leftists, with their communist and socialist ideologies, want to destroy everything our nation stands for. They want to erase our history, undermine our Constitution, and transform our country into a socialist utopia.
We cannot let that happen.
We need patriots like you to stand up for American values, to fight for our freedom, and to defend our nation against those who seek to destroy it. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44e5kvea26jss76alec17krba9opckoj6p6b5p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)[By renewing your membership, you'll be joining a community of like-minded individuals who are committed to protecting our nation and promoting conservative values.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs72ok6op9isglv1oaeb8rbddctrp07oiaff7hc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)
Our goal is ambitious: We need to reach 30,000 members by Friday. But with your help, we can do it. We can show the Radical Left that we will not be intimidated, that we will not be silenced, and that we will not back down.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuu49fbv2rred9uld1ke5oi20oqfqru3klrvj96g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z21rlqukrritigonc21igvs58nhm6eror1ogj1io_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9aunm78e84rbkisp0dt1d842akseinf5l86b4f0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)[RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvpc4t6q59hll8diqs8evputtis99ml90c7p3qfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs) and help us reach our goal. Let's stand together and defend our nation against those who seek to destroy it. The fate of our country depends on it.
[ACT NOW >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1uld2m13boq2lr11p1sa499nqdi7j06rtpsm3t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cji6apr1c9h2bs)

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: Elon Warns: Exec Order 14024 Destroys Dollar
body:
Elon warned about this. Executive Order 14024 is still active.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G2RHZkziOF17w50hciVupUluW7sQpRjEJdkigT19BKduZb-Z8Osb3rWuuiogFAdi7OhIAks0JwGk3-XA--H_V7Prffs9Oxdbz2xaWD3SEJ3xEs_bl68Fe3DFePoS262o7sic-XHv7hB-hqfXGtbepWCW1ypqa5olVTHAmKWRlnuxVkctCIpOMsxIpa4RkKAE_C-RW8qZMnAIKnAoqGM-AixQ5R5nbXNQoG4Mlyek9JzXeBoeGxWEyIXSdT7HzSav2w9DHu5gmoKfQpccztvYcf8-w8wT0Q5mAHgnot83yvQ8vcXEgmb6Xlq18ddrpTTVfJUHV_eTa1sVCkJx-_b1JRgU_AQAA___oVG9Q)

# Executive Order 14024:
Is This the U.S. Dollar's Death Warrant?
This isn't a warning it's happening NOW.
With **[Executive Order 14024](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1u4jAURp_G2RHZ139k4cXMBLOYilZtJdqlYztgFJNgh5_06asgxPbe8-kcE4cutJNC8i8C2AeXEQCifxDA6fsa0_kQ_68X06v_WZzEJvL5C_8e6AWe8NGaVVx-HPwtHPPtS2q_Wm8u5ImP0-Cf8ENa-mhCN19lXThFW4dZ4RWRnFQY6JIVe-WlwBQDGG4sB2M9FdiyRggmGm-FK4ICDBxLLAmnwGVpObcV80w6W7XGLhHDd09pok_BGpLHq0mp72Np-1h0aj-OQ76HaQTat-WQQp_COO36zg0mjUef8oKwGUeg2SdoLhDoeluRl7d5RXU-N4BoPWcgEPncUETr7XuRlBuuoetCFhIxvLuHzNqLgt8AAAD__6gYcKk)** , the groundwork is being laid to dismantle the U.S. dollar's dominance on the global stage.
Experts warn the consequences could devastate your savings, retirement, and financial freedom.
What does that mean for you?
* **Four major countries** have already ditched the dollar for trade.
* **Elon Musk** warns this is making countries want to abandon the dollar.
* Billionaire **Sam Zell** said it best: I can't imagine anything more disastrous to our country.

If you have cash in a U.S. bank, **YOUR financial future is at serious risk.**
Executive Order 14024 is paving the way for irreversible damage to the dollar's value threatening your wealth, your savings, and your retirement.
When the dollar collapses, **your savings could disappear overnight.**
**With Trump threatening Russia with more sanctions, Russia is rushing to finalize their BRICS payment system aimed to destroy the U.S dollar.**
**[Go Here to Learn What's Happening and How to Prepare>>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1u4jAURp_G2RHZ139k4cXMBLOYilZtJdqlYztgFJNgh5_06asgxPbe8-kcE4cutJNC8i8C2AeXEQCifxDA6fsa0_kQ_68X06v_WZzEJvL5C_8e6AWe8NGaVVx-HPwtHPPtS2q_Wm8u5ImP0-Cf8ENa-mhCN19lXThFW4dZ4RWRnFQY6JIVe-WlwBQDGG4sB2M9FdiyRggmGm-FK4ICDBxLLAmnwGVpObcV80w6W7XGLhHDd09pok_BGpLHq0mp72Np-1h0aj-OQ76HaQTat-WQQp_COO36zg0mjUef8oKwGUeg2SdoLhDoeluRl7d5RXU-N4BoPWcgEPncUETr7XuRlBuuoetCFhIxvLuHzNqLgt8AAAD__6gYcKk)**
**This is your last chance to prepare yourself from what's coming.**
**[Go here now to learn more>>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1u4jAURp_G2RHZ139k4cXMBLOYilZtJdqlYztgFJNgh5_06asgxPbe8-kcE4cutJNC8i8C2AeXEQCifxDA6fsa0_kQ_68X06v_WZzEJvL5C_8e6AWe8NGaVVx-HPwtHPPtS2q_Wm8u5ImP0-Cf8ENa-mhCN19lXThFW4dZ4RWRnFQY6JIVe-WlwBQDGG4sB2M9FdiyRggmGm-FK4ICDBxLLAmnwGVpObcV80w6W7XGLhHDd09pok_BGpLHq0mp72Np-1h0aj-OQ76HaQTat-WQQp_COO36zg0mjUef8oKwGUeg2SdoLhDoeluRl7d5RXU-N4BoPWcgEPncUETr7XuRlBuuoetCFhIxvLuHzNqLgt8AAAD__6gYcKk)**

name: =?utf-8?b?U2lnbiB0aGUgTGV0dGVyIOKcie+4jyBbdmlhIFZQUF0=?=
subject: re: Sen. Bernie Sanders, Cory Booker, & Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Senate Dems need you in this fight!
| **FIRST: Bernie Sanders launched his Fighting Oligarchy tour!

THEN: Cory Booker made HISTORY with his 25 hour speech on the Senate floor!

_NOW: Adam Schiff is SLAMMING Trump and his MAGA mob for putting billionaires over the American people! ⬇️_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91755?t=6&akid=20513%2E878179%2ErJXPyp) [**We need 2,000 supporters reading this to join the fight and THANK Senate Democrats like Sanders, Booker, and Schiff for always having our backs! You’ve been hand-selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91756?t=7&akid=20513%2E878179%2ErJXPyp) | [**THANK SENATE DEMOCRATS: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91756?t=8&akid=20513%2E878179%2ErJXPyp)
---
TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Senate Democrats,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge against Donald Trump and his MAGA minions as they attack our democracy!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your backs — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**_Our work is far from over:_ Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING.**

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do _everything_ I can to help take back the Senate and stop this dangerous administration.

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91756?t=9&akid=20513%2E878179%2ErJXPyp) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91756?t=10&akid=20513%2E878179%2ErJXPyp)

body:
We’re one step away from a serious national security crisis.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-zsm8rrSRQ)Peter,
Go to China and try to buy land.
__See how that works out for you.__
Now, try buying land near their military bases.
**__You’d vanish without a trace.__**
But here in America?
**__China continues to buy land dangerously close to U.S. military facilities.__**
Whoever allowed this has betrayed our country.
It’s time to **SEIZE that land** and shut this down, permanently.
**[Do YOU agree?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**[ VOTE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)This is a matter of **national security** , not politics. And President Trump is the only one bold enough to call it what it is: **TREASON**.
Stand for America. Act now.
**— Team Downing HQ**| |
