name: C. Urrutia
subject: People are going to die because of DOGE layoffs
body:
These jobs may sound wonky, but they are critical to our safety and alerting the public to impending disasters.
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ww3uVLWk1dcecRbQFoNO1UsPnHC0PGN3_Ny3auAW1xPuim3-ZOpgAEDBAy3I7LmufpAewqiSVmAlmUN7qQTEJK1tnLc9FKCSVcQWBm334AE0qjTGp3hGHvb7L4QMOMe8zorgWE_GSTjOlgiqGRTmrevnI0-SVtMrnB43cu1nk3qaC6jRv7S_rTQcWuOU3bunItjYyX9WnyNxl3dUR6Zp-tsVnGfzuoJ5&c=A56IWLU7c7VC5K1He7_NnObHwXhWerjSsTvL1snrSjkW7PcYUWPElA==&ch=GeOIybmuWME9oC-aQCUIgZQ9JfzMzaM_LZidFEaNrI16d6vemp9qMw==)
---
| | | | Peter,
Trump's DOGE cuts to our federal government likely played a role in exacerbating the impact of the devastating, tragic, and deadly Texas floods.
The National Weather Service issued warnings about the flash floods, but key vacancies in local offices caused by Trump's DOGE cuts likely hindered how fast the National Weather Service could get life-saving information to the media and other people.
We see this in San Antonio. The weather office there no longer has a warning coordination meteorologist (whose job is coordinating warnings with the media and is the public face of the office).
This is a basic role that shouldn't have been empty. Other cuts to forecasting and weather alert offices in Texas' Kerr County have left critical positions vacant at a time when people need them most.
---
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ww3uVLWk1dcecRbQFoNO1UsPnHC0PGN3_Ny3auAW1xPuim3-ZOpgAEDBAy3I7LmucwKOWuTW_jQncok_RM3druOzFtqlM1hSO6w889NLQpzWUEUuoN-X4SwNIyHAK6leQJTA2VuqVPEb7qS-4-G-O_ytKWOxXSUKYem2eFBIcim8RkNtiPPsL_emzxCunOHy43iUiLtq6J63A6a3Ch2G9zQu8z0sOhprGe6VukdFHss=&c=A56IWLU7c7VC5K1He7_NnObHwXhWerjSsTvL1snrSjkW7PcYUWPElA==&ch=GeOIybmuWME9oC-aQCUIgZQ9JfzMzaM_LZidFEaNrI16d6vemp9qMw==)
---
| | | | Although there is an obvious need to fix this so no one else gets hurt, Trump dismissed concerns about identifying what went wrong, calling the idea "disgusting."
This is the problem with MAGA: it promises everything, delivers nothing, evades accountability, deflects mistakes on to others, and does this all to serve a billionaire class of campaign donors.
But we can do something about it. We can stop this madness and deliver the antidote, forging a new consensus to reject America's slide into MAGA extremism.
My name is Christian Urrutia, and I am running for Congress to deliver bold accountability and beat back MAGA's un-American agenda that hurts people.
To do that, we MUST flip the U.S. House. The path to doing that means we also MUST win my race in New Hampshire. If we win here and flip just three more seats, Democrats will control the House, stop Trump's damage, implement policies that give everyone a fair shot, and demand accountability from the Trump Administration.
---
| | | | [But I need your help to do this. I just launched my campaign last week, and we need to come out strong to show MAGA that they will not win here. Can you contribute just $5 or more to help supercharge our launch and fight to win in NH-01?](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ww3uVLWk1dcecRbQFoNO1UsPnHC0PGN3_Ny3auAW1xPuim3-ZOpgAEDBAy3I7Lmu-qyWBE3u2xJVSqUKRK1oVJmHd08wngKr7ChaG-i2y4rrQkQj36aNtVA6GbWsf7nI2YtiXd9F9KiHkU3B8kDkQ1MUvUVT7boi5dPscxERDyM41gSkAblG2gVaSZrJ0gbs6uD-B6OTYvddLrjQG0yG-dAAAR_pSczvo2V2K0e8vAo=&c=A56IWLU7c7VC5K1He7_NnObHwXhWerjSsTvL1snrSjkW7PcYUWPElA==&ch=GeOIybmuWME9oC-aQCUIgZQ9JfzMzaM_LZidFEaNrI16d6vemp9qMw==)
---

clean_body: These jobs may sound wonky, but they are critical to our safety and alerting the public to impending disasters. | | | | | == | | | | Peter, Trump's DOGE cuts to our federal government likely played a role in exacerbating the impact of the devastating, tragic, and deadly Texas floods. The National Weather Service issued warnings about the flash floods, but key vacancies in local offices caused by Trump's DOGE cuts likely hindered how fast the National Weather Service could get life-saving information to the media and other people. We see this in San Antonio. The weather office there no longer has a warning coordination meteorologist (whose job is coordinating warnings with the media and is the public face of the office). This is a basic role that shouldn't have been empty. Other cuts to forecasting and weather alert offices in Texas' Kerr County have left critical positions vacant at a time when people need them most. | | | | | == | | | | Although there is an obvious need to fix this so no one else gets hurt, Trump dismissed concerns about identifying what went wrong, calling the idea "disgusting." This is the problem with MAGA: it promises everything, delivers nothing, evades accountability, deflects mistakes on to others, and does this all to serve a billionaire class of campaign donors. But we can do something about it. We can stop this madness and deliver the antidote, forging a new consensus to reject America's slide into MAGA extremism. My name is Christian Urrutia, and I am running for Congress to deliver bold accountability and beat back MAGA's un-American agenda that hurts people. To do that, we MUST flip the U.S. House. The path to doing that means we also MUST win my race in New Hampshire. If we win here and flip just three more seats, Democrats will control the House, stop Trump's damage, implement policies that give everyone a fair shot, and demand accountability from the Trump Administration. | | | | == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | With so much going on, I want to thank you for standing up right now. Together, we can turn things around for America. Christian Urrutia Democrat for NH-01 | | | | | == | | | | Christian Urrutia is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: Urrutia for New Hampshire PO Box 4531 Manchester, NH 03103 | | | | | == | | | | Urrutia for NH | PO Box 4531 | Manchester, NH 03103 US | |

body:
Did any women sign the Declaration of Independence?| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036078/556007902/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)
---
Hi Peter,

This past weekend on Independence Day, as we celebrated the foundation on which America was built, and the Founding Fathers who signed the Declaration of Independence, we couldn't help but consider a few things...

Here’s the iconic painting, which depicts the moment on June 28, 1776, when the first draft of the Declaration of Independence was presented to the Second Continental Congress. As you can see, only white men were present that day...
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036080/556007904/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)
---
We’ve come to _expect_ historic images of landmark moments to depict mostly white men. We _understand_ that was just the way things were back then... women couldn’t vote until 1920, and they couldn’t open their own credit cards until 1974; _it just makes sense_ that they weren’t involved in the signing of the Declaration of Independence. But it’s ok because that was THEN, and now, in 2025, everything is different!

...Right??

Well, despite some incredible progress, we’re here with a gentle reminder that we cannot take **any amount of freedom** for granted.

The next two images depict a much more recent – and much less hopeful – moment in American history: **the passage of President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill.”**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036083/556007906/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)
---
Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-SD), center, accompanied by Sen. John Barrasso (R-WY), left, and Sen. Mike Crapo (R-ID) – all white men – moments after the Senate voted to pass Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036085/556007907/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_P3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)
---
House Speaker Mike Johnson speaks to the press, surrounded by Republican lawmakers – mostly white men – to tout the bill’s tax breaks and program cuts for millions of Americans. Over the past few decades, women have become more represented at almost every level of government, and our laws have reflected that increase in representation. For example, when Nevada became the first state to achieve gender parity in their state legislature in 2019, we saw **29** (!!!!) new pieces of legislation expanding women’s rights and safety within the first three legislative cycles alone!

[**This is the kind of progress we are making possible. You can make more progress possible for women across the country -- especially in states with abortion bans -- by donating $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036086/556007910/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)

But in recent years, we have started to see a disturbing trend:

In 2024, the Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a report stating that the number of women running for Congress in 2024 was significantly lower than in previous election cycles.

**Since 2022, the number of women candidates running for federal office is down by 25%. Executive offices at the state level: down by 73%. The number of women running for State legislature is down by 55.4% – and the numbers are even worse when you break it down by race...**

This is a horrible time for women to lose representation in government, as dangerous laws about women’s bodies, well-being, and access to healthcare **are being crafted by rooms full of men.** We desperately need more women in those rooms.

That’s why Her Bold Move is providing pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates with the wide range of support they need to run for office and WIN their elections.

[**We are working to ensure that women’s hard-fought progress doesn’t slip away. Join us to elect as many pro-choice, pro-women women as possible throughout the Trump administration by donating $20.25 or more today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036087/556007911/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)

With Liberty and Justice For ALL,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & President
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111036089/556007913/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250704FourthB_N_JZ_NO_15_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmZDdhZTcwLTRiNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ3vJZF42w_BPwIdqAmXoDTak8cvm6vGJhJ43J_PaWM=)

We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Uyh51TXAz0Sp29WS0WzL-g2?unsubscribedata=7%2BSnwRzICVXXQaSzxp3VCH1OdAaOUGM%2Fsn%2FGVNc3%2FjNLzFm%2FEvFR0SGPLAx1IxZ0bpCsFm7ZGxfnomsYnhA2hx1wv494LXuAaaCrzYrwiTpFj15DQGy1nxHfsUWhSyMKw4ETTF3RGQmddqBQHhdNKGd2Nluwxgx4YqnlvqgyGVvrJQGEnviDKu8NzQyILPeRv38FkO5xrt9SJZCSe9P5rH65G4QctiwWPcHLjdCVbb%2FmWi%2Bnw3pM6qsP8Nx%2BwykNW%2BBrZg3uPj9etuU2gmk9Q55Ik%2FENw37h5rptETlhl0YEY7QycBG8SDjhQ91eHrpe6s02rOnGVKXHsaLZFxEyh1Bl%2BDBfLBh3KybNCpRx7tPNdyLNhwyGQwUIQCFwmMuOpmJSMYi5uWxm4mScgAUK8zKxV%2FPSar%2BdsTvCsbVG3Ac%3D).

name: Flip the Senate
subject: We just got the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111037603/556012106/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250707_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWU4N2UyMS00YzViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BK8wbHwY1eBtOlbI895wByKFhp9dl0MIfUAwECIaYJU=)
Team, We just got the numbers. And they’re even worse than we feared. According to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, the GOP’s so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” would: ❌ Rip health insurance away from **11.8 million Americans**
❌ Slash **$1.1 trillion** from Medicaid, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act
❌ Impose devastating new work requirements that target low-income families, parents, and seniors All just so Republicans can hand **$4 trillion in tax breaks** to their billionaire buddies. This bill could shutter rural hospitals in states like Maine, Georgia, and North Carolina. It will take care away from kids, seniors, and people with disabilities. **It’s a brutal reminder of what’s at stake in the fight for control of the Senate.** In Georgia, this bill directly threatens Medicaid recipients and hospital funding. Senator Jon Ossoff is standing strong, but national Republicans are spending big to take him down and cement their control. **[We can’t let Republicans get away with this. clean_body: | = Team, We just got the numbers. And they’re even worse than we feared. According to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, the GOP’s so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” would: ❌ Rip health insurance away from 11.8 million Americans ❌ Slash $1.1 trillion from Medicaid, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act ❌ Impose devastating new work requirements that target low-income families, parents, and seniors All just so Republicans can hand $4 trillion in tax breaks to their billionaire buddies. This bill could shutter rural hospitals in states like Maine, Georgia, and North Carolina. It will take care away from kids, seniors, and people with disabilities. It’s a brutal reminder of what’s at stake in the fight for control of the Senate. In Georgia, this bill directly threatens Medicaid recipients and hospital funding. Senator Jon Ossoff is standing strong, but national Republicans are spending big to take him down and cement their control. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = — Flip the Senate = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | You've really blown me away, Friend. I’m proud to share that we met our End-of-Quarter fundraising goal, and that’s all thanks to **_YOU._****🫵** Grassroots conservatives like you are the heartbeat of this movement. Because of your support, my campaign is locked, loaded, and ready for the fight ahead in 2026. But you and I both know: the Radical Left never quits. They never give up, never play fair, and they’ll do whatever it takes to roll back everything we’ve built. Because you’ve stepped up for me, here are three commitments I’m making to you in return: **🇺🇸 I will**** _never_****back down.** **🇺🇸 I will**** _never_****give an inch.** **🇺🇸 I will**** _always_****put America First.** Thank you for standing with me. Let’s keep moving forward— _together._ God Bless,
---
| |
---
| | Addison McDowell**Congressman NC-06**

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf4cd980-641d-4a1b-afe6-998b98f34cc8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And Peter, it doesn't even stop at calling them "suckers" and "losers." Now, he's gone so far as to appoint MAGA loyalist Doug Collins as Secretary of Veteran Affairs, who would cut funding and services to millions of military veterans. Our veterans are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to keep our country safe, but Donald Trump isn’t even willing to show them a shred of respect. We’re OUTRAGED! We can't sit idly by as Trump takes away the life-saving benefits of healthcare and additional support from our veterans! [Will you sign your name today to stand with our veterans and condemn Trump's administration for taking away their benefits? Together, we can demand Donald Trump and his MAGA allies to stop their disrespect!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52c55549-4fc6-4990-ab72-b371c428cb93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te807cd3d-6370-4af0-9856-23c8606c3a1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

body:
By the time the waters receded, at least 82 lives had been lost to the flash floods that tore through Texas last week.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aVq77lpXpDPM5KyhtywR80DymGngQ2Rpg8q_3D_gLeM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167736828)
By the time the waters receded, at least 82 lives had been lost to the flash floods that tore through Texas last week. A figure at once astonishing and--given the geography, the season, and the increasingly erratic climate--utterly unsurprising.
As the search for the missing continues, the torrent of commentary, unbidden and unrestrained, poured forth online with even greater velocity than the stormwaters themselves.
In our age of instantaneous certainty and curated outrage, culpability was assigned before the first casualty had been confirmed.
The usual suspects were quickly summoned: a beleaguered National Weather Service, its budget recently slashed with bureaucratic indifference; a failed 2019 bill in the Texas legislature, now reanimated by hindsight, that might have strengthened the state's emergency alert system.
Both grievances found traction and share a certain relevance in the wider discussion, although in this particular case neither delay nor dysfunction had played a decisive role.
Indeed, meteorologists had[ sounded the alarm with clarity and speed.](https://substack.com/redirect/31a5753d-8651-46df-a1a2-539ae7770bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The alerts were not merely issued--they were underscored, repeated, and unambiguous. Some heard them; others chose, inexplicably, not to.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97dc4931-4d5a-4d86-95d8-8bc0d20a6d75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Climate change played a role, at once making extreme weather [more frequent and less predictable](https://substack.com/redirect/59e2aac1-de0f-4a92-972c-982c32584d82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
A disaster does not occur simply because nature wills it; the disaster for humans is in the failure in planning or response to it.
Attention turned, inevitably, to the county sheriff's office, which had declined to mandate or coordinate evacuations. But whether such a measure would have saved those already impervious to voluntary warnings is unclear. In the calculus of disaster, human behavior is as volatile a variable as any weather pattern.
The national narrative, however, found its emotional center in the story of one particular Christian youth camp nestled along the banks of a swollen river, where the children of financiers and CEOs and oil tycoons had gathered in the comforting illusion of pastoral innocence.
Here, tragedy acquired a familiar, photogenic face--pre-adolescent, sun-kissed, affluent--and the coverage followed accordingly.
That other camps along the same river had evacuated swiftly, heeding the earliest alerts, received little mention. That two young counselors at Camp Mystic--a name now etched with unintended irony--had managed to shepherd their charges to safety should have provided a contrast, a lesson. It did not.
Instead, we find ourselves in the realm of the tragic yet preventable, where the true failing was neither federal nor meteorological, but profoundly human.
The fault, in the case of Camp Mystic, lay not in budgetary neglect nor legislative omission, but in the ordinary and consequential lapse of those entrusted with children's lives.
Weather alerts had been issued; others had listened.
The staff at Mystic, whether through denial, distraction, or sheer disbelief, had not.
Disasters, like mirrors, reflect what we bring to them. In Texas last week, they revealed a familiar tableau: institutions straining at the edges, officialdom tangled in blame, and private citizens--some heroic, others heedless--left to bear the consequences.

name: Let Us Worship
subject: A day of Prayer for Texas 🙏🏽✝️
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
---
Dear Peter,
---
The heartbreaking news coming out of Texas is a call for Believers to **PRAY**! Pray for miracles, pray for comfort, and pray for protection from the impending rains. Psalm 34:18 says, _“The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.”_ The spirit of Texas is crushed, and families are brokenhearted. Last month, we announced the rest of our Revive in 25 Tour stops—including **September 6th in Kerrville, TX, ground zero for the flooding.**
---
[| | |
---|---|--- ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a3553da8a0fc4628b3e34166af1e7818&_e=hI3112nB8g1GRQjMrcs4MmExVbaDMlFMyd2Txx95FOa2kKswo8xVg8wwVV9td1fbdGDoW80CkrakhBl4EULzqbjEsfMkaZzfXYKdEIcIPNk6wVXto--OF4PhQvaAtacs54VWAueXqRomRm_Lf-ZsVbN3OOBWU96phpJGhLslAYqFtIrLKxxWJWVwWk40UVgPWZ1Vy_WDRAXeFHlCAEZG0CEFK7heZP9Ic2nawxcT2yW7zUoBxoB0lCSDOUlWrmrjQ5-JrBDu40XaXjBkW3b28hNYwC9LvnXOORvVp_aekl88cL1-_H8f88zbeIL8WKI031XJvP7o0L-Chg1U0fBU1M5oUf923cqvFKqgQV7EBJPK9AS7FYNh_XKHDse1sU0kCtaeCpWhvpKdG9KESvm3H6V9_jt8Ku1lNh0pkzxBmmFfa-U3CdyOLdEZ2wiWoeBI1enJ8OGH8-xAKtddUbesew%3D%3D "A day of Prayer for Texas 🙏🏽✝️")
Only the Lord could have put Kerrville on our hearts _MONTHS_ before the rain started to fall, and on September 6th, we'll gather at The Cross at Kerrville, just like we did back in 2020. He directs our steps, and time after time, places us in the center of pain and hurt to be the hands and feet of Jesus. We don’t always understand His plan, but we will always respond to His calling. We will shower the people of Texas with love and prayer—and praise God through the storm.
---
| | Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, The heartbreaking news coming out of Texas is a call for Believers to PRAY! Pray for miracles, pray for comfort, and pray for protection from the impending rains. Psalm 34:18 says, “The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.” The spirit of Texas is crushed, and families are brokenhearted. Last month, we announced the rest of our Revive in 25 Tour stops—including September 6th in Kerrville, TX, ground zero for the flooding. "A day of Prayer for Texas 🙏🏽✝️" Only the Lord could have put Kerrville on our hearts MONTHS before the rain started to fall, and on September 6th, we'll gather at The Cross at Kerrville, just like we did back in 2020. He directs our steps, and time after time, places us in the center of pain and hurt to be the hands and feet of Jesus. We don’t always understand His plan, but we will always respond to His calling. We will shower the people of Texas with love and prayer—and praise God through the storm. | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

name: Chris Schandevel
subject: WIN at Supreme Court for pro-life states
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205f40otbqx034thsx309yb1rr5izks4yqe1wm0qbb2b6765csx6szhwl3rr9bfa4tp95kset6ven6h2n1z&__stmp=sz1f56&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokllxnft9jteaqo7t2imvt99clzy682a9ucg1oybrmsxsgca7wu3t1a18nnan70kl0de5all8m0763jxn629bm4i3b8awpljiz64xj3y8ojir8pl505y79fgcxnr5xbisb8mwvtvqk5p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokllxnft9jteaqo7t2imvt99clzy682a9ucg1oybrmsxsgca7wu3t1a18nnan70kl0de5all8m0763jxn629bm4i3b8awpljiz64xj3y8ojir8pl505y79fgcxnr5xbisb8mwvtvqk5p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz1f56&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Danielle Franz
subject: What will it take to Make America Beautiful Again?
body:
Radical environmental activists have hijacked a conversation that used to belong to conservatives.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z68a6fph9hhnvf50haj2i5u2feq2n7hom419k3uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)
Friend,

Radical environmental activists have hijacked a conversation that used to belong to conservatives.

They talk about “saving the planet,” but they’re the ones burying our rural lands under red tape, poisoning our culture against commonsense solutions, and trashing America’s clean energy capabilities.

**Meanwhile, President Trump is signing a new executive order to “Make America Beautiful Again”!**

The Make America Beautiful Again executive order will commission Congress to invest in conservation, while focusing on forest management and land stewardship.

President Trump’s actions prove that America First is about more than jobs, energy, and freedom – it’s about safeguarding what makes this country so majestic and reminding America that _conservation is a conservative issue_.

**The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) stands firmly behind President Trump’s goal to make America not only healthy, but beautiful again, too.**

Our goal is to conserve America’s unmatched natural beauty and take back the narrative on environmentalism from the radicals.

We believe economic and environmental success go hand-in-hand and that everyone should feel empowered to take a seat at the table in discussions concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, agriculture, and more.

**If you love this country as much as I do, I invite you to join ACC and President Trump on the mission to[Make America Beautiful Again](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z67ruvt2nmn51eafbtcgovl85c25qj8musbe4dgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs) by donating today!**
[Donate Now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zudt0e3ck45d0ps91op8le71i0u82uucei38vbsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)
_**Think about it, Friend**_ _**, do you want a bunch of D.C. bureaucrats and urban elites, the same ones who can’t keep their cities clean, telling us how to care for our land?**_

President Trump’s Make America Beautiful Again executive order is the first step toward increasing state-level conservation efforts and private-public partnerships to drive smarter environmental policy.

But we need your help to continue our efforts and grow our impact nationwide.

We’re mobilizing young people across the country to clean up their cities, be good stewards of our natural resources, and advocate for a smarter, all-of-the-above approach to energy production.

With over 75,000 members and counting, the American Conservation Coalition is proof that you can love your country, your land, and your liberty all at once!

**Conservation has always been a conservative issue, and it’s time we fight for it!**

[Will you chip in $35, $50, $100, or even just $10 today to maximize our efforts to Make America Beautiful Again? Click here to donate now >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvvo75oeri5sjern50ephgrrv8k3fihoupngbomg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1qklcqsbbc3fih74m23tknujunfev6gcfcd4gqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu3d84gsttj4tdpvabksa39sh0qv6qgpq7rb3uog_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjuruoov67cuvkhd2c9opchdlssdd4c46mnjqfto_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7rtu1es8jet5cjl0nkhvn9sp7hn9np5gftdl20o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zilhbgvkbt8e6n9l2tq4hlumf9b7ci5damiijgrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd8ok4lbnq7fvgnfo9r33637itarbgl0clhv1re8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6tkp8b4r8jscbkv3jsdk91mbs988ra8o61s0030_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztsqf46uk3h763a6pjb4ovei6tfo9r5ceqvnf9p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)
**The American Conservation Coalition is showing the country that conservation is not a partisan issue — it’s an American one.**

America is the most beautiful country on the planet, and that’s part of what makes this country so great.

Our work is all about ensuring that future generations can enjoy the same beauty we do today and that our forebears did before us.

As Teddy Roosevelt said, **_“We have fallen heirs to the most glorious heritage a people ever received, and each one must do his part if we wish to show that the nation is worthy of its good fortune.”_** Now it’s time for you and me to do our part.

[Help the American Conservation Coalition Make America Beautiful Again — not with slogans, but with action!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zigu8vsrocerpqshbpqbvhnvpl77rruod817hjv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)
[Make America Beautiful Again](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za11cm9vr1uaieg3jpu6c4qtbk980oce5l7gt9tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4chh2bs)
Thank you,

Danielle Franz, CEO

_The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628._

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Freedom under fire: You can help defend it
body:
Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziqejtefjehakmm0f7fp88bulnl0brmq5bha25o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4cth2bs)

##
Dear Fellow American,

**Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them?**

Across the country, government overreach and discrimination threaten the basic rights of everyday Americans. Religious liberty and free speech face relentless opposition--and while we've secured some key victories, the fight is far from over.

That's why **Alliance Defending Freedom** is taking action every day to protect your God-given rights. Since 2011, we've won **15 cases at the U.S. Supreme Court** and upheld the freedoms that allow Americans to live and speak according to their beliefs.

We don't charge our clients a dime. We rely on people like you to stand with us and make that defense possible.

Your gift will help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!

Will you seize this moment? Your gift equips us to stand in court for those who can't--and to keep fighting until freedom wins.
[ GIVE NOW ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnue9m62i2sq55f4djo4b15727rbk6rpabvlifg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh60oj4cth2bs)

****

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

Peake just sent an important message: Despite what the media may try to spin, the Republican ticket for Governor, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General is rock-solid and united. Winsome Earle-Sears, John Reid, and Jason Miyares are ONE TEAM with ONE MISSION: Take back the Governor’s Mansion, flip the House of Delegates, and protect our Commonwealth from the far-left agenda. This momentum is real — but only if we match our unity with action. | | Let’s keep the fight going, Ken Nunnenkamp Executive Director Republican Party of Virginia | Friend, No matter what headlines you may read — let me set the record straight: the Republican ticket in Virginia is united, energized, and ready to win. Winsome Earle-Sears. John Reid. Jason Miyares. Three proven commonsense leaders. One unstoppable ticket. There’s no division. No drama. No daylight between us. Just one shared mission: ✅ Secure the Governor’s Mansion ✅ Flip the House of Delegates ✅ Defend our conservative values from the radical left Democrats want nothing more than to divide us. Why? Because they know if we’re united — they’re finished. But campaigns aren’t won on press releases. They’re won with resources. Field staff. Ads. Door knocks. Yard signs. The new abortion ban has got to go.
|

Well, Republicans in Ohio are proposing a bill that would _criminalize abortion_. The “Prenatal Equal Protection Act” would treat abortion as homicide, jeopardize access to birth control, and put IVF at risk.

[**_We need to fight back. Will you chip in now to help us stop this dangerous new bill and defend reproductive freedom in Ohio?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111039648/556019592/-624392295?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_AbortionUpdate_250707_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjc3NDdkZC01MDViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-3wZ5roXJneoyQixG6-EFpAkt1xoBkRvpLydSRCdGA=)

It’s not just this new bill. Ohio statehouse Republicans also went out of their way to pass a state budget that slashed funding for infant and maternal health. It’s yet another attempt to control care, silence providers, and limit people’s choices.

Ohioans already made it clear: We support the right to choose. But Republican leaders are pushing ahead anyway, using their power to roll back the freedoms we secured at the ballot box.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I just finished meeting with President Trump
body:
The age of illegal aliens overrunning our country is over.

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z11fjadjj9c0qhvum7k7ve7cn3t2sap4rai3m360_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh68p34cdh2bs)
|
---
_**I just finished my meeting with President Trump.**_
It’s his STRONGEST supporter in Florida, Byron Donalds, and I want to share with you what we discussed:
**Alligator Alcatraz.**
Radical Democrats’ open border policies for far too long have endangered EVERY American citizen. These policies are _UNACCEPTABLE_ and _DANGEROUS_.
Alligator Alcatraz will be the **LARGEST illegal detention center EVER** , and it will be sitting deep in the Everglades, preventing any chance of escape.
But the Democrats, including the man spending millions against me to flip Florida BLUE, are doing EVERYTHING possible to _DESTROY_ Alligator Alcatraz and put illegal immigrants ahead of American citizens.
They’re raising MILLIONS of dollars with the promise to _END deportations_.
I won’t let that happen and I know you won’t either. name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Freedom under fire: You can help defend it
body:
Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them?

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze37pqosnkfh0mm4lv7e6mgpa8v1bigv7o4vs4p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh68p34cdh2bs)

##
Dear Fellow American,

**Freedom needs defenders. Will you be one of them?**

Across the country, government overreach and discrimination threaten the basic rights of everyday Americans. Religious liberty and free speech face relentless opposition--and while we've secured some key victories, the fight is far from over.

That's why **Alliance Defending Freedom** is taking action every day to protect your God-given rights. Since 2011, we've won **15 cases at the U.S. Supreme Court** and upheld the freedoms that allow Americans to live and speak according to their beliefs.

We don't charge our clients a dime. We rely on people like you to stand with us and make that defense possible.

Your gift will help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!

Will you seize this moment? Your gift equips us to stand in court for those who can't--and to keep fighting until freedom wins.
[ GIVE NOW ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvdo5500k6qi53c3bl0vbn2s0c7kk44sb0kocb6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh68p34cdh2bs)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: "BEST Sermon You Have Ever Preached!"
body:
Yesterday, at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa and OKC I preached a sermon about America's Christian Foundation and our current return to our Christian roots.
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11917.1.b38e023c2893b884692b47959f2feed1) |
---
Yesterday, at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11918.1.aeede3e90ace0018694dc606a89c740d) in Tulsa and OKC I preached a sermon about **America's Christian Foundation** and our _current return_ to our Christian roots. Afterwards, I was flooded with people saying, **"That was the BEST sermon you have ever preached."** Whether that is true or not, I do not know. But I am confident that you should take a few minutes to check it out because you will learn things about our Nation's heritage that has been **purposefully OMITTED from public school classrooms**. Watch ["America WAS, IS + SHALL BE a Christian Nation"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11919.1.25ae4d1744dbfbcd0ed646c627cd1511) here: [https://youtube.com/live/49MwoJoF2gs](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11920.1.6d9d57eb22ea2f5139deadf95e61800b) Please consider patterning with the Mission of Sheridan.Church by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11921.1.55ad4f406c51901a4650d99ade29cccc) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11922.1.b02164c6e4bfe7a87e52a385c6d69b63)
---
---
## It No Longer Looks Like A PRISON!
---
|
---
**It No Longer Looks Like A Prison!** As you know, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11923.1.9de64e315634a88289d562b4a77e6380) purchased a former nightclub in Tulsa, OK and we have completely remodeled the inside. However, the outside needs a major FACELIFT! Today, windows are being installed at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11924.1.f18cf0023c418875248ad29ae63faf40) and the Basketball/Pickleball court is being installed as well. This progress is great but...there is a lot more work to do to the outside of the building.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11925.1.61d352ff799f84d88d6241da71495379)
---
This picture is the end game goal of Phase 1 of our outside remodel.
Our church does the work **on a cash basis** and we are wanting to start the new facelift of the building soon and could use your help to get it done!
Please consider giving towards the new facelift by visiting: [https://sheridan.church/give/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11926.1.b14e7547acd121815a97c0fb966cbc3e) or mailing a check to 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145
**Your support will help accomplish this BIG goal!**
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Give Towards The Sheridan.Church Facelift ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11927.1.1b75493c9097091b72ce104771d82af9)
---
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11928.1.e7ee0806fa13d1b0fc389f41f85716cd) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11929.1.c76cc7416eb2c302ae2091bc3aad616c)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11930.1.739e266cc0bf400b35d85d9d7dd25f3b)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11931.1.f5a51cbdbc335318eef7b776b6a2807e). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11932.1.4c6005d868f844cd4e687b7ba9107478) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11933.1.bfe5a1087b610cc8323bf2841566d461) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11934.1.080cfd2d747e13daeed26a5346cc0b61) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11935.1.1cce981ec06d82c17fff925e194f15b8)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11936.1.b933ea19324b385e6408b9c819f473ef)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11937.1.c7b2be40ac09164b9c6dcf152547fc94) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11938.1.c2ab01e32fe71083c784a79a9557ceac) Thank you,
---
| | [ Read: Chasing After The Wind ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22685589.11939.1.eb5714d26419e85e791232d1c71017e2)
---

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Records on Biden Lawfare Scheme to Prosecute and Jail Trump
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records about the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s (FBI) investigation of Donald Trump codenamed “Arctic Frost,” which was part of an unprecedented effort by the Biden administration to prosecute and jail President Trump for disputing Biden’s controversial election victory.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 7, 2025
---|---|---

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Kentucky Conservative Fights Establishment Money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
---
A new voice is emerging in Kentucky politics, and the establishment is already mobilizing against him. **Nate Morris** , a successful entrepreneur and ninth-generation Kentuckian, has launched a grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate that's sending shockwaves through the state's political establishment. With Mitch McConnell's political machine already gearing up to crush any challenge to their hand-picked candidates, Morris is racing against time to build the conservative movement needed to break their stranglehold on Kentucky politics. _**From Bootstrap Success to Political Insurgent**_ Morris's story embodies the American Dream that career politicians only talk about. Raised by a single mother in a union household, with 19 family members working at the local auto plant, Morris understands working-class struggles firsthand. His grandfather, who led the local auto union, inspired him to never accept "no" for an answer. That determination paid off. With just a $10,000 line of credit, Morris founded Rubicon, building it into one of America's largest waste and recycling companies operating in 50 states and 20 countries. After 12 years as CEO, growing the company to nearly $700 million in annual revenue, he launched Morris Industries to tackle America's biggest challenges. **Now he's taking on his biggest challenge yet: the Washington establishment.** Unlike the typical McConnell-approved candidates who talk tough during campaigns then cave in Washington, Morris has laid out an uncompromising conservative agenda: ▶︎ **Immigration** : Complete opposition to amnesty, ending birthright citizenship, mass deportations, and a temporary immigration pause until illegal entries are addressed ▶︎ **Health Freedom** : Full support for Trump and RFK Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again initiative ▶︎ **Protecting Children** : Banning hormone treatments for minors and defunding schools pushing woke ideology ▶︎ **Second Amendment** : Repealing the Biden-McConnell gun control bill and stopping credit card companies from blocking gun purchases ▶︎ **Election Integrity** : Cutting federal funds to states refusing voter ID requirements ▶︎ **Economic Revival** : Backing Trump's working-class tax cuts and tariff policies to bring jobs home **Time is running out.** [**Please support Nate Morris for Senate today!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b057e3decb52433799907175a3492434&_e=Nfb81WnFF4fzxeuF2A4VTqAVpzOVXaJvEpebQxACpYeqXcDy80VbQQx2e2cfmKY2o6XMh4jywPp9JP7nXzKXsx586eoUbYEmiX2CHEMWqe50tPCWMQcmPDswtqZ1YcDSIZ_6VDii5mjOwPefEmFiSisWPzsy2e86-L5wl1CSrw33dsaLz09EuXyOMsT-Ob_nQJS65z0PCbDRaONrbhYcePaG6_7DC5k2za3xqD4aFoVecGBR9I7HwM8V1v1VATFg-Ubz6Ovup4_MkvabkspUsfotJKIY3-kClYI9lGoZRFu4DZoY2RRo6rcWrEVAMDHT_OnTMRdPvBn1mAVh5UW_gcZUnCujXZqrj28V3yCtOUPjBw0iyf9aSyA1fMHugR3jYrA2AAONo2umSp3wjSkgvw%3D%3D) McConnell's political network, flush with establishment money and deep-state backing, is already moving to ensure another RINO puppet wins this seat. They've seen what happens when outsiders like Morris gain momentum, and they're determined to stop him before his campaign can take root. Morris has been one of the few Kentucky Republicans brave enough to criticize McConnell by name, calling out his betrayals of President Trump and the America-First agenda. That courage has made him a target, but it's also exactly why conservatives must rally now. _**Why Your Support Matters**_ While Morris achieved business success, he knows this fight requires something money alone can't buy: a passionate grassroots movement. The establishment will outspend him with their billionaire donors and special interest money. But they can't match the power of committed conservatives joining together. Every day counts. While McConnell's machine organizes to protect their power, Morris needs patriots to step up immediately. Your support today – whether $5, $50, or $500 – sends a message that Kentucky conservatives are done with RINO representation. **This is about more than one Senate seat. It's about whether President Trump will have the allies he needs to implement his agenda, or whether McConnell's saboteurs will continue blocking America-First policies from within.** _**Take Action Today**_ The window to build a winning grassroots campaign is closing fast. The McConnell establishment is counting on conservatives to wait, to hesitate, to assume someone else will step up. Don't let them win by default. [**Rush your donation now**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b057e3decb52433799907175a3492434&_e=Nfb81WnFF4fzxeuF2A4VTqAVpzOVXaJvEpebQxACpYeqXcDy80VbQQx2e2cfmKY2o6XMh4jywPp9JP7nXzKXsx586eoUbYEmiX2CHEMWqe6dVmJWElzxWEuTTfGSHnPmA8Kf-Wy4ampw55aMHA-N0eD4-FQPCTFFwKW-Rh4H-ud3aJrpLUPkGyhyAKQc0dWxSRbc76AyC1Nuud5H7G_RwYhPuYwhgDFVU8Db6SQRYyZvFUr-gZ3HmlqpI3bml0wDbQECHOBe8FlrDgI55aU2jJDdZMXW20iJpQ8c_UcNlBCAjOFIdZ_2QdTBxKVgz_9DFyAcLlhnWsB8AaF4moVgl4JbbJcQXmhQzqpN-e5qlPgUfTckk8KtPff3sB3yLoLx2Y4OkcBENm3X4A1jaMriPw%3D%3D) to help Nate Morris defeat the RINO machine and ensure Kentucky sends a true conservative fighter to the Senate. Whether it's $5 or $500, every contribution fuels the grassroots army needed to overcome the establishment's millions. Kentucky deserves better than another McConnell puppet and America needs senators who will fight for Trump's agenda, not undermine it. The time to act is now – before the establishment's money drowns out the voice of real conservatives. [**Stand with Nate Morris today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b057e3decb52433799907175a3492434&_e=Nfb81WnFF4fzxeuF2A4VTqAVpzOVXaJvEpebQxACpYeqXcDy80VbQQx2e2cfmKY2o6XMh4jywPp9JP7nXzKXsx586eoUbYEmiX2CHEMWqe5L6t1y7ECegeH46WvmiMmzTDdC1_5pkWVW3YiyI0PgGGPHeImB9Uq482waTA1fW_U02OY3DO5mBI-Sh0yWq83YjBx6GLIXigQLkKIvhe0PzzmwqYy_dmJKY7d5s6vaeLaov5XvtPMvtcdfInDpc0Pesmowx_SStNnPWsHAIJ2q2rIbTMBtYtyJk3W3dKFUaSksahYOy6wvw9HVhaAprdB_T8TA9JSZstewJrWPn4vRZcCVtcQV9RhIs9trbP49s4T9H5dy0w77Vm8oK2IY8maABqBW7t5AOjUtES_GrBcPWw%3D%3D) Tomorrow may be too late.

body:

This is an all-out assault on our freedoms — and it’s fueled by your tax dollars.
We can’t wait. We need to fund Democrats fighting back in the streets, in the courts, and at the ballot box. Chip in $15 or more right now to stop Trump’s fascist takeover before it’s too late. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=070725_1]
Peter, let’s not sugarcoat it: Trump is using the U.S. military to silence dissent — and threatening to arrest governors who stand in his way.
🔻 700 Marines
🔻 4,000 National Guard
🔗 Mass arrests sweep L.A.
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.

And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. clean_body: Peter, they didn’t just pass a disastrous bill — they handed Trump BILLIONS MORE for ICE to hunt down immigrants, silence dissent, and expand his authoritarian machine. This is an all-out assault on our freedoms — and it’s fueled by your tax dollars. We can’t wait. We need to fund Democrats fighting back in the streets, in the courts, and at the ballot box. Chip in $15 or more right now to stop Trump’s fascist takeover before it’s too late. [] Peter, let’s not sugarcoat it: Trump is using the U.S. military to silence dissent — and threatening to arrest governors who stand in his way. 🔻 700 Marines 🔻 4,000 National Guard 🔗 Mass arrests sweep L.A. 🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled. ❗ ❗ ❗ And now that the Big TERRIBLE Bill has become law, the ICE budget is set to increase by BILLIONS of dollars ❗ ❗ ❗ This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate. And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns. We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now. We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. If we let this stand, it will only get worse. Chip in $15 or more right now to help us crush this authoritarian power grab before it spreads further. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Tomorrow, it could be your governor. Your mayor. Your city under military occupation. This is how it starts — and how democracy ends. Stand up. Speak out. Fight back. [] Thanks for doing the right thing, Real Texas PAC [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand Republicans answer tough questions about Texas floods and Trump's culpability.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Republicans avoid tough questions about Texas floods and Trump's culpability.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48db02de-69f6-4f18-a159-421f0dd58a89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51057aeb-f605-4a22-900b-77decfa4d966/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | When Donald Trump took office, he unleashed his minions to make massive cuts to government, seemingly without any rational process whatsoever, beyond "eeny meeny miny mo." These cuts included critical personnel and infrastructure at the [National Weather Service](https://default.salsalabs.org/T090a2c5d-76ee-4f41-81b7-beaa9bf0a879/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), including many who were key parts of the weather disaster forecasting and warning system. Trump was warned that these cuts could result in horrific consequences. But he went ahead anyway, and we've seen what has happened. Democrats have called for an immediate investigation, to determine what went wrong, and how we can fix it ASAP. [But Republicans, fearful of a spotlight being aimed at their incompetence, have been saying "now is not the time" for it, and calling for "prayer" instead.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31c64bb0-e978-40a0-8aa8-d3a660a079a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Don't let them get away with this. They are trying to run out the clock, until people start to focus on other news and events. Now is EXACTLY time to figure out what happened, and fix it, while people are focused on it. And if people want to pray or mourn however they see fit, fine, but we need to take action as well. [**Add your name: Don't let Republicans avoid tough questions about Texas floods and Trump's culpability.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ca14003-c9ae-473f-89f0-09dcbc20d9ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpi0miles943cmnafgget2ic8ntqpm8tbmvj8sdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh64p72cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqfh1h1vt1sl7ccsqi8i81agf186sspa3872ue4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh64p72cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbdvjrpfdaoivtvf2ou844a6bs7g516u51ploj98_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh64p72cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zknpeeb4u70c6sfkb0ggqnl1ohp12vfocfi0ne68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjh64p72cth2bs)**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Blank checks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump likes to act like a tough guy. But when it comes to the devastating violence in Gaza, he lets Netanyahu get away with murder.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1701%2E791427%2EmJCNAB)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250707-1-180&akid=1701%2E791427%2EmJCNAB)
Friend — Trump likes to act like a tough guy. But when it comes to the devastating violence in Gaza, he lets Netanyahu get away with murder.
Sure, Trump will have some harsh words here and there. But at the end of the day, Trump is happy to send Netanyahu and the Israeli military blank checks; money, weapons, supplies, diplomatic cover, anything they need to maintain their occupation and destruction of Gaza.
And let’s be clear. This is exactly the kind of thing that those blank checks pay for:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4525?t=2&akid=1701%2E791427%2EmJCNAB)
In a just world, America’s president would refuse to meet with any head of state who has overseen such atrocities as Netanyahu. In fact, they would **__arrest**__ any head of state who who has an arrest warrant for committing war crimes by the International Criminal Court.
But the US has been complicit from the start. We have abandoned our responsibility to the world and to humanity. And that’s especially true right now, as dozens of Palestinian civilians are killed every day at food aid distribution sites that are controlled by Israel and the US.
**We have blood on our hands, and it’s far past time for Congress to act.**
Blocking the vast majority of aid from entering. Shooting civilians at aid sites. Air striking refugee camps. Torturing prisoners and hostages. Targeting journalists and aid workers. Destroying almost every building left standing. These are all **_war crimes.**_
We have a legal responsibility under both US and international law to stop providing any and all assistance that allows Netanyahu’s government to carry out these crimes. I am asking for your help today in pushing Congress to wake up and do the right thing.
**[Sign my petition today calling on Congress to take action on the situation in Gaza, without further funding for the war machine, and use any power we have to ensure maximum aid is allowed into the Strip. It is never too late to stand up for our shared humanity in the face of so much devastating violence.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250707-1-180&akid=1701%2E791427%2EmJCNAB)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-gaza/?source=em250707-1-180&akid=1701%2E791427%2EmJCNAB)**
I will never abandon the cause of Palestinian security and liberation. I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Trump likes to act like a tough guy. But when it comes to the devastating violence in Gaza, he lets Netanyahu get away with murder. Friend — Trump likes to act like a tough guy. But when it comes to the devastating violence in Gaza, he lets Netanyahu get away with murder. Sure, Trump will have some harsh words here and there. But at the end of the day, Trump is happy to send Netanyahu and the Israeli military blank checks; money, weapons, supplies, diplomatic cover, anything they need to maintain their occupation and destruction of Gaza. And let’s be clear. This is exactly the kind of thing that those blank checks pay for: In a just world, America’s president would refuse to meet with any head of state who has overseen such atrocities as Netanyahu. In fact, they would arrest any head of state who who has an arrest warrant for committing war crimes by the International Criminal Court. But the US has been complicit from the start. We have abandoned our responsibility to the world and to humanity. And that’s especially true right now, as dozens of Palestinian civilians are killed every day at food aid distribution sites that are controlled by Israel and the US. We have blood on our hands, and it’s far past time for Congress to act. Blocking the vast majority of aid from entering. Shooting civilians at aid sites. Air striking refugee camps. Torturing prisoners and hostages. Targeting journalists and aid workers. Destroying almost every building left standing. These are all war crimes. We have a legal responsibility under both US and international law to stop providing any and all assistance that allows Netanyahu’s government to carry out these crimes. I am asking for your help today in pushing Congress to wake up and do the right thing. I will never abandon the cause of Palestinian security and liberation. I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight today. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. subject: Why the Hell Are You Running for Office If You Don’t Want to Solve Problems?
body:
A Montana library fight, a broken government, and the urgent need for leaders who actually give a damn.

| |
---|---|---
