They will become a fourth grader and let them know how to read in third grade," Robson declared. "And for me, that's unacceptable. It's not fair to that individual child, because we are doing a disservice to keep passing them along that they don't know how to read." Government Efficiency Robson plans to create an "Arizona DOGE" to eliminate government waste and establish a Governor's Office of Congressional Accountability to better coordinate the state's federal delegation, promising immediate action on both fronts starting from day one in office. "In my first 100 days, and actually day one, what I intend to do is start our own Arizona Doge," Robson announced. "We are going to do everything we can to eliminate waste fraud and abuse in the Arizona government, because every dollar that is wasted, misplaced, or fraudulently spent is a dollar out of a taxpayer's pocket. And when affordability is such an issue for Arizona families now, every dollar we say is a dollar they can keep in their pocket." Beyond state government efficiency, Robson plans to address what she sees as a lack of coordination among Arizona's federal representatives. "I will also start in a Governor's Office of Congressional Accountability because I don't believe our congressional delegation works like a cohesive unit in the best interests of the state of Arizona," she explained. "Members of our delegation, they each have their little pet projects and they answer to their constituents as they should, but nobody is holding their feet to the fire on major federal issues that affect Arizona." Her vision for congressional accountability involves prioritizing statewide issues over individual districts. "And so I intend to help our congressional delegation prioritize those issues so that collectively, they can better serve the residents of Arizona," she stated. The approach reflects her business background in managing complex organizations and coordinating different departments toward common goals. Robson emphasized that government efficiency directly impacts family finances during challenging economic times. "So we will spend an awful lot of energy, early on, to make sure we are eliminating waste fraud and abuse," she promised, connecting taxpayer savings to household affordability challenges that Arizona families currently face. Robson identified a basic economic disadvantage that Arizona faces as a result of federal land ownership patterns, an issue that receives little attention but has a considerable influence on the state's revenue base and economic growth. "Most of Arizona's land is owned by the, you know, public federal government, state government, and Indian communities. Federal government alone owns millions and millions of acres of land," she explained. "So we have to carry the burden of that land, and it doesn't produce any taxes." The statistics reveal Arizona's disadvantage compared to other major states. "In Arizona, 83% of our land is publicly owned, so only 17% of our land is owned by individuals paying taxes. Compare that to a state like Texas or Florida, where 95% of the land is paying taxes." This disparity creates ongoing financial challenges for Arizona taxpayers. "When Arizona became a state, the federal government paid its payment in lieu of taxes, that formula for all that federal lands, so that the taxpayers of Arizona could alleviate some of that burden. That formula has not been updated in decades. So Arizona's got screwed." Executive Experience and Conservative Values Robson consistently emphasizes her business background as a key differentiator from career politicians, arguing that executive experience translates directly to effective governance. "I've managed and dealt with a lot of challenges throughout my career, getting things built, getting things approved, getting things through, you know, through the red tape of government, which is not always an easy task to do." Her management philosophy centers on bringing people together to solve problems. "I've been able to, you know, accept those challenges and work through them. And oftentimes that means bringing people together to find the best solution to things. And those are skills that executives bring to the table." Beyond management skills, Robson emphasizes the visionary aspect of executive leadership. "The executive also can define a vision, articulate the vision, and inspire people to follow them. And that's what I've done my entire life, and that's what I intend to do is govern."Her conservative credentials span the full spectrum of Republican priorities. "I am a conservative. I always have been, always will believe. You know, I've been a pro life supporter, I've been, you support the First Amendment, the Second Amendment Amendment. I believe our rights flow from God and not the government. I believe in a low tax, low regulatory environment." Sharp Contrast with Governor Hobbs Robson sharply contrasts Governor Hobbs, describing her as fundamentally opposed to Arizona's conservative ideals. "Katie Hobbs does not share those values. Katie Hobbs is a radical. She is a lefty, and the only thing standing between, you know, Arizona and turning us into California is having the Republican majorities in our state legislature."The criticism extends beyond policy disagreements to questions of legal compliance. "What we know is that Katie Hobbs is radical, right? She is currently under investigation for corruption by our Democrat attorney General. And so Katie Hobson, unfortunately, for the people of Arizona, is on the wrong side of the law more often than not." Robson argues that without Republican legislative majorities, "Katie Hobbs would turn Arizona into California," emphasizing that "Arizona's a conservative state, and they share my values, pro life, First Amendment, Second Amendment, go down the list of things that matter to conservatives and that are conservative values." Robson plans aggressive regulatory reform to reduce burdens on Arizona businesses and families. "I would fight tooth and nail to keep Arizona's tax burden low and our regulatory burden low," she stated, proposing a comprehensive review of existing regulations."Institute a moratorium on any new regulations until we have another thorough review of the regulations here on the books," she explained. "You know, the government regulations over time tend to snowball and just get more and more and more. And I think it's time again, to put the brakes on that." Her approach emphasizes questioning the government's role across all areas. "We should question everything the government does to make sure, is it needed? Is it something we should continue to do or should we eliminate it? Sometimes it's better to eliminate." Personal Motivation and Arizona's Appeal Robson's campaign is deeply personal, rooted in her lifelong connection to Arizona and her experience traveling the state during her first campaign. "I learned how much more I love this state than I thought I did. It is more beautiful, and I'm an Arizona native. I grew up here, and I've always known Arizona's a beautiful state." Her travels revealed not just Arizona's natural beauty but the character of its people. "But more importantly is the people. I love meeting people, I learn a lot from meeting people in Arizona. It is full of really, really good people here. You know, God Fearing patriots, hardworking people that literally want the government out of their lives." The candidate sees Arizona's population as uniquely freedom-oriented. "72% of our adults came from somewhere else. They're attracted to this place because of freedom," she explained, noting that people moved to Arizona "because of freedom" and want to "fulfill their God given estimate." Unchanged Core Values Despite the political journey from unknown candidate to major contender, Robson emphasizes that her fundamental values remain constant. "My fundamental values have not changed. I am a mom, a grown up, a wife, I've lived the American dream." Her sense of responsibility drives her continued involvement in politics. "We're only here for a very short time, and we owe it to the people that came before us, that gave us the American privilege that we enjoy, and they have to pass that on," she explained. "And during our very short time here, I believe, we have a responsibility to do everything we can to pass that legacy on to the next generations." Looking Ahead to 2026 With Governor Hobbs declaring her reelection candidacy on Tuesday, Robson's early campaign start positions her to gain traction from her Trump endorsement and drastically boosted name recognition. Her campaign builds on themes from her 2022 campaign, but with substantially stronger positioning and a more defined policy platform. The race promises to be a clear ideological choice between Robson's conservative, business-focused approach and Hobbs' progressive governance style. Robson's early start, combined with her Trump endorsement and established statewide network, suggests she aims to avoid the primary challenges that complicated her 2022 campaign while building a broader coalition for the general election. Arizona's political landscape in 2026 will likely center on the themes Robson has already begun emphasizing: housing affordability, border security, education reform, and government efficiency. Her positioning as a Trump-endorsed conservative with executive experience offers a clear contrast to Hobbs' progressive record and sets up what promises to be one of the most closely watched gubernatorial races in the country. | | PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA. AUTHORIZED BY KARRIN TAYLOR ROBSON. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

subject: What are the top issues facing Colorado?

body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/colorado-priorities-survey [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/colorado-priorities-survey]
Friend,
Whether it’s the sky-high costs of childcare, and healthcare straining family budgets or small business owners facing uncertainty due to Trump’s economic chaos, our state is facing some real challenges.
Michael hears about it all the time when he’s talking to Coloradans in every corner of our state. Like you, he knows the solutions we need aren’t going to come from Washington’s broken politics or Trump’s chaos.
They’ll come from us at home, working together. It’s precisely why he’s running for Governor and why we want to hear from you today. What are the issues, priorities, and concerns at the top of your mind? What do you think we need to do to make our state more affordable?
We want to know. If you have a minute, please take our Colorado Priorities Survey today >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/colorado-priorities-survey]
COLORADO PRIORITIES SURVEY [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/colorado-priorities-survey]
Hearing from you is invaluable to our campaign. Not only does it better inform us about what people are thinking about, but it also helps us create a campaign that best addresses the priorities of everyday Coloradans.
Team, when you get the chance, please take our Colorado Priorities Survey. We’d love to hear from you. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/colorado-priorities-survey]

clean_body: We need women leading our states | = Peter, As we've seen nationwide since Trump returned to office in January, governors are one of our best lines of defense when it comes to fighting back and stopping Republican chaos and cruelty in their tracks. That's why EMILYs List is all-in to elect Democratic pro-choice women this election cycle. I'm writing to you with an opportunity to directly support a battle-tested candidate for governor today, and it's a time-sensitive request. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Gov. Hochul has a state-mandated July fundraising deadline on July 11, which is why this chance to send your support straight to her is so urgent. Kathy has been shutting down Donald Trump and fighting for New Yorkers as governor for four years and counting. Reelecting champions like Kathy Hochul is the cornerstone of our strategy to send more women to governor's mansions nationwide. Taking back power starts with electing Democratic pro-choice women to lead our states. = = Thanks for stepping up, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? | | | Hello Derek- **_REMINDER YOU HAVE UNTIL TONIGHT 07/07/2025 TO BOOK YOUR ROOMS!_** The Young Democrats of America are gathering for our convention from July 16-19 in Philadelphia, PA. We’re excited to welcome young leaders from across the country for a weekend of organizing, training, and building power together. **The hotel block closes tonight! Book your room by July 7, 2025, t** o get the discounted rate. This gives attendees extra time to finalize their travel plans and secure lodging. We’re excited to welcome young leaders from across the country for a weekend of organizing, training, and building power together. The hotel block closes tonight! Book your room by July 7, 2025, t o get the discounted rate. This gives attendees extra time to finalize their travel plans and secure lodging. To get the most out of the week, we encourage everyone to book their stay at the Sheraton Philadelphia Downtown, our official convention hotel. We’ve secured a special group rate to ensure a convenient and affordable experience for all attendees. We’re also excited to share that the is now available at yda.org/convention! Here, you’ll find details about caucus meetings, trainings, speakers, and other weekend highlights. More updates will follow soon. If you haven't already, don't miss out — register today or visit for more information. We hope to see you in Philadelphia! | | Sent via . | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f6f9814-c9a1-4001-9ddb-7f225b435e1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jay Jones
subject: Now, the real fight is underway
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025]
Team, I couldn’t be more thankful to everyone who chipped in, spread the word, or read emails just like this one. I couldn’t have become the Democratic nominee for Attorney General of Virginia without every single one of you.
But now, the real fight is underway.
I’m up against our far-right AG Jason Miyares, who prioritizes his allegiance to Donald Trump over the people of Virginia, leaving our families and communities vulnerable to attacks. He’s allowed the Trump administration to walk all over the Commonwealth.
The Commonwealth needs a change — but Miyares is going to be tough to beat because his wealthy friends are trying to buy this election. They're already spending BIG on attack ads against us!
We need all hands on deck to fight back.
I’ve set up a General Election Fund to raise the funds needed to keep up with Miyares' big money donors. Can you make a grassroots contribution of $15 or more to help my campaign and defeat Jason Miyares? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=15]
DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=15]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Virginians are concerned about keeping their families safe, having good jobs that put food on the table, and having access to life-saving services like Medicaid and Social Security.
I know a brighter future for Virginia is possible.
But Miyares and Trump’s MAGA cronies will do anything to crush our grassroots movement. We have to fight back.
This is going to be a tough race, but I know together, we can win, team. Please, can I count on you to support my General Election Fund with $15 or more? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=15]

Jay

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I'm the Democratic nominee for Governor in Virginia's general election.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.DaTKDM&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=1&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)
---
Team, it's official:
**My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I'm the Democratic nominee for Governor in Virginia's general election.** I'm ready to flip the Governor's office blue this November, defeat Trump's agenda at the ballot box, and get to work creating a more affordable Commonwealth for all.
But one lesson I learned during my years in Congress and at CIA is that a strong team beats going at it alone every time, so I hope you will join my campaign today.
[**Will you become a founding member of my campaign for Governor by splitting a $5 contribution with GIFFORDS? There's no bigger election this year than here in Virginia, and I feel the responsibility to set the tone by winning big — but I can only deliver if we raise the resources to air ads, hire organizers, and turn out voters.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.DaTKDM&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=2&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.DaTKDM&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=3&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
In a few short months, we can start Democrats on a winning streak by flipping Virginia blue.
_It's not going to be easy._
Four years ago, we lost this same Governor's race by two points and saw years of progress erased in an instant. And my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has shown she will indulge in fearmongering and disinformation to keep Virginia under Republican control.
Your contribution today, whatever the amount, will help us rise above the attacks and build a winning campaign that reflects our shared values.
If you're fed up with the chaos coming out of Washington, if you're outraged watching GOP officials bend their knee rather than uphold their oath, I am counting on your immediate and full support.
[**Click this link to complete your donation and become a founding member of my campaign for Governor. Together, we will flip Virginia blue and send a resounding message to this White House and beyond that voters will not stand for the corruption, the attacks on fundamental rights, and the brazen disregard for the needs of working families.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.DaTKDM&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=4&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Abigail Spanberger and GIFFORDS PAC:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.CjtKiA&amount=5&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=23&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.3-Tl1z&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=24&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.vljCV_&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=25&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.71y_L0&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=26&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.eCyPRH&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=27&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-spanberger-2025.CjtKiA&refcode=em250707-1-b&t=28&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX)**
---
****
I'm honored by the trust you are placing in me. Virginia is where I grew up and where I'm raising my three girls, and I refuse to let far-right extremism win the day.
With immense gratitude,
Abigail Spanberger

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=10658%2E3935704%2E8fiDQX) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Urgent Call to Action (VPP)
subject: Trump wants to silence MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **_Folks, this is EMBARASSING for Donald Trump:_**

**FIRST:** Trump won the election, and MSNBC viewership PLUMMETED...

**THEN:** Elon Musk threatened to buy the network and turn it into another far-right media platform, _**and Democrats STEPPED UP to SAVE IT!**_ ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/watch-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250707_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20514%2E878179%2EttsyUI) **NOW:** Donald Trump and his minions are FURIOUS and threatening MSNBC with HORRIBLE attacks, so we need to make sure Democrats are still watching:

**[Respond by Midnight: Are you still watching MSNBC? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/watch-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250707_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20514%2E878179%2EttsyUI)** | [YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/watch-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250707_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20514%2E878179%2EttsyUI)
---

Thank you, friend,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20514%2E878179%2EttsyUI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20514%2E878179%2EttsyUI).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20514%2E878179%2EttsyUI) to request fewer emails. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Republicans lie more than they breathe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Last year Republicans promised that they would never cut Medicaid and that they would defend Veterans.
#
Last year Republicans promised that they would never cut Medicaid and that they would defend Veterans.
Trump promised. Republican Senate and House candidates promised. Their staff promised.
On Friday, they all voted to cut Medicaid. They declared war on Veterans struggling to keep their homes, to put food on the table, or get the health care they need.
They lied. They were lying the entire time. And they won elections because they lied.
We need to call this out.
We’re sick of it, and we’re done watching it happen.
Every single Republican who lied their way into office and went on to vote to pull the rug out from under Veterans and their families deserve to lose power. VoteVets is going to do everything in our power to make sure that happens.
[**We will kick these spineless, craven liars out of office. And we need your help to do it. Please, chip in to VoteVets and make sure the Republicans who greenlit this bill face the music next November.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250707-1-120&t=1&akid=34470%2E3013755%2ENcks4K)

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/NLGWMy1e_kccfL9wR_-1dbylew9D_4PNAyOcZ7fhva7ZeLxTo9K1THKRKw3zU_mFhuv9D12LQQQtz_7g3Y2BCZV7OIX6xPCI1WLlSlTdZ_lcnLWqSOHCtgW83ie70WPXJ8XlnScQh5Yy1eU2Hw5-KcWfunsFHC7KflCfz0TmHD9CHn0HkCJi2w6lRdKEx9TcUtY-WtVwSGBuzawx_sqOIX4GKhxRWNjm4MqsAXTSLsKLv9LON-GWaJNcz4LW4TlufHvE0sCZVkTS6k3ADXIyZq0v8g_Vp5bmF_IEzXwOyd4yJgujVDV-hnfJV8amlmOzb9N0wCxx5ogI779Vz3W6L5vSZk1O4HxZhcSgjDVVYnt1PPOU8AFMCv6spASOl1v6vGiUb4XUarnnNqE9UWKXw9UZ3aCdNgvK8bmY0G-5bPCvwoqy8xJvS8RXqcdwhsOsCiUkM1bwMC9MHk6fB47jxQCv_rhBvDH9UVU_5SpnV4l5N-q3HJwdUMfVkvMfCImQ60X6KmSMjVWfggzMxMLdmTq-rAqD_eb3RMUI4xXnRyBc_hQ1flRdHJ6VfvwER9J_2gxlr2uRxhCPOaIGmQS_E3Zwg6EkYlG0yt1fiALkNqg_BoEA7gEw1wtB3FDuwEmuBZ2UZ7fC9hWzPVgZ5CUf8SzhbfEo3JjZdlUUCXAC9WzJiXhLzmI09WLyrHke6mylCNQi8ZbpgbP2UuFKCv-VD47Hv-EiWKXUyyKxHNzdjPLZ_hAdJ4eEW7NnBPaTkXs/elc0GSFo-6VrX6kGVH7nrTaXfoNQOSHZ/10)

**Patriot --this is horrifying.

**
Congressman Eric Burlison here.

I've just been informed about the incident in McAllen, TX. This wasn't just a tragedy. **It was a WARNING -and I'm sounding the alarm.

**
🚨 **Border Patrol was AMBUSHED.**
🚨 **Federal agents were attacked by an anti-American lunatic** while trying to do their job.

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/2YvhH-rwmy-VxQh733oBFj01rp0omfxG-o2AcAV__GfJkS_vOz9XAd0ZG72f6nU6SF0C8HD3VI9PYH9u24pBcixdNdu2YoMoMNQIikWMPaCmoPU6I869VzL89On1u4CQt5Kn3TmCorXVI4A2VjQk_vVYQgkUMSLYCL0-l8bUOGNLSlyft5GNdwaCj0YS52Ylwx7-eYaDe5oRIPLFe6vyo5zM6ydEiaYVBLAnq2HzAH3KNRQgKqzTGJ_EL3sTqPGhy0mMPFOw451XYNoPz3OEsP2whW9O6sYeoYAsNBF68Fu_6PadNl0lVqsGsrJFwhb5EJARpzevRNDlVItBNUDSHfGMdji1nspW8EiO9C4ugJl_SBLhdN9_aTdh7g0gtcrUoQDbGEbiViBnTcBhtlRNfbf7iuNyU4IRc8DJtT8Un6EBuJUTAp5CXiHsHAMZhw2Ogy1NdaT_f1NH7-t1wki56MrawrgwQQ6xWY3KgTdDWRHYzF7IuEOzU70HqQQX2FM0GU9rDyCdV6gIeRlTdwB4RzkoSkNUa9Acb1GEdsbHhA5tCoS1Rkkx3-cPdS4Zxwxu-tCUZlzzHzSwSEKKejpjIsFuMvJMAu1558PkQ5I_vVb9s6YQjCzOp9PXQnETyqQFEwTJtI0QslAGqWMGIhj2ROiAMn-KVnVq8x35rwsLpdQaApN-Il4L9iiLWej8uq7jAQWxjksuOVuu93mxwqnA0-Xy8O3P5hZgORS2_M1PwXhmRFh5h2M1FiKQ-t5ZRHY/nB_OVsWnhOYPxLsnJ36Vr1edvAnqmsA3/10)

This wasn't some peaceful protest.

This was **an act of war** on our own soil.

But what's worse?

Some of my own Democrat colleagues **ADMITTED** they've heard this kind of talk from their base:

**" People are saying we need to be willing to get SHOT at ICE facilities."**

**" There needs to be BLOOD to grab the public's attention."**

**" Civility ISN'T working. Prepare for VIOLENCE."**

**" We need to STORM the White House."**

Let that sink in.

This isn't just rhetoric.

This is **the Radical Left escalating to violence** --and they're cheering it on behind closed doors.

**That 's why I'm sounding the alarm, Patriot.**

**Our GOP majority is SLIM.**

The stakes? Even slimmer.

🛑 If we lose even a handful of seats, we hand control back to the very people who believe **violence is the answer**.

🛑 We lose our power to stand with Border Patrol.

🛑 We lose our ability to **DEPORT** criminals.

🛑 And we lose our shot at **FOUR FULL YEARS** of Trump's America First agenda.

I refuse to sit back and let that happen.

But I can't do this alone. I need your help to **HOLD THE LINE.**

👇👇👇

clean_body: This is not just an attack on law enforcement—it’s an attack on our country Patriot --this is horrifying. Congressman Eric Burlison here. I've just been informed about the incident in McAllen, TX. This wasn't just a tragedy. It was a WARNING -and I'm sounding the alarm. 🚨 Border Patrol was AMBUSHED. 🚨 Federal agents were attacked by an anti-American lunatic while trying to do their job. This wasn't some peaceful protest. This was an act of war on our own soil. But what's worse? Some of my own Democrat colleagues ADMITTED they've heard this kind of talk from their base: " People are saying we need to be willing to get SHOT at ICE facilities." " There needs to be BLOOD to grab the public's attention." " Civility ISN'T working. Prepare for VIOLENCE." " We need to STORM the White House." Let that sink in. This isn't just rhetoric. This is the Radical Left escalating to violence --and they're cheering it on behind closed doors. That 's why I'm sounding the alarm, Patriot. Our GOP majority is SLIM. The stakes? Even slimmer. 🛑 If we lose even a handful of seats, we hand control back to the very people who believe violence is the answer. 🛑 We lose our power to stand with Border Patrol. 🛑 We lose our ability to DEPORT criminals. 🛑 And we lose our shot at FOUR FULL YEARS of Trump's America First agenda. I refuse to sit back and let that happen. But I can't do this alone. I need your help to HOLD THE LINE. 👇👇👇 I'm doing my job on the inside. But I need Patriots like you on the outside to stand strong with me. Because if we don't fight back now-- For America, Congressman Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress"

name: Rashida Tlaib via Able Dems
subject: Guantánamo is where our rights go to die
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Trump must halt immigration detention at Guantánamo Bay, not expand it. | | | Friend,
Trump and other Republicans are trying to spend billions of taxpayer dollars to expand mass incarceration, including proposing to deport and imprison thousands of immigrants in notorious overseas torture prisons.
Recently ICE has been racially profiling U.S. residents and targeting people with tattoos, kidnapping them and sending some to Guantánamo Bay, a facility infamous for human rights abuses.1
Just last month the corrupt far-right members of the Supreme Court ruled to permit deportations of asylum-seekers and undocumented immigrants who’ve committed no crimes—not to their home countries but to random third countries where they lack community and legal status. They ruled that presidents can deport people, without meaningful review, to wherever a president designates a “safe country.”
**I’m fighting back against these horrific governmental attacks on immigrants and on our constitutional rights.** I just led 15 of my colleagues in Congress in calling on the Trump administration to immediately end the use of Guantánamo Bay for migrant detention—and to permanently close the detention facilities there.
**[Will you sign on today to join our letter demanding the immediate, permanent closure of Guantánamo Bay?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9NcO5XPDx50DbF_L6A7b7rME-BP2JNuDHUjm_FUJYq7mFQelqY7D8aWQibp_1-_jHoU7t7HbLwQVVBlVKcZlSdQVXjqvGCGJ1j0LBFglwl6y1nGNfP-v4tM01KZ-zDeqI9ev7D0AN_enQGv1ykceTGeDYjtWa1r2LQCKJnHTRQ7O9moZTELPqrkskeLpefbuOddkaQhmJGS3D_PGZFSx6sjaVi9xWxGgA9d6fUD62Oy0Fb39gXFtgCItBQjqKOYzcK7hmE3YZjj8nu5cdd6-a7rG5I7fz2Nx5DVMDIgW9I0S9Ij9IIEPnaII0aSHuOVDTB5XdmcmNroUGrE9aoEsP1iZW_IN0ADgHJCwZw63LMEMUjK54QKZ4zF5yndHonUlnfHFV4dAdpOUPACcthgv4NFHhkp5yUCQmvz14CilZCCFNW7cSfcjOrx8jAwBxwh1YSKsT9zXtPpRjrsWo7MFDfIA17rW3vCmTZH84mjhP2sJjliLqzj35dP9kOE2lL2AujHjA0JrfkEBxmHCMsvJlkHbgB3rYryo73PH892zhQIXxDElL6ffw1DAE2LAD7wjU/4hz/Pud9HrUMTL6l2_ntV0z5YQ/h0/h001.uQau7Z0OV9dCUpXB042K_1RDpn0qG0Jzcmi-nTp1Q6k) **
| [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9NcO5XPDx50DbF_L6A7b7rME-BP2JNuDHUjm_FUJYq7mFQelqY7D8aWQibp_1-_jHoU7t7HbLwQVVBlVKcZlSdQVXjqvGCGJ1j0LBFglwl6y1nGNfP-v4tM01KZ-zDeqI9ev7D0AN_enQGv1ykceTGeDYjtWa1r2LQCKJnHTRQ7O9moZTELPqrkskeLpefbuOddkaQhmJGS3D_PGZFSx6sjaVi9xWxGgA9d6fUD62Oy0Fb39gXFtgCItBQjqKOYzcK7hmE3YZjj8nu5cdd6-a7rG5I7fz2Nx5DVMDIgW9I0S9Ij9IIEPnaII0aSHuOVDTIaY6Lb5WngpNPNnmKgpL3grkdr3TFmXDGq8Nrli5t26FDLFXyuvcu0e25PrM2PgsSiaxaMnFOUcSnLiSeH2T0tcSdccfWUu4Eq-7ny3X8_tmYtzig7DRvGj9OmNpWw_ntY0sc_NUQMrBre_X8_XyK92EaodtAGAO7asEWkA-mOpWpXvxGjCL7jaQM9delw7kmh4HQ1W_ZumJuVhgRAr0S9-vcFKV2CClhzumd9W_gV1inmS8H88AL01ydkP0QFGI/4hz/Pud9HrUMTL6l2_ntV0z5YQ/h1/h001._7UbRXylaibvVXnApZNFfjuHJAc8ARAITn1fpnpEQ5U)
---

Fifty-five organizations endorsed our letter, which also demanded the administration _“ensure that all detained individuals are treated with dignity, due process, and the protections guaranteed under both U.S. and international law.”_

We must defend the rights of immigrants of all statuses and U.S. citizens, who are also swept up in ICE’s raids and sometimes illegally deported.2 During Trump’s last term, ICE unconstitutionally deported at least 70 U.S. citizens, and that number is sure to rise in this term—unless we do something about it.3

I’ve worked as an immigration attorney, I’m a daughter of immigrants, and I’ve been to inhumane immigration detention facilities, so I’ve seen our broken and dehumanizing immigration system up close. I’ve held the Department of Homeland Security accountable for its violations of our shared rights, and I’ve introduced policies to protect immigrants’ rights and free people from ICE facilities.

**It is my duty as a Congresswoman, and an American, to raise hell until immigrants seeking safety and a better life are treated with dignity and respect, and have real paths to citizenship.**

We have urgent work to do, and it includes fighting back against the fascist attacks on immigrants, including demanding the end of mass immigrant detention and deportations.

**Will you add your name as a grassroots co-signer to our congressional letter demanding the Trump administration immediately halt immigrant detention at Guantánamo Bay, and to permanently close the detention facilities there?**
**
**
[**Thank you for taking action. Together we’re demanding a government that invests in people’s needs rather than spending hundreds of billions of dollars on mass arrests, detentions, and deportations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9NcO5XPDx50DbF_L6A7b7rME-BP2JNuDHUjm_FUJYq7mFQelqY7D8aWQibp_1-_jHoU7t7HbLwQVVBlVKcZlSdQVXjqvGCGJ1j0LBFglwl6y1nGNfP-v4tM01KZ-zDeqI9ev7D0AN_enQGv1ykceTGeDYjtWa1r2LQCKJnHTRQ7O9moZTELPqrkskeLpefbuOddkaQhmJGS3D_PGZFSx6sjaVi9xWxGgA9d6fUD62Oy0Fb39gXFtgCItBQjqKOYzcK7hmE3YZjj8nu5cdd6-a7rG5I7fz2Nx5DVMDIgW9I0S9Ij9IIEPnaII0aSHuOVDTEjRM8DwawMCAx1Y8-Cg2oFQVNCWGo1QYzukGIlG14lDgRK1S1TlCE0M5SppL1lZx88-AKKpZEKbvufezIU_5Ww1Z17CWoZ-Rbmc75Gj0zFzoqvXNUEsAyPLYQxhiX-Oi8xXOAsfkXmhXFjbC9YZh99duzyvP97ic0EVVTizPokXNXwhqn5SGhc1469umHpMAlefbKc6PPLNieljhPFQC7kYV7L3SgHBk3H4KrHrvbcT_6UfnqKUNjj3NxrP4yy09/4hz/Pud9HrUMTL6l2_ntV0z5YQ/h2/h001.KCI7YTDqjQcZYNRLfm2vmcUC70i5EOp2xvJNXTSFRks)

With you in the fight against fascism,

Rashida

Recently ICE has been racially profiling U.S. residents and targeting people with tattoos, kidnapping them and sending some to Guantánamo Bay, a facility infamous for human rights abuses.1 Just last month the corrupt far-right members of the Supreme Court ruled to permit deportations of asylum-seekers and undocumented immigrants who’ve committed no crimes—not to their home countries but to random third countries where they lack community and legal status. They ruled that presidents can deport people, without meaningful review, to wherever a president designates a “safe country.” I’m fighting back against these horrific governmental attacks on immigrants and on our constitutional rights. I just led 15 of my colleagues in Congress in calling on the Trump administration to immediately end the use of Guantánamo Bay for migrant detention—and to permanently close the detention facilities there. | Fifty-five organizations endorsed our letter, which also demanded the administration “ensure that all detained individuals are treated with dignity, due process, and the protections guaranteed under both U.S. and international law.” We must defend the rights of immigrants of all statuses and U.S. citizens, who are also swept up in ICE’s raids and sometimes illegally deported.2 During Trump’s last term, ICE unconstitutionally deported at least 70 U.S. citizens, and that number is sure to rise in this term—unless we do something about it.3 I’ve worked as an immigration attorney, I’m a daughter of immigrants, and I’ve been to inhumane immigration detention facilities, so I’ve seen our broken and dehumanizing immigration system up close. I’ve held the Department of Homeland Security accountable for its violations of our shared rights, and I’ve introduced policies to protect immigrants’ rights and free people from ICE facilities. It is my duty as a Congresswoman, and an American, to raise hell until immigrants seeking safety and a better life are treated with dignity and respect, and have real paths to citizenship. We have urgent work to do, and it includes fighting back against the fascist attacks on immigrants, including demanding the end of mass immigrant detention and deportations. Will you add your name as a grassroots co-signer to our congressional letter demanding the Trump administration immediately halt immigrant detention at Guantánamo Bay, and to permanently close the detention facilities there? With you in the fight against fascism, Rashida 1. 2\. 3\. elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Normally when you see my name in your inbox, you can expect the messages to be different from most political causes. I like to be transparent about our JanePAC endorsements, our strategic investments, and the climate wins we're securing together every step of the way. Today, I want to update you on something I’m proud of — the driving force that makes all of this work possible. **Our average donation to emails like this one last quarter was just $26.** | [**CHIP IN $26**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111050313/556057894/2105508926?amount=26&refcode=ea.3fac3b10-6e5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3fac3b10-6e5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmYWMzYjEwLTZlNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-S6OpMUnH819lFyVyHzPXyiB40JNOfiqaCTLJunQKW0=)

Those $26 donations come from healthcare workers, educators, seniors, working families, and countless others — people from every corner of this country who chip in to emails like this one and understand that real change happens when ordinary people refuse to stay silent.
When hundreds or thousands of supporters chip in $26, those gifts start to add up fast. Before you know it, that $26 becomes the resources we need to elect climate champions who can't be bought by fossil fuel interests.
**But grassroots movements like ours only work with sustained support from people like you who believe in what we’re fighting for and help us elect the very leaders who answer to the people, not Big Oil executives.**
**[The climate crisis won't wait, and neither can we. So I'm asking: Will you chip in $26 — or whatever amount works for you — to help us keep electing climate champions who will fight like hell for our planet and bring real solutions to their communities?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111050314/556057895/2105508926?amount=26&refcode=ea.3fac3b10-6e5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3fac3b10-6e5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmYWMzYjEwLTZlNWItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-S6OpMUnH819lFyVyHzPXyiB40JNOfiqaCTLJunQKW0=)**

clean_body: This is what defines our movement | Normally when you see my name in your inbox, you can expect the messages to be different from most political causes. I like to be transparent about our JanePAC endorsements, our strategic investments, and the climate wins we're securing together every step of the way. Today, I want to update you on something I’m proud of — the driving force that makes all of this work possible. Our average donation to emails like this one last quarter was just $26. | = Those $26 donations come from healthcare workers, educators, seniors, working families, and countless others — people from every corner of this country who chip in to emails like this one and understand that real change happens when ordinary people refuse to stay silent. When hundreds or thousands of supporters chip in $26, those gifts start to add up fast. Before you know it, that $26 becomes the resources we need to elect climate champions who can't be bought by fossil fuel interests. But grassroots movements like ours only work with sustained support from people like you who believe in what we’re fighting for and help us elect the very leaders who answer to the people, not Big Oil executives. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = P.S. Even if you can't pitch in $26 right now, any amount — whether it's $5, $15, or $20 — makes a difference and strengthens our movement to elect climate leaders who will put people over profit. = Thank you for everything you do. xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Yass
subject: Extreme heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Extreme heat is dangerous, and, in Maricopa County, too often deadly. But it’s something Yassamin is laser-focused on addressing. **Yassamin is and will continue to be a climate champion.** Whether it be through her work on the Phoenix City Council to establish the city’s first heat office — dedicated to helping keep families cool and find ways to make Phoenix a safer place to live — her fight in D.C. to call out Big Oil and the fossil fuel industry for the damage they’ve caused, or her work to pass legislation that carves out funding for community heat-mitigation projects, she’s focused on protecting our climate for young people who will inherit our problems. **[If you’re a climate champion in 18326 and are standing with Yassamin in defense of our planet, will you add your name today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111050475/556058433/-1517831421?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250707_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTk4MjcwZC02ZjViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CW-S1nrNhXsHbVaOWuid6gni8nTl5c3Q1jJ2E0hHxlo=&emci=79229ce8-6c5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5198270d-6f5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=45157234)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111050476/556058434/-1517831421?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250707_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTk4MjcwZC02ZjViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CW-S1nrNhXsHbVaOWuid6gni8nTl5c3Q1jJ2E0hHxlo=&emci=79229ce8-6c5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5198270d-6f5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=45157234)**
---
Yassamin has spent her career, both in and out of political office, working to find ways that we can reduce our emissions and reverse the effects of climate change. That’s why columnists at _Bloomberg Green_ , an outlet focused on highlighting climate news, recently named her as “One to Watch” — she’s a climate champion who is working to reduce emissions and create a more equitable future.
Thanks for standing with us today,
Team Yass

| | | | [READ MEMO IMMEDIATELY!](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPnCAYhn8N3jT4oTJ78NCu1SadbaY9NDsnooAjG0AWUTPz6xuNO9eH94Pn5WuN06q_l4h-RwCDEhMCQOQbAni_dG-PRt67S_yx3ppYXK7n_Lwdw-uRXeCZtrzNq3P4_aOZ2ql6mPf5758rvi7pcyDcnXzGj3cTaVqlN0qrSJTAT8B5JMuU5ukLYFzk0VD2Iueiw5y_pPTE8xQAU5GfXnoiaEEKEakSMOSYYgoYaEaSjGQ9FLRPsywDAEAZXpVNxGhbLT6Cn41L-GgiXQ4huGlXqhHUk-Szl8mqrJdiSyCorVykj6fZe2mF9Ahq7eKhj3fzWBkXG2nGeKGI1HMwzEihZoNIdVQrNjiNs-cSkUo7ph0b-oPz1rhW3Swi1VcFFixnyrjjVjb0TOzGTLuvqdEGaQMi1dYoSAQFs1qJDTyGn77q1n_NDveFkuptPP16vTef3WfkS-FWpbWaCooyfNsk979YSvgfAAD__5d_peg)

## **_OFFICIAL MEMORANDUM FOR_**
## **_TRUSTED TRUMP PATRIOTS_**

Patriot,

I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full.

We’ve accomplished a lot of great things in the last few weeks - many people are already saying our country has never been stronger.

To name some, but not all (there are too many to count!) of our accomplishments, we’ve seen....

Inflation? Lowest in four years.
Blue collar wages? Highest in sixty years. Border crossings? Historic lows.
Stock market? ALL TIME HIGHS
Iran’s nuclear program? ERASED

But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country.

Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. Had they not failed at such an incredible rate - I would say it's almost impressive!

But one thing is for sure - the more we win, the more ruthless, and determined they will grow.

AOC, one of the dumbest people in Congress, is already calling for my impeachment for a THIRD time.

And somehow she got almost eighty of her friends in Congress, all of whom suffering badly (terminally) from TDS **(TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME)** to go along with her.

**So as much as I’d love for us to put everything on cruise control, even just for a day to celebrate all we have accomplished, we simply DO NOT have the time, or luxury to do so - at least, not yet!

_We’re quickly approaching a critical moment in the midterm election cycle. And what happens in these final days of June will decide everything in the months to come._**

Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies and puppet masters, the liberal fake news media.

This is a battle I am fully confident we are ready for- and with your help today, we’ll have exactly what it takes to win it with ease & humiliate the Democrats once again.

Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU!

This midterm election cycle will be no different!

**[Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and we will KEEP AMERICA GREAT.>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGTmyAYhn8N3nTwAyU9eGhjzaHZTtrpYXNyFDCyA8gi6ri_vqNjcn15PnhevsY4rbq1QOwHAuiVGBEAIt8RwPutffu6yLW9xR_L4xKL2_2aXbdjOB_sDC_a8iYrr-H3z8vYjOWXeZ_-_rnj-5y-BsLq5As_3k2kaZTeUlZGogB-As4jWaQsS78BxnkW9QXDgmKgJwpNihm0BNKGYy5BEkFBkEgVgCHDDDPAwChJKKEd5KxLKaUAAIjiRdlEDLbR4iP4ybiEDybSRR-CG3elCkE1Sj55mSzKeik2AkFl5Sx9PE7eSyukR1BpF_ddvJvHyrjYSDPEM0OkmoKpjRRqMoiUR7V8C8dh8lwiUmpXa1f33ZHzxrhGPSwi5bNCHSyvlXHHrXXf1WI3rrV7Tg02SBsQKbdGQSLIa6uVQKQkZglt---0nvdwXygp34bTr_N6-Ww_I18Ityit1ZgzRPFjk9z_Yi7gfwAAAP__v4ilNg)**

THANK YOU.

\- President Donald J. Trump
[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGSoyAURb8Gd6bwgWIWLnraMVUz6alMNpOsLAMY6QGkEbXSX9-lZWd7OQ_O5TXGadU-CsR-IIBOiQEBIPKCAC6n29vnQT5up_h9vh9icboe0-NyDK8bO8GTtrxJy2P48_MwNEP5aS7j-e8VX6fkORAeTj7x7d2dNI3SS8rKSBTAc-A8kkXC0mQPGGdp1BUScsiwyOg-5YwmOUCSA2HQwH6fslxEqgAMKWaYAQZGyY4S2kLG2oRSCgCAKJ6V3YneNlq8Bz8at-O9iXTRheCGValCUA2Sj17uZmW9FAuBoLJykj4eRu-lFdIjqLSLuzZezWNlXGyk6eOJIVKNwdRGCjUaRMqtWraEQz96LhEptau1q7t2y3ljXKPuFpHyu0IdLK-VcdutddfWYjWutfue6m2QNiBSLo2CRJDVViuBSJmdz7_mS_v_5d8argsl5Vuf_359HD5uH5EvhJuV1mrIGKL4vkiufzEV8BUAAP__vLKkQA)

subject: How To Support

body:
https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5279733367566443427462497977656458784D67447735734C31374A4967457777355A6263426465494E625A456E493563337041476A3653566678545A66505A/editor_images/Screenshot%202023-06-14%20at%201.43.06%20PM.png [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5279733367566443427462497977656458784D67447735734C31374A4967457777355A6263426465494E625A456E493563337041476A3653566678545A66505A/editor_images/Screenshot%202023-06-14%20at%201.43.06%20PM.png]
Friend,
The deadly flash flooding that hit Central Texas this weekend has caused unthinkable death and destruction in Kerr County.
We are reaching out to you to offer some opportunities to support those impacted by this devastation.
Organizations:
The Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country [https://cftexashillcountry.fcsuite.com/erp/donate/create/fund?funit_id=4201]
The American Red Cross of Central and South Texas Region [https://www.redcross.org/donate/to/donation-to2.html/?alloy_redirect=eyJ2IjoxLCJhZCI6IjYxNDY0NTowOjB8MCw2MTQ2NDU6MDowfDIsNjE0NjQ1OjA6MHwxIn0%3D]
Thank you.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
I don’t rely on billionaires, Peter. I’m proud that my work is powered by a team of everyday folks who are committed to protecting our freedoms, delivering real progress for working families, and defending our democracy. That’s why I refuse to sit quietly while Republicans slash Medicaid funding and rip food assistance away from families so they can give billionaires tax cuts. But while I’m fighting against their billionaire-first agenda, I also want to make sure I’m fighting _for_ the issues that matter most to you. **Today, I’m not asking for your monetary support for my campaign. I’m asking for your opinion. ** Your voice helps shape my work in the Senate to deliver for working families in Hawaii and across the country. Whether you’re concerned about the high cost of living, GOP attacks on our rights, or something else, I want to know what matters most to you and your family. **[So Peter, can you fill out our July Priorities Survey today? Responses from supporters like you really help to inform our strategy and ensure your voice is heard.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111051028/556060413/-1152363974?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250707_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhiYjJkNS03MTViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CSg72Zu04TdyWX2XxO_qqHcaMxLgdevVzXxPsRe0Qo=&emci=46f8ae94-345b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b28bb2d5-715b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23190490)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111051029/556060414/-1152363974?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250707_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhiYjJkNS03MTViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6CSg72Zu04TdyWX2XxO_qqHcaMxLgdevVzXxPsRe0Qo=&emci=46f8ae94-345b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b28bb2d5-715b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23190490)

subject: re: We need stronger leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | We wanted to make sure you got John’s message from yesterday, friend. We’re tired of sitting around and waiting for someone above us to save us from Trump and Boebert’s insane decision to throw millions of Americans off their Medicaid. We need leadership right now and we know people want to see someone step up. **[That’s what John is doing. But he can’t do it alone. Will you rush $5, $10, or $25 to his campaign to help us fight for new leadership?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/T1u6ZPlbvgrkzJyYc3wBlZfHB8DJNYneq41tTUNZh8fwsAB7jL1OM4ugyLIs64PrAdduFHBis9_85vPzN9ia_Jrk8wk9VLwppx_lmD3JfrBye3iV7TXY446EnECUeAPF8vYoJORNo6MZlipzkwJFpDxziZL-z65slveLn6UV-iJnMtnsUnbuDmQR-zIeyakAAf74YkZfKH1L8SJDQNCWG-hEDLj9RGq3qWdzHPiKxeHQCdvaw8nw4-g1NQf5xQQ4k7I6yiM5-wrqv-WkHxvgMAnJkz0a3oQYhTD-2JeHrUN6eNATtLS5Axm3qz-oY4p9KAQXFUhuLAbF9tg4ml4wkd_Ad0bphSHTm8O3x8AHbA5Kj8GkZGYUKPXwpH9qqucV8xM8bcX_FGJAGZMBbGJGsiV4nGTX37nDYMRdMWV_VX4wuHD6IkMMeaQU54a0BZ45fl4CQxpx1bom9gccYnWXfd6_dPNSz2QsmkzPVw28UYWMF2ge8gLfB3is1A1QEA06E7ZDQmYgW7ZqmI7VSYnocNeYAojIsnhIm1Jt9rIRgt7LfetgS_8wYWt5WfY3-p7deZjVKHgqMXqC0vNDwhv8x_awfkT3mEychp1hWFrj2Nm3YwK1AZ5LmA4BEMCO6JnCyFstDqeKkgZqmRvBsQd05hk5PBh_5m4k2SbIny4Vz-iaeSUN1vwx1ETomaanNyBpTXpdvqH4ZK7F94HFNJLOkWvvPoay8SRyIWsOAOIL61a70ot0oe-lcbNmXSqGN1Y6wtK9A8L3WoJTFWx-khcRPcyLEDXwRN5F0vJWHUICkPtGgiTqX6Aju8vakqK9g_YuEMTIlsX9OltoLlx7lPr1HoTBcGE6-aXNLjPk8fgKI9sCK6JeijwmNW8x8z2pguF3HDlJ_dQuRjRzNBsNXQ/qqJqzqFcNMuUmow05C0UYVd32vxP9vj8/10)** Best,
Padora HQ \------ Begin Original Message ------ [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/Lb2e9DqHM6R-CpbNjLAomgb1uVPS0cYkwf9q6RPsEsi5i7mhV2C5WuUKpB6vhcDfaCXNXby1eDQVqDC9avWOgzNTX2uwV8uV6RHhWy5EeaH9xounL8YZ2dT30wLje3QdWVkm--nGLhZMbHa3TaKenV_gQspfY0uSDH8aE0Vjvc3SEfOr_04mYhgQ-jzzPfT3DaCMaH3S8hDdYMU70JjQUi1tGH_as0-jvSOjhUN6sAtt9XxQHlb54BMmLTvFAMpvi9GXQ_BJWaJpCqKRQH447LYRgkO8uarpaMmTjvlaoKacroVdTHoGpNgHdF03Jwkp3BcQVZPTNa7gybCN6DIKo3KUsNMqLtT-j3As-aa3mu3qn-pjjC3k6_Kfdte_WlGvMU1WXK98VFx9WF9KUTtBETT6yNhxKiWVu_3DgocswyCVhAobAcTi1Ez6NDlvQzbKhAhBCbPuP43KKYf8KQep_nAa9HI4IbeBwLpaQkD1fiUvJUOj4WWRFqoL0tsQfTrgrJiV2vV6NJ__YRnl_blC-cJUeWFtILcaBltHB3oZ4qyADOEcxabyEEsEdoDMVYs_rhvRQKsnKuXAvOe_OupOYWzfCbR4yYHYQUSE2yaBeHe_cvgZfQXPSBk9G4QMqt_6gvs_sjajQq-1nFhF1IOsV8CpKu3fGrFYe-PuL0462feUXdtNqiVwmtHzealrZCrak7MOl6Mq0WGxbDGt0aYsrIdn48btKC-LxqR_Th9AFZx2gflIP7WV2AqwuH3G5ECM-CGPpsilcY8g_ay6Gxcy9nwH5yt5LTxe1qwOgwVQjU31Jm0eDRgrrd-lCLSP92XOXefsf3WV4wUqmD_XqkwpHTf4sl7afOx-wKdf8s7rze6Z8_bX4P8DxD6Qx-jt_-VacxczqFIX-Q826-Vz2g/pWLcFdC9qok-RMQt5iWvajO_nA1EQ_tb/10) Friend, I didn’t get into this race because I was asked to by party leadership. I got in because I looked around, saw what was happening to our country. I saw the—let’s just call it what it is—weak response to Trump’s re-election campaign and his ruthless dismantling of our government and laws. And I knew I needed to step up. Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert are bringing nothing but chaos, extremism, and fear into communities that deserve real leadership. They’re working their asses off to throw thousands of folks in our district off Medicaid. And the truth is, the response from the top hasn’t been strong enough. Everywhere I travel, I ask the room: “Raise your hand if you think the Democratic leadership in DC is doing a good job standing up to Trump and his authoritarian agenda.” Guess how many hands go up? **Zero. Not one.** It’s the same in every corner of this district. I’ve seen your replies to our emails too — so many of you have told me you’ve stopped donating because you're frustrated. Because you want the party to be doing more. **I’m right there with you.** Too many are trying to play it safe while the far-right tears down institutions and attacks working families. That’s not good enough. Not when health care is on the line, democracy is under threat, and Trump is delivering on his promises of revenge and retribution. I’m a manufacturing engineer — not a party insider. I solve problems. I build things that work. And now, I’m building a campaign that’s about more than just flipping a seat — it’s about offering a new kind of leadership that fights like hell for the people who make this country work. I’m not in this race to cozy up to leadership. And I damn sure won’t be another rubber stamp for corporate-friendly policies. I’m in this race to build a coalition — of disaffected Democrats, independents, and even Republicans — to win this damn seat back. And to push the Democratic Party to become what it needs to be in this moment. Like I always say: **You don’t become the party of working people. You elect working people.** And that’s exactly what I intend to do. **[I’m asking you to chip in now to help us build this campaign from the ground up. If you believe we need stronger voices, bolder leadership, and real change — then I’m asking you to be part of this with clean_body: | | | We wanted to make sure you got John’s message from yesterday, friend. We’re tired of sitting around and waiting for someone above us to save us from Trump and Boebert’s insane decision to throw millions of Americans off their Medicaid. We need leadership right now and we know people want to see someone step up. Best, Padora HQ \------ Begin Original Message ------ Friend, I didn’t get into this race because I was asked to by party leadership. I got in because I looked around, saw what was happening to our country. I saw the—let’s just call it what it is—weak response to Trump’s re-election campaign and his ruthless dismantling of our government and laws. And I knew I needed to step up. Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert are bringing nothing but chaos, extremism, and fear into communities that deserve real leadership. They’re working their asses off to throw thousands of folks in our district off Medicaid. And the truth is, the response from the top hasn’t been strong enough. Everywhere I travel, I ask the room: “Raise your hand if you think the Democratic leadership in DC is doing a good job standing up to Trump and his authoritarian agenda.” Guess how many hands go up? Zero. Not one. It’s the same in every corner of this district. I’ve seen your replies to our emails too — so many of you have told me you’ve stopped donating because you're frustrated. Because you want the party to be doing more. I’m right there with you. Too many are trying to play it safe while the far-right tears down institutions and attacks working families. That’s not good enough. Not when health care is on the line, democracy is under threat, and Trump is delivering on his promises of revenge and retribution. I’m a manufacturing engineer — not a party insider. I solve problems. I build things that work. And now, I’m building a campaign that’s about more than just flipping a seat — it’s about offering a new kind of leadership that fights like hell for the people who make this country work. I’m not in this race to cozy up to leadership. And I damn sure won’t be another rubber stamp for corporate-friendly policies. I’m in this race to build a coalition — of disaffected Democrats, independents, and even Republicans — to win this damn seat back. And to push the Democratic Party to become what it needs to be in this moment. Like I always say: You don’t become the party of working people. You elect working people. And that’s exactly what I intend to do. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s get to work. In solidarity, John Padora Candidate for Congress, CO-04 John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

body:
Last week, House Republicans passed Trump’s Big Ugly Ass Bill.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111051190/556061124/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-07-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2VmMTRhYS03MzViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxrHGzCSHCq8FtzKsIRrnLlq6B1VnLo2WCv71szgbNE=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, House Republicans passed Trump’s Big Ugly Ass Bill.

This bill is dangerous, it’s cruel, and I fought like hell to stop it.

Here’s what’s in this monstrosity they just voted for:

**❌ ****$30 billion more for ICE** — an agency with a long track record of abuse and zero accountability.

**❌ ****The largest Medicaid cut in American history** — ripping health care away from 17 million people.

**❌ ****Gutting clean air protections for schools** — during fire season.

**❌ ****Tax breaks for billionaires** — while working families lose food assistance and health coverage.

_I introduced amendments to stop the worst of it:_

→ To cut ICE’s funding.

→ To protect the Child Tax Credit for immigrant families.

→ To keep clean air protections in our schools. **Republicans blocked every single one.

The truth is, with a historically slim GOP majority in the House, we were just a few seats away from stopping this bill.

[_That’s why we need to flip the House in November. If we want to stop this cruelty, we have to take back the gavel. Can you chip in $10 or more today to help take back the House and build the Democratic majority we need_?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111051191/556061125/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-07-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2VmMTRhYS03MzViLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxrHGzCSHCq8FtzKsIRrnLlq6B1VnLo2WCv71szgbNE=)**

clean_body: Last week, House Republicans passed Trump’s Big Ugly Ass Bill. | = | Peter, Last week, House Republicans passed Trump’s Big Ugly Ass Bill. This bill is dangerous, it’s cruel, and I fought like hell to stop it. Here’s what’s in this monstrosity they just voted for: ❌ $30 billion more for ICE — an agency with a long track record of abuse and zero accountability. ❌ The largest Medicaid cut in American history — ripping health care away from 17 million people. ❌ Gutting clean air protections for schools — during fire season. ❌ Tax breaks for billionaires — while working families lose food assistance and health coverage. I introduced amendments to stop the worst of it: → To cut ICE’s funding. → To protect the Child Tax Credit for immigrant families. → To keep clean air protections in our schools. Republicans blocked every single one. The truth is, with a historically slim GOP majority in the House, we were just a few seats away from stopping this bill. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We can’t let them get away with this. – Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. The battle left three Pinkerton agents and seven workers dead. Days later the National Guard was sent in to take control of the town and to crush the strike—causing the union to collapse. What followed was devastating: workers’ wages were slashed, hours were increased, and Carnegie Steel’s profits soared. Derek, this took place 133 years ago, but this story is all too familiar today. Today, corporate power runs rampant, and union-busting tactics are more commonly used than ever before to stop workers from exercising their right to unionize. [**As a former union organizer himself, Chris Deluzio is leading the charge in Congress to defend workers and ensure everyone has the opportunity to join and form a union. He knows what’s at stake, and he’s not backing down from the fight. Here in Western Pennsylvania, Chris knows that unchecked corporate power has grown and that union busting has hurt our workers and hollowed out our towns.
He knows how anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws in other states haven’t just weakened organized labor—they’ve driven down wages, stripped away benefits, and undercut the strength and stability of our region’s workforce and economy.
Chris fought for a union at the University of Pittsburgh. And he knows the power of solidarity.
That’s why he’s fighting back against the out-of-control corporate power hurting our workers and destroying our towns. In Congress, he’s working to make it easier for workers to join a union and engage in collective bargaining—and he needs you with him in this fight, Derek.

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Big Beautiful Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Big Beautiful Victory for the American people

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
During last year’s campaign Donald Trump and Congressional Republican’s promised to Secure the Border, Keep Taxes Low, Unleash American Energy Production and Strengthen Our Military.
With the historic passage of the One Big Beautiful Bill these promises have been kept and a new “Golden Era” of economic growth and safer America is upon us.
But it’s not just Republicans who are celebrating the passage of the OBBB - just check out what these groups are saying:
* **American Farm Bureau** \- “Lawmakers took a big step toward ensuring America’s farmers and ranchers can continue to keep pantries filled for America’s families.”
* **NFIB Small Business** \- “This the most pro-small business legislative victory in recent history.”
* **National Fraternal Order of Police** -“We thank Republicans for removing taxes on overtime and strengthening our border security.”
* **National Association of Manufacturers** \- “The OBBB is the win of a generation for Manufacturing in America.”
* **National Rifle Association** \- “The Beautiful Bill delivers law abiding gun owners freedom from an unconstitutional and punitive tax.”
* **Pro-Life America** \- “The passage of the One Big Beautiful Bill is a historic victory for the pro-life cause.”
* **Association of Mature American Citizens** \- “The Beautiful Bill enacts a $4,000 tax deduction for Americans over age 65 and raises the child tax deduction to $2,200, offering much needed relief to parents struggling with the cost of living.”

In total, nearly 300 pro-jobs growth groups have come out in support of the One Big Beautiful Bill. You can see a full list here (link to White House) [https://www.whitehouse.gov/obbb/endorsements/](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=7ab90bd1f0&e=5a45b9550e)
**Challenging Bob Ferguson to Debate**
Meanwhile, here in Washington State, it came as little surprise that Democrat Bob Ferguson - who pushed through the largest tax increase in our state’s history on families already struggling with higher costs - publicly criticized the OBBB.
Bob wants to call the bill “a grotesque betrayal.” I disagree and issued him a challenge. Let’s debate it — I’ll stand up for tax relief, growth, and freedom, while Bob can defend higher taxes and bloated government.
I’m still waiting to hear back from Bob.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **Celebrating the 4th with President Trump and a special guest at the White House**
It was great to join President Trump at the White House for the signing ceremony of the One Big Beautiful Bill. Even better, I decided to give my one guest ticket for the event to Luke Blue, a college freshman from Spokane who had been an outstanding grassroots volunteer on last year’s campaign.
Let this be a lesson to all the young people out there interested in getting involved in politics. Roll up your sleeves and work really, really, really hard on a campaign and you too might go from knocking on doors and putting up signs to meeting the President of the United States at the White House while celebrating historic conservative victories!
Thanks, Luke!
---
|
---
| And, thank you to all of you who helped me and other Republicans win in last year’s campaign!
Let’s redouble our efforts and keep Republicans winning and the Big Beautiful Victories coming!
Hope you had a wonderful Independence Day! We live in a great country.
-Michael
---
| [DONATE](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=7b03f1784e&e=5a45b9550e)
---
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=dddc9d439d) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=dddc9d439d)
---
|
---

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[did not hold back on mainstream media reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/2eff4313-716f-461b-92cd-d7cc819fc21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when he was confronted and asked if Americans should be concerned about Iranian sleeper cells in the U.S.
His answer will give you chills...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2eff4313-716f-461b-92cd-d7cc819fc21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2eff4313-716f-461b-92cd-d7cc819fc21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"There's widespread fear among Iranian Americans that some sleeper cells have moved into the United States during the Biden administration, what do you know about these sleeper cells?" the reporter asked.
**[Homan answered bluntly and honestly,](https://substack.com/redirect/2eff4313-716f-461b-92cd-d7cc819fc21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "All Americans should be concerned about sleeper cells! The Biden administration opened the border, we got over 2 million known got-aways, that's not a guess!"
"They didn't want to be vetted, they didn't want to be finger printed...they could be national security threats!" he continued.
Watch Homan go off at the press!
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2eff4313-716f-461b-92cd-d7cc819fc21c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **[The Grid Can't Handle AI -- But This $6 Company Might](https://substack.com/redirect/d522ed20-906a-4da4-8bdb-34d856263e92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
AI is booming.
But there's a growing problem no one wants to admit: **our infrastructure isn 't ready for it**.1
The U.S. grid is already stretched thin. In many states, it's decades overdue for upgrades. Now layer on thousands of energy-hungry AI data centers -- and it's a recipe for blackouts, water shortages, and failure.1
In fact, just this month, Bloomberg reported that AI data centers are **draining millions of gallons of water** from drought-prone areas in the U.S.9
Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia is going the opposite direction -- investing **$100 billion** to build ultra-modern AI power hubs running on next-gen energy tech.
**The U.S. needs a breakthrough. That 's where [Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/d522ed20-906a-4da4-8bdb-34d856263e92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) comes in.**
They're the first American company9 to develop a commercially-viable1 sodium-ion battery pack that can power AI infrastructure.1
Why it matters:
* Sodium is **1,400 × more abundant than lithium**9
* Batteries are projected to be **up to 60% cheaper** 6
* They're safer and scalable1

Over **7,800 investors** have already backed them with **$7M+**.3
You **[can still invest in their current round at just $6/share](https://substack.com/redirect/d522ed20-906a-4da4-8bdb-34d856263e92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 4 -- **with up to 20% bonus shares** 4
The company's share offering price has increased 209% since its first funding round, which sold out completely.2
This opportunity won't stay under the radar much longer...4
And the next time you hear about it, **it may be too late to get it for just $6/share.** 4

* * *
# Pediatrician fired after suggesting Texas flood victims were Trump supporters who 'got what they voted for'
Houston pediatrician Dr. Christina B. Propst was fired from Blue Fish Pediatrics after posting **[a now-deleted Facebook message that appeared to mock Texas flood victims](https://substack.com/redirect/72f55e74-1eed-408b-aca3-013d7f290d7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for their assumed political beliefs.
_" Kerr County MAGA voted to gut FEMA. They deny climate change. May they get what they voted for. Bless their hearts," _she wrote under the username Chris Tina.
* **Post sparked outrage, going viral online** -- The message, which also wished safety to "all visitors, children, non-MAGA voters and pets," was widely circulated after being reposted by Libs of TikTok, prompting backlash and concerns from Texas residents and social media users.
* **Propst 's employer swiftly condemned the comments** -- Blue Fish Pediatrics stated they terminated Propst, and added, "We do not support or condone any statement that politicizes tragedy, diminishes human dignity, or fails to clearly uphold compassion for every child and family."
* **Texas Medical Board monitoring situation** -- Dr. Sherif Zaafran, head of the Texas Medical Board, emphasized that "there is no place for politicization" amid ongoing rescue efforts, adding that any formal complaints "will be thoroughly investigated" though no official investigation has been announced.

* * *
# Trump approves disaster relief after tragic Texas flood
President Donald Trump **[approved'a Major Disaster Declaration for Kerr County,' ](https://substack.com/redirect/93e0db70-1eac-4510-9d6d-92117ce53e48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**Texas Sunday following devastating floods that have killed at least 90 people statewide, including 75 in Kerr County alone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/10a9c338-53b9-4d53-94b1-d4ef2ddde943?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Christian summer camp among hardest-hit sites** -- Camp Mystic, a Christian retreat for girls near the Guadalupe River, was severely impacted by the flooding. "Eleven children and one counselor are still missing," Kerr County Sheriff Larry Leitha said during a press briefing.
* **Hundreds rescued, recovery efforts continue** -- Trump reported more than 850 people have been rescued by Coast Guard and Texas first responders. "These families are enduring an unimaginable tragedy," he said on Truth Social, adding that federal officials are coordinating with state and local leaders.
* **Federal aid mobilized as rivers remain swollen** -- The disaster declaration allows for federal support in ongoing search-and-rescue and recovery operations. With road access still limited in multiple counties, officials said more aid and personnel have been deployed to the region.

* * *
# Trump SLAMS Musk's new political party in ongoing feud
**[President Donald Trump slammed Elon Musk's third-party declaration](https://substack.com/redirect/19917e93-fb7d-4da6-8225-6eda44e97f27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Sunday as the feud between these two once formidable partners rages on.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3023508d-8a39-460d-8e32-388c093ec6a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump blasted Musk for launching the "America Party,"** calling the billionaire a "train wreck" and warning that third parties only bring "complete and total disruption & chaos." Trump added, "It really seems to have been developed for two parties. Third parties have never worked."
* **Musk unveiled America Party after slamming Trump 's megabill** -- Musk announced the new political venture Saturday in response to Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill Act, which he claims would "bankrupt the country." The legislation, signed July 4, is projected to add $3.9 trillion to the national debt over 10 years, according to the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget.
* **Trump said Musk is "off the rails" and fueled by personal interests** -- On Truth Social, Trump accused Musk of turning against Republicans due to cuts to green energy subsidies and personal disappointment over his NASA pick. "It is a Great Bill but, unfortunately for Elon, it eliminates the ridiculous Electric Vehicle (EV) Mandate."
* **Musk vowed to target House and Senate races despite GOP fallout** -- Despite souring on Trump, Musk reportedly plans to back competitive congressional candidates under the America Party banner. In 2024, the Tesla and SpaceX CEO spent more than $290 million helping Trump and Republican allies win office.
